name: Wes Moore
subject: What really happened last year
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1056%2E1086043%2EeXneIt)
Peter, remember when THIS happened at last year’s Army-Navy game?
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251212-2.efVVqO&refcode=em-20251212-2&t=2&akid=1056%2E1086043%2EeXneIt)
I met President Trump at the Army-Navy game last year, and unlike what he says now, he actually walked up to me and said “My people are telling me you’re doing a really good job. How can I help?”
So I told him about our work to rebuild the Key Bridge. I told him about how a ship the size of three football fields slammed into the bridge, killing six construction workers and causing the collapse that closed the Port of Baltimore.
And, for the record, I definitely did _not_ tell him he’s my favorite president. (Even if that’s how he remembers it. 🤔)
Look, when we can partner with the federal government I’ll welcome it. But when Trump’s pushing lies, I’ll call it out. **That’s what it means to put Maryland first.**
**[If you’re with me (and ready to see Army beat Navy), will you chip in any amount right now before I see Trump at the game tomorrow? It will go a long way toward showing the strength of this grassroots team.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251212-2.efVVqO&refcode=em-20251212-2&t=3&akid=1056%2E1086043%2EeXneIt)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251212-2.efVVqO&amount=5&refcode=em-20251212-2&t=22&akid=1056%2E1086043%2EeXneIt)**
Thanks, Peter!
— Wes

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251212-2&t=23&refcode2=1056_1086043_eXneIt&akid=1056%2E1086043%2EeXneIt)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=1056%2E1086043%2EeXneIt)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1056%2E1086043%2EeXneIt)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

I told him about how a ship the size of three football fields slammed into the bridge, killing six construction workers and causing the collapse that closed the Port of Baltimore. name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: Our latest round of endorsements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
These young progressives are ready to shake up the status quo.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251212-1&t=1&akid=2934%2E587540%2EfiBwds)
Peter, we announced our newest slate of endorsements this week, and these young progressive candidates are ready to shake up the status quo next year.
**Lauren Babb Tomlinson, Nabeela Syed,** and **Nida Allam** represent the best of what the next generation of leaders has to offer. They are fearless when it comes to fighting for their communities and have the vision to lead our country forward.
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251212_1_slate.y6Typ5&refcode=em20251212-2934&amount=5&t=2&akid=2934%2E587540%2EfiBwds)
**[Can you split a $5 donation to support each of their campaigns and Leaders We Deserve as we fight to elect more young progressives in 2026?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251212_1_slate.y6Typ5&refcode=em20251212-2934&amount=5&t=3&akid=2934%2E587540%2EfiBwds)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251212_1_slate.y6Typ5&amount=5&refcode=em20251212-2934&t=22&akid=2934%2E587540%2EfiBwds)**
* **Lauren Babb Tomlinson** has been on the frontlines of the tough fights to defend abortion rights, expand access to affordable healthcare, and protect workers’ rights. Now she is running for Congress in California’s 6th District.
* **Nabeela Syed** is running for Illinois State Senate in the 26th District to keep lowering costs for working families, protecting access to healthcare, making voting more accessible to young people, and strengthening public schools.
* **Nida Allam** is challenging an ineffective Democratic incumbent in North Carolina’s 4th District because her district needs someone fighting for them. Nida has a strong record supporting education and raising workers’ wages.

We’re going to elect all of these candidates _(and many more)_ next year. But we can only make that happen with the continued support of this grassroots team.
**[Can we count on you to join us, Peter? Split $5 or more now between Lauren, Nabeela, Nida, and Leaders We Deserve to help power these fights.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251212_1_slate.y6Typ5&refcode=em20251212-2934&amount=5&t=23&akid=2934%2E587540%2EfiBwds)**
Thank you for your support,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251212-1&t=24&refcode2=2934_587540_fiBwds&akid=2934%2E587540%2EfiBwds)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=2934%2E587540%2EfiBwds)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2934%2E587540%2EfiBwds)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE

Washington, DC 20003

subject: Our biggest deadline yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
With your help, we can ring in 2026 on a strong note.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3992%2E582294%2E-ArOu0)
Our biggest fundraising deadline yet is coming up on December 31st! **[Can you chip in now to help us hit our goal before it’s too late?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251212_2_dtc.KByCF2&refcode=em20251212-2&t=2&akid=3992%2E582294%2E-ArOu0)**

New Hampshire's Senate race will be one of the most expensive and competitive races on the map in 2026.
National Republicans and the Wall Street money machine are preparing to spend big to flip this seat. If they’re successful, Democrats will have no chance of taking back the Senate.
That’s why we need to close out this year with a huge surge of grassroots support. With your help, we can post a fundraising report that demonstrates the strength of our campaign and shows national Republicans that New Hampshire is a poor bet for their money.
**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or $25 today to help us reach our year-end fundraising goal and prove that New Hampshire is not for sale?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251212_2_dtc.KByCF2&refcode=em20251212-2&t=4&akid=3992%2E582294%2E-ArOu0)**

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: LIHEAP Applications are Now Open
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100171147.172419.6&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100171147.172419.6&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171147.172419.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16341)
#
# **LIHEAP Applications are Now Open**
[Eligible individuals and families can now apply](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171147.172419.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16343) for the Low Income Home Energy Assistance program (LIHEAP) to receive cash grants to help pay for heating bills. LIHEAP can help renters and homeowners keep their home warm and safe during the coldest seasons. To qualify for LIHEAP in Pennsylvania, you must meet income requirements, which are set based on your household size. Eligible Pennsylvanians can apply from December 3, 2025, to April 10, 2026, for a cash grant to help pay your heating bill. You can receive from $200 to $1,000 based on your household size, income, and fuel type. **[You can learn more online.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171147.172419.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16343)** If you have additional questions, call the LIHEAP hotline at 866-857-7095.
* * *

clean_body: If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can . | Share On | ---|--- LIHEAP Applications are Now Open for the Low Income Home Energy Assistance program (LIHEAP) to receive cash grants to help pay for heating bills. LIHEAP can help renters and homeowners keep their home warm and safe during the coldest seasons. To qualify for LIHEAP in Pennsylvania, you must meet income requirements, which are set based on your household size. Eligible Pennsylvanians can apply from December 3, 2025, to April 10, 2026, for a cash grant to help pay your heating bill. You can receive from $200 to $1,000 based on your household size, income, and fuel type. If you have additional questions, call the LIHEAP hotline at 866-857-7095. * | Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes | | | District Office 2401 North 54th Street Philadelphia, PA 19131 Phone: 215.879.7777 Fax: 215.879.7778 | | Harrisburg Office Senate Box 203007 Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007 Phone: 717.787.7112 Fax: 717.772.0579 | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | \- \-

subject: I will always be grateful for you! Why?

body:
Because come hell or high water, you never betrayed me.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
I will always be grateful for you!
Because come hell or high water, you never betrayed me.
As 2025 comes to a close, here’s what I’d like to thank you for:
[THANK YOU MEMO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
But whatever you do Friend, DON’T GET DISTRACTED. **_[Why? I've got a special thank you gift for you at the bottom of this email!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
Through everything this year – the attacks, the noise, and the wins – you never wavered. You stood strong and you kept the faith. Your responses to my emails are the real reason we’re still fighting and winning.
You truly have made a difference in Making America Great Again! Our work is far from over, but I have a special opportunity **JUST FOR YOU!**

**_[This special offer ends when the clock strikes 12 MIDNIGHT on December 31st but please don’t wait until then. I want to hear from you NOW.>>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
I’ll always have your back because you’ve always had mine.
Thank you, and God bless you.
Donald J. Trump

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: The Kelloff Chronicle Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
https://alexkelloff.com/ [https://alexkelloff.com/]Introduction from Alex
I hope you all had a wonderful Thanksgiving and found a moment to pause and enjoy time with family and friends. As we approach the holidays, I want to say how truly grateful I am for each and every one of you. Your support is the backbone of this campaign.
Since launching the campaign in April, I’ve now personally visited every county in the district– all 27 of them. What I’m always struck by is how similar people’s concerns are. They want a government that understands the cost of living crisis in this country, a government that will protect our public lands and our way of life, and a representative who cares more about common sense than toeing a party line.
— Alex
What’s happened
It’s been another month on the road here in CO-03. My favorite event of the last several weeks was an ‘empty chair town hall’ organized by concerned citizens in Durango, where my opponent, Jeff Hurd, was invited to speak but refused to commit to showing up.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-ak [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-ak]
What I was struck by was how much the questions people were asking– with over 130 in attendance– mirrored so closely what I heard in all corners of the district. Concerns about cost of living, our public lands and water, and the rule of law and corruption in this country.
While we were in Durango, a local business owner gave us a tour of his slaughterhouse. It was a reminder of how tenuous our ranching and agricultural economy can be here in Colorado– and with the pressure they’re getting right now on costs, labor, and being able to sell their beef, it’s harder than ever.
We’ve been on the road a lot this month– below is a map showing several (but not all!) of our stops. From Cuchara to Craig, it’s the same thing. People simply cannot afford to live here in God’s country, and they’re worried we’re losing our way of life.
Below is a quick map of some of the many stops we’ve made in the last several weeks.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-ak [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-ak]
Holding Hurd Accountable
Tariffs: You’ve heard a lot in the last year about tariffs as we’re all subject to the President’s whims on who we assign tariffs to, who reciprocates against us, and who tweeted what. All of which results in all of our costs going up. Here’s the thing I can’t emphasize enough: Congress could stop all this, tomorrow. The constitutional basis for tariffs resides with Congress, and it’s only because they’ve abdicated that power to the President that we’re in this mess.
This situation is a perfect example of why that power is supposed to reside with Congress. Personal grievance and a warped understanding of economics shouldn’t be the driving force behind our trade policy.
CORE Act & Public Lands: Last week, I went on a hunting trip with some close friends of the campaign. We didn’t shoot anything - "a lot of hunting, not a lot of shooting." What we did do is marvel at just how beautiful and unique our public lands are. Our public lands are our greatest resource.
In Congress, I’d support the CORE Act on day one.
Small Businesses: The other day, we sent out an email about a new jobs report that showed the labor market losing 32,000 jobs, the majority of which were from small businesses. That’s incredibly destructive for a district like ours, where small businesses are the backbone of our economy. In most of the counties here in CO-03, the largest employers are the government and local hospitals, followed by small businesses.
When we have a chaotic economy, spiking health care premiums, and an uncertain next three years – of course small businesses are going to be conservative. Nobody can plan into the future when our government clearly cares more about vanity projects than a stable economy.
What’s Coming Soon
We’ll be having several fundraisers and continuing our schedule of public events all across the district.
If you’d like to host a small meet & greet to meet Alex, discuss the race, and ask questions, we’d love to talk to you! You can email campaign@alexkelloff.com [campaign@alexkelloff.com] and one of our team members will quickly follow up with you to discuss scheduling.
What You Can Do
* FOLLOW ON SOCIAL MEDIA: Stay up to date with my team at Facebook, [https://www.facebook.com/alexkelloffco/] X [https://x.com/alexkelloffco] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/alexkelloffco/] , TikTok [https://www.tiktok.com/@alexkelloffco] , and Bluesky [https://bsky.app/profile/alexkelloffco.bsky.social]

* VOLUNTEER: Sign up to get involved with my campaign » [https://alexkelloff.com/volunteer]

* FINANCIALLY SUPPORT: Donate to my campaign today » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-ak]

https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61576054733402 [https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61576054733402] https://x.com/alexkelloffco [https://x.com/alexkelloffco] https://www.instagram.com/alexkelloffco/ [https://www.instagram.com/alexkelloffco/] https://www.tiktok.com/@alexkelloffco [https://www.tiktok.com/@alexkelloffco]
Alex Kelloff for Colorado
P.O. Box 27
Snowmass, CO 81654
United States
Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ghrTLD7Dz06Yt8Cxt8W84g2?unsubscribedata=LDMAUkB5Osn8zRjv5tQtG9YOixo9f39sp%2FXthZEZhzIJ3%2FDQWitQkKQj%2FKVucYaWw%2FcvqNN19qVUt3O1nyGhVJdaSYxdaZhNKnozqs1Iixf9K569w5KMGa9%2FDrWTWiFx8Xo3tzKZMGRQOgljfoja0oEUiFO1Yn9etYXjpBOdVtRjJmGjGz%2BQ6ieHGwARC%2FLJrHSguqAWPiox2jwrHvn5WrrA5r1WCYk8La3S0b2NAcle18y5fYgxUdnvbpqyrOQyN%2FniYNdESLvEyC7FepHiSN0%2Ft1Ln65ZeqWKWTB26LSGzsRCtmS4v8EeEIess7QJ7fQPjJFOrAUhftp%2BIyoHVyumaBTj6qcuHhWmcS6kvS%2BWfv5Cv7BQATQKpG5sAs85TzmHqn2DmUdWBIaP%2FyeaTXF2gW2NO%2FYDn4aZOtnUuFadowFN%2F0O6%2FopQQx%2F0J7ouZ

Peter ,
The chair of the Republican National Committee is openly warning that 2026 could be a “looming disaster” for his party, and GOP strategists are panicking. Their candidates can’t distance themselves from Trump’s tariffs, his attacks on workers, or his refusal to take affordability seriously – and voters are noticing.
Meanwhile, Democrats are already overperforming by 10+ points in special elections!
But midterms aren’t won because the other side is falling apart – they’re won because we organize, fund turnout, and meet voters where they are. That’s what GOTV PAC does.
If we want to turn Republican panic into real Democratic wins in 2026, we have to invest now in voter contact programs and candidates who actually fight for working people.
Can you chip in today to help GOTV PAC build the ground game that flips seats and breaks MAGA’s grip on Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12122025]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Three important reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'm running for Senate to fight for working families

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10289?t=2&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)
---
Null, with our crucial mid-month fundraising deadline coming up on Monday, I'm emailing again to ask you to **[chip in $5 today for three important reasons:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10290?t=3&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)**
| | | | **We have to stop the chaos.** Between Trump's chaotic policies causing prices to skyrocket, cuts to SNAP, and surging health care costs – working families deserve strong, stable leadership. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | **The GOP megadonors are circling.** Outside spending groups and billionaires are zeroing in on Michigan, trying to buy this seat for Republican Mike Rogers. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | **We must win in Michigan to flip the Senate blue.****** Polls show I’m the strongest Democrat running. I’m leading in the primary and polling the best against Mike Rogers in the general. |
---|---|---|---
**I'm running for Senate to do what I’ve always done: fight for working families. But the ONLY way I can win this tough battleground race is with the grassroots support of folks like you – and with time running out, I'm still ****way short of my $175,000 mid-month goal. Can I count on you to come through right away?**
**[Rush $5 or more right now to help us close this gap, win in Michigan, and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10290?t=4&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10290?t=5&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10291?t=6&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10292?t=7&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10293?t=8&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)
---
With grit and gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10294?t=9&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10289?t=10&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=11&akid=1618%2E49239%2EihjpQ4)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: The fierce Native women who made me who I am
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
From my great-grandmother, mother, and many before them, I’ve been blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women.

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2293?t=2&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
Friend, I want to take a moment to honor some of the fierce Native women who made me who I am.
**_[But first, I’m running to represent all New Mexicans and give a voice to those who don’t have one. Will you donate $5 to our grassroots campaign for governor to help make history in New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2294?t=3&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2293?t=4&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
---
From my great-grandmother, mother and many before them, I’ve been blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2293?t=5&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
The fierce women who raised me – plus me in my Garth Brooks tee!
My mother, Mary Toya, was born and raised in a train boxcar, where the Laguna people created a community far from their home. She proudly served in the U.S. Navy, raised four kids as a military wife and devoted 25 years to Indian education at the Bureau of Indian Affairs.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2293?t=6&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ) [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2293?t=7&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
Mom served in the Navy and played the snare drum in the Santa Fe Railroad Indian Band.
Standing on the shoulders of the Native women who came before me, I summoned the courage to run for office. When I became one of the first Native American women elected to Congress and later on the first Native American cabinet secretary in U.S. history, I swore to leave the ladder down behind me so our youth would know they can be _anything_ they want to be.
But here’s what I’m reminded of as 2026 approaches: **History doesn’t just happen. We have to make it _together_. No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor. With your support, friend, we can change that.**
**But the governor's office in New Mexico has changed parties every eight years for decades, which means that the GOP and their billionaire donors will do anything to flip this seat in 2026.**
**_[I'm counting on your grassroots support to help us fight back. So please, would you consider making a contribution of $5 to my campaign for governor today? I'd be so grateful to have you on our team.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2294?t=8&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2295?t=9&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
---
| | [Donate $35 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2296?t=10&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
---
| | [Donate $50 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2297?t=11&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
---
| | [Other Amount >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2293?t=12&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
---
Be fierce,

Deb

|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2298?t=13&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=14&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=15&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=16&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=17&akid=6197%2E400544%2EyfVgrQ)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com
**PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**

| | Friend, The more we learn about Minnesota’s fraud crisis, the clearer it becomes: **This didn’t happen by accident. It happened because Democrat state leaders refused to act.** For years, warnings piled up. Costs exploded. Fake providers multiplied. But Governor Tim Walz and his administration looked the other way, even as billions in taxpayer dollars were disappearing. Now we know the truth is even worse than anyone imagined. **Federal prosecutors confirm that stolen Minnesota welfare funds were moved overseas and ended up benefiting terrorists organizations like Al-Shabaab.** Taxpayer money meant for kids in need was diverted into international criminal networks. Criminals and their families are living in luxury overseas on our dime! **That should shake every Minnesotan.** This is exactly why I authored the **Fraud Accountability and Recovery (FAR) Act** — to ensure the United States can finally recover stolen funds and shut off aid to any foreign government that shields criminals who defraud the American people.Here’s the plain truth: **If we don’t demand accountability now, nothing will change.****
**The fraud will continue.
The money will keep flowing overseas.
And Minnesota taxpayers will keep getting stuck with the bill.I’m fighting to stop it, but I need your help to keep this effort strong.**Will you contribute $25, $50, or even $100 today** to help us advance the FAR Act and protect taxpayer dollars?

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, The more we learn about Minnesota’s fraud crisis, the clearer it becomes: This didn’t happen by accident. It happened because Democrat state leaders refused to act. For years, warnings piled up. Costs exploded. Fake providers multiplied. But Governor Tim Walz and his administration looked the other way, even as billions in taxpayer dollars were disappearing. Now we know the truth is even worse than anyone imagined. Federal prosecutors confirm that stolen Minnesota welfare funds were moved overseas and ended up benefiting terrorists organizations like Al-Shabaab. Taxpayer money meant for kids in need was diverted into international criminal networks. Criminals and their families are living in luxury overseas on our dime! That should shake every Minnesotan. This is exactly why I authored the Fraud Accountability and Recovery (FAR) Act — to ensure the United States can finally recover stolen funds and shut off aid to any foreign government that shields criminals who defraud the American people.Here’s the plain truth: If we don’t demand accountability now, nothing will change. The fraud will continue. The money will keep flowing overseas. And Minnesota taxpayers will keep getting stuck with the bill.I’m fighting to stop it, but I need your help to keep this effort strong.Will you contribute $25, $50, or even $100 today to help us advance the FAR Act and protect taxpayer dollars? We’re up against an entrenched political class that would rather downplay this crisis than confront it. But with your support, we can force real accountability and restore trust in our systems.Thank you for standing with me in this fight.— Brad P.S. Investigators say we’re only scratching the surface. Your support today ensures we keep exposing the truth and demanding the reforms Minnesota deserves. | | | Paid for by Finstad for Congress

name: Marni von Wilpert
subject: This is the biggest swing district in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Get out your color palettes. It’s time to paint CA-48 blue!
| Team, it's Marni Von Wilpert. The Voter Protection Project said I could reach out with a major ask.

If you’ve felt like all eyes are on California, it’s because **_this race is one of the most competitive in the country._**

We passed Prop. 50 last month, which took this district, CA-48, from safe **_red_** to **_tilt Democratic._** Californians have a unique opportunity to flip this seat and send Darrell Issa, the third-richest Member of Congress, packing. And, we can set the stage for Democrats to take back the House.

But beating an incumbent is no small feat, and in a race as tight as this, we’re going to need to raise as much as we can to go up against the MAGA millionaires. One more contribution could mean one more voter, and that could be the difference between taking back the House or two more years of a Trump trifecta.

Republicans are already pouring money into saving this seat, but we have something they don't have: **people power.**

[That's why we need you with us. The fight starts now. Can you split a contribution between me and the Voter Protection Project to support my campaign and finally flip CA-48 blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/99022?t=6&akid=22233%2E878179%2E0Ptkxg)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Marni von Wilpert and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/99023?t=7&akid=22233%2E878179%2E0Ptkxg)

It’s not going to be easy, but I’m confident that with this team, we’ll get there.

Onward,

Marni

Hi Peter, I wanted you to be the first to know – I’m launching my campaign to be the next governor of Wisconsin. [**I hope you’ll take a moment to support my campaign by splitting a contribution between me and****Zoe Lofgren****.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121170198/588627504/1508046039?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-12-12_WIS_GOV_ES-37448&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmM4YTVhNC1jYmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1YJ3HI8honMb2VlGEKCh5lynwwca8I4mKztkIAnOTg=) This is a critical moment for Wisconsin. **Growing up, my family’s union jobs were enough to get us a ticket to the middle-class – but today, working hard and playing by the rules no longer opens those same doors to the middle-class. ** Buying a house seems impossible for too many of us. Tax loopholes continue to benefit billionaires, not middle class families. And family farmers are being squeezed by Trump’s tariffs. This moment we’re in right now demands that we step up to the plate – that we choose bold, innovative leadership that meets today’s challenges and will take on Donald Trump. I’m talking about expanding Badgercare, closing loopholes for the ultra-rich to cut taxes for middle-class working families, restoring workers’ rights, and above all, creating a better future for Wisconsinites by rejecting the Washington way and coming together behind the Wisconsin way.
[**If you’re with me, please take a moment to split a donation between my campaign and****Zoe Lofgren****. It means a lot to have you in my corner, Peter:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121170199/588627505/1508046039?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-12-12_WIS_GOV_ES-37448&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmM4YTVhNC1jYmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1YJ3HI8honMb2VlGEKCh5lynwwca8I4mKztkIAnOTg=)****

clean_body: I hope you’ll join me in this work| | | | | = Hi Peter, I wanted you to be the first to know – I’m launching my campaign to be the next governor of Wisconsin. = This is a critical moment for Wisconsin. Growing up, my family’s union jobs were enough to get us a ticket to the middle-class – but today, working hard and playing by the rules no longer opens those same doors to the middle-class. Buying a house seems impossible for too many of us. Tax loopholes continue to benefit billionaires, not middle class families. And family farmers are being squeezed by Trump’s tariffs. This moment we’re in right now demands that we step up to the plate – that we choose bold, innovative leadership that meets today’s challenges and will take on Donald Trump. I’m talking about expanding Badgercare, closing loopholes for the ultra-rich to cut taxes for middle-class working families, restoring workers’ rights, and above all, creating a better future for Wisconsinites by rejecting the Washington way and coming together behind the Wisconsin way. =** If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: = = = = = = | | More to come. Thanks for your support.– Mandela Barnes | | Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. =** | | | Paid for by Lofgren for Congress Lofgren for Congress PO Box 913 San Jose, CA 95113 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please .

Did you hear the news?
The Supreme Court officially approved Texas’ new gerrymandered map that eliminates 5 Democratic districts at Trump’s command.
Now, flipping seats from red to blue is our last chance for Democrats to retake the U.S. House in 2026. Will you rush a donation to our organizing efforts right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec25?refcode=&amount=]

Without voter approval, they pushed through partisan maps designed to lock Democrats out of previously blue seats — all to stop us from winning back the House.
But California Strong Democrats like Gov. Gavin Newsom moved boldly . We protected fair elections in California with a landslide victory on Prop 50 so we can still help decide control of Congress.
Now comes the hard part, because flipping the House requires massive organizing in California’s competitive districts.
Your donation today will directly fund:
📣 Organizers on the ground in key U.S. House battlegrounds;
🚪 Door-knocking and phonebanks reaching persuadable voters;
📝 Multilingual literature and digital outreach to expand turnout;
🛡️ Voter protection efforts to ensure every Californian can cast their ballot.
After passing Prop 50, Texas Republicans are counting on California being exhausted and falling behind.
Let’s prove them wrong.

subject: My jaw almost hit the floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
these poll numbers shocked me

Friend, it's Ted Cruz.

My jaw almost hit the floor when I saw these poll numbers.

_**[Democrats have taken a 14-point lead over Republicans.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv9rriqu8janf85cdbmu0f9bmaivjojvttblh88o_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cdh6cor2c5h2bs)**_

**[We can't write this off as a fake poll.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpti072qeevms46mq2t9fg6e1f26jq2adhr9qgbo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cdh6cor2c5h2bs)**

_Too much is at stake._

**[We can't sit back and assume we'll make up ground.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z38l28qang5mna0sdbbqe9p234v7lc9jl34j6pdg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cdh6cor2c5h2bs)**

_Nothing is guaranteed._

**[Our only option is to press forward and fight like hell.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zospfteq15f2da51b2h6o440c08tjtebabv14nno_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cdh6cor2c5h2bs)**

It starts with you, Friend. You've been there for us before, and now I'm personally asking you to step up during what could be our most desperate hour.

**[And all I'm asking for is $1.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvr7uu653eogb4jmlkcf31joh0q1ug1olt62dmpo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cdh6cor2c5h2bs)**

No, a single $1 gift won't erase a 14-point lead and guarantee Republicans keep the Senate.

But if everyone reading this sends $1, it'll add up quickly. It'll help us fight back against the onslaught we're facing from the Soros machine and other radicals.

name: Team Rudy
subject: May God bless protect and keep our President safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy for Indiana
body:
We want to give YOU the chance to personally thank President Trump for his tireless efforts to Make America Great Again!

[SPECIAL INVITATION FOR YOU
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlfhdpegtfhql0u97r02d2ouaejde74amsdts13g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cdh6aob6cjh2bs)
President Trump is the ONLY leader brave enough to take on the Radical Left and deliver REAL RESULTS for the American people.
And we want to give YOU the chance to personally thank President Trump for his tireless efforts to Make America Great Again!
Below is a special message that will be sent directly to the President's team:
To: PRESIDENT TRUMPFrom: You
* * *
May the Lord bless and keep you safe, Mr. President!
I want to take this moment to proudly thank you for everything you've done - and continue to do - for our great nation. You've never backed down to Make America Great Again, and for that, millions of patriots like me are forever grateful for your fearless leadership.
From securing our border to bringing Israeli hostages home, you've shown the world what it means to be a true champion of freedom.
Your pursuit of peace through strength is a shining light in uncertain times, and your presidency has been nothing short of historic - a true turning point for this country we love.
As a proud Conservative and an unapologetic American Patriot, I want you to know: I will stand shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way.
Your vision for a strong, free, and prosperous America is our vision, and we will not waver.
Thank you, Mr. President, for your courage, conviction, and relentless dedication to the United States of America.
We are proud to call you our Commander-in-Chief, and we look forward to the victories ahead.
God bless you, Mr. President. And God bless the greatest nation on Earth - the United States of America! 🇺🇸🦅
[SIGN THE CARD
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp8omr3i05a1c12hjgdss4v2866ueco6l9nqqpsg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cdh6aob6cjh2bs)
[You can use any of the secure links to add your name to the top before it's signed, sealed, and delivered to 1600 Pennsylvania Ave!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8dl238injg3270nu3b0jb05prdrb5k699g4vn4o_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cdh6aob6cjh2bs)
Thank you for all the work you've done for America. May God bless you and your family, and God Bless America.
- Team Rudy

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Boston Defies Federal Immigration Law
body:
[INSIDE JW]

HUNTER BIDEN LAPTOP UPDATE!

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36668&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9wTlE1eExaMkh3UT9zaT1UY2pKZXl6eHprcVJSekp5JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=138f4e84a668a762d0396681550cd7a1071b6bdf98b4de971e127bd91c2bbeee]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON HUNTER BIDEN’S INFAMOUS
LAPTOP

The Hunter Biden saga drags on as the government clings to details
about his laptop.

In our latest effort to pry this information loose, we filed a Freedom
of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36647&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1sYXB0b3AtY29tcGxhaW50LTA0MjQwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=492e2c83e7080068452e7d637a1abb0959e0f6d59c9afc3c8cbd22f437ea1631]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for all FBI investigative
records concerning Hunter Biden’s abandoned laptop, which contained
extensive evidence of Biden family business dealings (Judicial Watch
Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36647&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1sYXB0b3AtY29tcGxhaW50LTA0MjQwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=492e2c83e7080068452e7d637a1abb0959e0f6d59c9afc3c8cbd22f437ea1631]
(No. 1:25-cv-04240)).

The Justice Department’s refusal to release these basic
investigative records raises serious questions about transparency and
potential interference in one of the most consequential political
stories in recent history. We will fight in court to get the public
the answers it is entitled to under the law.

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the FBI failed to respond to a January 29, 2025, FOIA request for:

All FBI investigative reports, witness interview summaries, memoranda,
and other records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden's
laptop.

All emails, text messages, Lync messages and other electronic
communications records related to the Hunter Biden laptop.

IRS whistleblowers confirmed that the FBI became aware of Hunter
Biden’s laptop as early as October 2019 and verified its
authenticity in November 2019. The FBI took possession of it in
December 2019
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36644&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tL2FydGljbGUvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24tdGltZWxpbmUtZ3VuLXRheC1jaGFyZ2VzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2a64ef79d854e37e5c8bddd62b9958bf0106a4c28de241fa52222ac145f0467a].

In October 2020, through information obtained from Hunter Biden’s
laptop, the New York Post began publishing reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=28754&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjAvMTAvMTQvZW1haWwtcmV2ZWFscy1ob3ctaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWludHJvZHVjZWQtdWtyYWluaWFuLWJpei1tYW4tdG8tZGFkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9d97eafdff47932cce6d5dcd720f7cf141ab201b8c0ee69fdde50ad8feb96916]
about the Biden family’s business arrangements.

In an August 2022 letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36645&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucm9uam9obnNvbi5zZW5hdGUuZ292L3NlcnZpY2VzL2ZpbGVzLzdDRDQ0RTE2LUJGMEItNDk1RS04Qjg3LTkwMDQ2N0Y2OUU1MD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=54a66eb3b304a8331d419bd1e3b6bdc98a5d9a45edb759ca8a01027a7320cc09],
Senator
Ron Johnson (R-WI) highlighted whistleblower concerns about the
handling of the FBI’s investigation, noting that the Bureau appeared
to take no visible action for months despite possessing the verified
laptop well before the 2020 presidential election.

We have filed numerous FOIA lawsuits seeking transparency on the
Hunter Biden investigations and related matters.

In July 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=35655&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLXBhcmRvbi1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8df3c1c905ba935c1bb0ba287d93f0f75374b58ff8f73d4bd45be4b5433e900b]
the
Justice Department for all records from the Offices of Attorney
General, Deputy Attorney General, and Associate Attorney General
regarding Joe Biden’s controversial pardon of Hunter Biden (Judicial
Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of State
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=35644&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1wYXJkb24tY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMTQzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a0f888458093e3d121a00021c8b6945e203221eaa169412a8ea994a21695d506]
(No. 1:25-cv-02143)).

A hearing was held in July 2025 in the FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=35613&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW5zLWZhbWlseS1idXNpbmVzcy1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c0bbca80fb93ae579fa2d746a2c1bac3adb365f1d5f322588429200898d02fcd]
against the National Archives for Biden family records and
communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as
communications between the Bidens and several known business
associates (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. National Archives
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=29587&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbmF0aW9uYWwtYXJjaGl2ZXMtYmlkZW4tZmFtaWx5LWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTQzMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=804670007417aaa30f3a612bee5601c40e5041b71fe0feb0d88fefe7d6eb8ad6]
(No. 1:23-cv-01432).

In February 2025, we filed a lawsuit

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BOSTON MAYOR FOR DETAILS OF MARIACHI BAND PRESS
CONFERENCE

At an August 19, 2025, press conference, Boston Mayor Michelle Wu
reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36650&F=T&&hash=941b86ce75635366a6d611024d15475ac6eb2703941673b41e35ee0d8e404180]
vowed to resist the Justice Department’s efforts to secure
cooperation from local governments with federal immigration
enforcement. The event opened with mariachi music performed for
attendees as Wu positioned Boston as a defiant “sanctuary”
jurisdiction in opposition to federal law.

To see what’s behind this event, we filed a Massachusetts Public
Records Law lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36649&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtYm9zdG9uLW1hcmlhY2hpLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzM5NS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8c819caa0919795ca8796a310bde77c961fc3ec5a16cbd6befd7ba7a6b901991]
against the City of Boston for details about the press conference
during which Wu publicly defied U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi’s
demands that Boston comply with federal immigration law (Judicial
Watch v. City of Boston
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36649&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtYm9zdG9uLW1hcmlhY2hpLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzM5NS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8c819caa0919795ca8796a310bde77c961fc3ec5a16cbd6befd7ba7a6b901991]
(No. 2584 cv 03395)).

We filed the lawsuit in the Suffolk County Superior Court after the Wu
administration failed to respond to our public records request for
emails of Mayor Wu and her immediate staff about Attorney General
Bondi’s demands that Boston modify its sanctuary-city policy and
cooperate with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, as well as
records related to the appearance of a mariachi band at the August 19,
2025, press conference.

U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) reported that in
September 2025 it and federal partners arrested
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36655&F=T&&hash=c5b621e24fa911f28ac73fc8bd4dbe6158e07d080fccb8b096c8e70866bc4541.]
more than 1,400 illegal aliens in Massachusetts – including
murderers, rapists, drug traffickers, child sex predators and members
of violent transnational criminal gangs. Acting ICE Director Todd M.
Lyons said, “Every illegal alien we arrested during the operation
was breaking U.S. immigration law, and hundreds were violent criminals
who should never have been allowed to roam freely in our
communities.”

Mayor Wu staged a racist political spectacle instead of cooperating
with federal law enforcement – even as dangerous criminal aliens are
at large in her city. Boston residents deserve to know why the
mayor’s office refuses transparency about this event and why city
hall is stonewalling lawful public records requests.

In October 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36459&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1ldmFuc3Rvbi1pbGxpbm9pcy1tYXlvci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=24fe523f52b659b69aff65fbc9bd77b57bcd88427d52dffe2f26786b64537081]
the Office of the Mayor of Evanston, IL, for records related to

In January 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=34336&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1jaGljYWdvLW1heW9yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=44427efa1d3aaca2fa8f88624e2d66e054508ae2d350564fac85be236491d469]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON HILLARY CLINTON’S BROTHER,
TONY RODHAM

What’s currently in the public record about the schemes of Hillary
Clinton’s little brother Tony likely just scratches the surface.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36656&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRvbnktcm9kaGFtLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNDIzNy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c40abc053f246e3932cb1655b9115398681f1bd0a154bfa3afacb8ef8b7717a9]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for FBI records on Hillary
Clinton’s deceased brother, Tony Rodham (Judicial Watch v U.S.
Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36656&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRvbnktcm9kaGFtLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNDIzNy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c40abc053f246e3932cb1655b9115398681f1bd0a154bfa3afacb8ef8b7717a9]
(No.1:25-cv-04237)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia
after the Justice Department failed to respond adequately to a June
10, 2019, FOIA request for FBI records about Rodham. We are asking
for:

All records related to Anthony Dean Rodham, born in August 1954 in
Park Ridge, Illinois, who died on June 7, 2019, including but not
limited to: investigative reports; 302s; witness statements;
Confidential Human Source reporting (FD 1023 forms); meetings/contacts
(FD 209a forms); cables; letterhead memoranda; and communications sent
to and from FBI officials regarding Mr. Rodham.

In August 2019, the FBI acknowledged it had located over 13,000 pages
of records responsive to the request, as well as audio and video files
that are potentially responsive to the request. After years of delays,
in May 2025, the FBI again acknowledged possession of responsive
records and asked if there was still interest. We acknowledged our
continued interest in having the request processed without
modification of its scope. Having received no further response from
the FBI, we filed suit.

Clearly, the Justice Department has been sitting on a wealth of
information, and we intend to obtain it.

Rodham for decades
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36657&F=T&&hash=94671f772c14e21c86d42b91d4de27b14194279cae59e8eec8a3a649c72bd11d]
used his connections with the Clintons to further his failing career.
Rodham described himself as a “facilitator” and had a range of
opportunities, like addressing Chinese investor conferences and
joining an advisory board of a company seeking permission to mine for
gold in Haiti. Among other controversies, Rodham also pursued
contracts in post-earthquake Haiti, seeking a $22 million housing deal
while Bill Clinton co-chaired the recovery commission, a proposal that
collapsed.

While Hillary Clinton was secretary of State, former Virginia Governor
Terry McAuliffe and Rodham were beneficiaries of the EB-5
cash-for-visas program
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36658&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGhlLWViLTUtc3dhbXAtY29udC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d9d13b6686051d2c398152d923052d7332c7341dbeb047205235aa9c05f08381],
in which they
raised at least $46 million
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=9905&F=T&&hash=034b42aab611261e09ace424e83feb380e142e3fbd24cfe7c5d34a684b0bdb6c]
from investors for their GreenTech Automotive electric-car company.
Greentech filed for bankruptcy
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36659&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9ncmVlbnRlY2gtYXV0b21vdGl2ZS1maWxlcy1mb3ItYmFua3J1cHRjeS0xNTE5Nzc1Nzk1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e397c0340624ebfd6a87aa69a9878e7e5ec0bfe88f5d860fedbfbaf6a62f1ea5]
in February 2018.

Through our FOIA investigations and lawsuits we have uncovered other
incidents involving Rodham.

In August 2017, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36660&F=T&&hash=f3e8875234e33fdc16d8ccd0a68d03b175c72bdc72c3b1c45cf1ca77ae6707be]
records from the State Department revealing repeated use of unsecured
communications for classified information and numerous examples of
Clinton Foundation donors receiving special favors from former
Secretary of State Hillary Clinton’s staff. The emails also reveal
instances of Rodham seeking to leverage his influence as Clinton’s
brother. In January 2010, Confidential Assistant Monica Hanley
forwarded to Abedin a request from Rodham, on three issues
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36661&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtaHVtYS1wcm9kdWN0aW9uLTE5LTAwNjg0LXBnLTQ1OS00NjAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4f2237c7a8ee05bef4663110e34424a2d96421a8982073e662a336aac53c8e87].
One involved help on a “green card renewal,” another involved a
visit by someone of which Abedin said they “wanted to regret,” and
a third involved a job for someone whose CV Rodham forwarded to State.

In July 2017, we received
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36662&F=T&&hash=d6308fee717cb32148bf943ef589e6d04e1492cbdce9507c0917d17ef5c76db9]
records from the State Department revealing incidents of Huma Abedin,
deputy chief of staff to former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton,
providing special State Department treatment to major donors to the
Clinton Foundation and political campaigns. The heavily redacted
documents from Abedin’s non-government account included an email
from Rodham to Abedin revealing that he acted as a go-between for a
Clinton Foundation donor, Richard Park. The records also revealed
Clinton Foundation executive Doug Band instructing Abedin to “show
love” to Clinton donor Andrew Liveris.

BILLIONS OF TAX DOLLARS SPENT IN FAILED EFFORT TO REBUILD
AFGHANISTAN

Afghanistan offers a clear lesson: You can’t smoothly impose Western
democracy on a quasi-feudal Third World country. Our Corruption
Chronicles blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36637&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFpbGVkLXBsYW4tdG8tcmVidWlsZC1hZmdoYW5pc3Rhbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a94cba17cc002d42e51e2f79a31d37a46057879df2aac440bf6589389fad13b1]
on
the billions of your tax dollars that were haphazardly thrown at the
attempt to rebuild Afghanistan.

For nearly two decades the U.S. government spent a breathtaking $145
billion on a failed plan to rebuild Afghanistan and at least $26
billion of it was lost to waste, fraud and abuse, according to the
final report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36663&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2lnYXIubWlsL1BvcnRhbHMvMTQ3L0ZpbGVzL1JlcG9ydHMvc2lnYXItZmluYWwtcmVwb3J0LnBkZl1wdWJsaXNoZWQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8dfb27fc569ef67b933bec471a14370ad1f57a31c841e673def3c68a370e4351
by the Special Inspector General for Afghanistan Reconstruction
(SIGAR). The United States also left behind over $38 billion in
military equipment and military and civilian infrastructure, the audit
reveals, offering enraging details about the U.S. government’s
costly debacle to restore a terrorist nation that promptly returned to
Taliban rule the moment American troops left in 2021. Even after the
Biden administration’s disastrous military withdrawal, hundreds of
millions of dollars in humanitarian aid kept flowing into the coffers
of fake charities created by the Taliban
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=30603&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFsaWJhbi1jcmVhdGVzLWZha2Utbm9ucHJvZml0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0d2ab888ba02eb3bdf72ef1987bb599ab3c692de244c77036a3e5f2795649cd2].
The
terrorist group also received at least $239 million in development
assistance
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78295&L=36664&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFsaWJhbi1nZXRzLTIzOS1taWwvXWJlY2F1c2U/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f43f7639bb078fca29148263868f7399bfeee6af84f810441aeb1d82fe311158
the State
Department did not screen award recipients, failing to comply with its
own counterterrorism partner vetting requirements before disbursing
dozens of grants to local entities in the central Asian Islamic
nation.

“The Afghan government’s stunningly rapid collapse in August 2021
laid bare a fragility concealed by years of confident assertions of
progress,” the new SIGAR report states. “The gap between ambition
and reality was vast, with deteriorating conditions continually
stymying objectives that proved to be unrealistic.” Investigators
blame multiple factors for the U.S. failure to transform a war-torn,
underdeveloped country into a stable and prosperous democracy. “For
example, early and ongoing U.S. decisions to ally with corrupt,
human-rights-abusing powerbrokers bolstered the insurgency and
undermined the mission, including U.S. goals for bringing democracy
and good governance to Afghanistan,” the audit says, adding that
efforts to improve Afghanistan’s economic and social conditions also
failed to have a lasting impact and that despite nearly “$90 billion
in U.S. appropriations for security-sector assistance, Afghan security
forces ultimately collapsed quickly without a sustained U.S. military
presence.” The cost of the failed Afghanistan reconstruction plan
was “immense,” investigators found, and includes tens of thousands
of people— including more than 2,450 U.S. servicemembers—killed.
Many more were injured, among them more than 20,700 U.S.
servicemembers, the watchdog writes.

SIGAR, which was created in 2009 and will officially shut down at the
end of January 2026, has identified at least 1,327 instances of waste,
fraud, and abuse for a total of at least $26 billion from 2002 through
the middle of 2021. The cash started flowing shortly after President
George W. Bush launched military operations in Afghanistan following
the 9/11 attacks as part of the war on terror. Even after Afghanistan
fell back to Taliban rule in 2021, the U.S. remains its largest donor
disbursing over $3.83 billion in humanitarian and development
assistance, much of it managed by the famously corrupt United States
Agency for International Development (USAID), which was dismantled by
the Trump administration. Nevertheless, the money is still flowing to
Afghanistan, with disbursements of $120 million in the March 2025
quarter alone, according to the SIGAR report. Past failures have not
stopped Uncle Sam from cutting the checks. The report offers a
multitude of examples of the waste over the years, including $7.3
billion on an ineffective counternarcotics program that did little to
stem the production and exportation of illicit drugs; $4.7 billion on
a failed stabilization project to keep insurgents out of an area after
they had been expelled by security forces; $675 million on wasteful
business development programs aimed at reducing violence to enhance
stability and economic normalcy; $486 million for unused aircraft for
the Afghan Air Force; $335 million for a USAID constructed power plant
that was not utilized and $85 million for an unfinished—and never
used—hotel across from the U.S. Embassy in Kabul.

Most of the projects that seemed legitimate were also wasteful and
failed to accomplish their goal, the final in-depth probe confirms.
For instance, the U.S. allocated $90 billion to Afghanistan Security
yet the nation’s security forces collapsed quickly without sustained
U.S. Military presence. Investigators warn that the costly failure to
rebuild Afghanistan was predictable. “Unlike past reconstruction
efforts in places like post-World War II Europe or Japan where the
United States successfully rebuilt countries whose modern economies,
industry, and infrastructure had been degraded by war, Afghanistan was
a severely underdeveloped state,” SIGAR writes. “U.S. efforts
there were often trying to create capabilities, systems, and
institutions of a type and quality the country had never possessed.”

Until next week,
