clean_body: [INSIDE JW] HUNTER BIDEN LAPTOP UPDATE! [] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON HUNTER BIDEN’S INFAMOUS LAPTOP The Hunter Biden saga drags on as the government clings to details about his laptop. In our latest effort to pry this information loose, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for all FBI investigative records concerning Hunter Biden’s abandoned laptop, which contained extensive evidence of Biden family business dealings (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-04240)). The Justice Department’s refusal to release these basic investigative records raises serious questions about transparency and potential interference in one of the most consequential political stories in recent history. We will fight in court to get the public the answers it is entitled to under the law. We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the FBI failed to respond to a January 29, 2025, FOIA request for: All FBI investigative reports, witness interview summaries, memoranda, and other records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden's laptop. All emails, text messages, Lync messages and other electronic communications records related to the Hunter Biden laptop. IRS whistleblowers confirmed that the FBI became aware of Hunter Biden’s laptop as early as October 2019 and verified its authenticity in November 2019. The FBI took possession of it in December 2019 []. In October 2020, through information obtained from Hunter Biden’s laptop, the New York Post began publishing reports [] about the Biden family’s business arrangements. In an August 2022 letter [], Senator Ron Johnson (R-WI) highlighted whistleblower concerns about the handling of the FBI’s investigation, noting that the Bureau appeared to take no visible action for months despite possessing the verified laptop well before the 2020 presidential election. We have filed numerous FOIA lawsuits seeking transparency on the Hunter Biden investigations and related matters. In July 2025, we sued [] the Justice Department for all records from the Offices of Attorney General, Deputy Attorney General, and Associate Attorney General regarding Joe Biden’s controversial pardon of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:25-cv-02143)). A hearing was held in July 2025 in the FOIA lawsuit [] against the National Archives for Biden family records and communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications between the Bidens and several known business associates (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. National Archives [] (No. 1:23-cv-01432). In February 2025, we filed a lawsuit [] against the Justice Department for records and communications regarding the Internal Revenue Service’s investigation of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No.1:24-cv-03387)). In June 2024, we received records [ the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) showing Mike Morell, former acting CIA director under President Obama, requesting CIA permission to publish a letter [ former intelligence community leaders stating that they believed the laptop emails exposing Hunter Biden’s connections to Ukraine were Russian disinformation. Morrell’s request for prepublication review was approved in just six hours by the CIA (Judicial Watch v. Central Intelligence Agency [] (No. 1:23-cv-01844)). In January 2024, we filed a lawsuit [] against the Justice Department for records of communications between the FBI and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as Big Tech censorship of the Hunter Biden laptop story (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:23-cv-00079)). In October 2022, we sued the DOJ [] for all records in the possession of FBI Supervisory Intelligence Analyst Brian Auten regarding an August 6, 2020, briefing provided to members of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA) raised concerns that the briefing was intended to undermine the senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:22-cv-02821)). We filed a lawsuit against the U.S. State Department on April 20, 2022, for messages sent through the SMART [] (State Messaging and Archive Retrieval Toolkit) system that mention Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:22-cv-01066)). In December 2020, State Department records [] obtained through a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit showed that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. Previously in this case, State Department records [] included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations. At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:20-cv-00229)). JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BOSTON MAYOR FOR DETAILS OF MARIACHI BAND PRESS CONFERENCE At an August 19, 2025, press conference, Boston Mayor Michelle Wu reportedly [] vowed to resist the Justice Department’s efforts to secure cooperation from local governments with federal immigration enforcement. The event opened with mariachi music performed for attendees as Wu positioned Boston as a defiant “sanctuary” jurisdiction in opposition to federal law. To see what’s behind this event, we filed a Massachusetts Public Records Law lawsuit [] against the City of Boston for details about the press conference during which Wu publicly defied U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi’s demands that Boston comply with federal immigration law (Judicial Watch v. City of Boston [] (No. 2584 cv 03395)). We filed the lawsuit in the Suffolk County Superior Court after the Wu administration failed to respond to our public records request for emails of Mayor Wu and her immediate staff about Attorney General Bondi’s demands that Boston modify its sanctuary-city policy and cooperate with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, as well as records related to the appearance of a mariachi band at the August 19, 2025, press conference. U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) reported that in September 2025 it and federal partners arrested [.] more than 1,400 illegal aliens in Massachusetts – including murderers, rapists, drug traffickers, child sex predators and members of violent transnational criminal gangs. Acting ICE Director Todd M. Lyons said, “Every illegal alien we arrested during the operation was breaking U.S. immigration law, and hundreds were violent criminals who should never have been allowed to roam freely in our communities.” Mayor Wu staged a racist political spectacle instead of cooperating with federal law enforcement – even as dangerous criminal aliens are at large in her city. Boston residents deserve to know why the mayor’s office refuses transparency about this event and why city hall is stonewalling lawful public records requests. In October 2025, we sued [] the Office of the Mayor of Evanston, IL, for records related to obstruction of federal immigration enforcement. In January 2025, we sued [] Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson’s office for records regarding his vow to resist the Trump administration’s mass deportation and other immigration law enforcement activities. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON HILLARY CLINTON’S BROTHER, TONY RODHAM What’s currently in the public record about the schemes of Hillary Clinton’s little brother Tony likely just scratches the surface. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for FBI records on Hillary Clinton’s deceased brother, Tony Rodham (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No.1:25-cv-04237)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department failed to respond adequately to a June 10, 2019, FOIA request for FBI records about Rodham. We are asking for: All records related to Anthony Dean Rodham, born in August 1954 in Park Ridge, Illinois, who died on June 7, 2019, including but not limited to: investigative reports; 302s; witness statements; Confidential Human Source reporting (FD 1023 forms); meetings/contacts (FD 209a forms); cables; letterhead memoranda; and communications sent to and from FBI officials regarding Mr. Rodham. In August 2019, the FBI acknowledged it had located over 13,000 pages of records responsive to the request, as well as audio and video files that are potentially responsive to the request. After years of delays, in May 2025, the FBI again acknowledged possession of responsive records and asked if there was still interest. We acknowledged our continued interest in having the request processed without modification of its scope. Having received no further response from the FBI, we filed suit. Clearly, the Justice Department has been sitting on a wealth of information, and we intend to obtain it. Rodham for decades [] used his connections with the Clintons to further his failing career. Rodham described himself as a “facilitator” and had a range of opportunities, like addressing Chinese investor conferences and joining an advisory board of a company seeking permission to mine for gold in Haiti. Among other controversies, Rodham also pursued contracts in post-earthquake Haiti, seeking a $22 million housing deal while Bill Clinton co-chaired the recovery commission, a proposal that collapsed. While Hillary Clinton was secretary of State, former Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe and Rodham were beneficiaries of the EB-5 cash-for-visas program [], in which they raised at least $46 million [] from investors for their GreenTech Automotive electric-car company. Greentech filed for bankruptcy [] in February 2018. Through our FOIA investigations and lawsuits we have uncovered other incidents involving Rodham. In August 2017, we uncovered [] records from the State Department revealing repeated use of unsecured communications for classified information and numerous examples of Clinton Foundation donors receiving special favors from former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton’s staff. The emails also reveal instances of Rodham seeking to leverage his influence as Clinton’s brother. In January 2010, Confidential Assistant Monica Hanley forwarded to Abedin a request from Rodham, on three issues []. One involved help on a “green card renewal,” another involved a visit by someone of which Abedin said they “wanted to regret,” and a third involved a job for someone whose CV Rodham forwarded to State. In July 2017, we received [] records from the State Department revealing incidents of Huma Abedin, deputy chief of staff to former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton, providing special State Department treatment to major donors to the Clinton Foundation and political campaigns. The heavily redacted documents from Abedin’s non-government account included an email from Rodham to Abedin revealing that he acted as a go-between for a Clinton Foundation donor, Richard Park. The records also revealed Clinton Foundation executive Doug Band instructing Abedin to “show love” to Clinton donor Andrew Liveris. BILLIONS OF TAX DOLLARS SPENT IN FAILED EFFORT TO REBUILD AFGHANISTAN Afghanistan offers a clear lesson: You can’t smoothly impose Western democracy on a quasi-feudal Third World country. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] on the billions of your tax dollars that were haphazardly thrown at the attempt to rebuild Afghanistan. For nearly two decades the U.S. government spent a breathtaking $145 billion on a failed plan to rebuild Afghanistan and at least $26 billion of it was lost to waste, fraud and abuse, according to the final report [ by the Special Inspector General for Afghanistan Reconstruction (SIGAR). The United States also left behind over $38 billion in military equipment and military and civilian infrastructure, the audit reveals, offering enraging details about the U.S. government’s costly debacle to restore a terrorist nation that promptly returned to Taliban rule the moment American troops left in 2021. Even after the Biden administration’s disastrous military withdrawal, hundreds of millions of dollars in humanitarian aid kept flowing into the coffers of fake charities created by the Taliban []. The terrorist group also received at least $239 million in development assistance [ the State Department did not screen award recipients, failing to comply with its own counterterrorism partner vetting requirements before disbursing dozens of grants to local entities in the central Asian Islamic nation. “The Afghan government’s stunningly rapid collapse in August 2021 laid bare a fragility concealed by years of confident assertions of progress,” the new SIGAR report states. “The gap between ambition and reality was vast, with deteriorating conditions continually stymying objectives that proved to be unrealistic.” Investigators blame multiple factors for the U.S. failure to transform a war-torn, underdeveloped country into a stable and prosperous democracy. “For example, early and ongoing U.S. decisions to ally with corrupt, human-rights-abusing powerbrokers bolstered the insurgency and undermined the mission, including U.S. goals for bringing democracy and good governance to Afghanistan,” the audit says, adding that efforts to improve Afghanistan’s economic and social conditions also failed to have a lasting impact and that despite nearly “$90 billion in U.S. appropriations for security-sector assistance, Afghan security forces ultimately collapsed quickly without a sustained U.S. military presence.” The cost of the failed Afghanistan reconstruction plan was “immense,” investigators found, and includes tens of thousands of people— including more than 2,450 U.S. servicemembers—killed. Many more were injured, among them more than 20,700 U.S. servicemembers, the watchdog writes. SIGAR, which was created in 2009 and will officially shut down at the end of January 2026, has identified at least 1,327 instances of waste, fraud, and abuse for a total of at least $26 billion from 2002 through the middle of 2021. The cash started flowing shortly after President George W. Bush launched military operations in Afghanistan following the 9/11 attacks as part of the war on terror. Even after Afghanistan fell back to Taliban rule in 2021, the U.S. remains its largest donor disbursing over $3.83 billion in humanitarian and development assistance, much of it managed by the famously corrupt United States Agency for International Development (USAID), which was dismantled by the Trump administration. Nevertheless, the money is still flowing to Afghanistan, with disbursements of $120 million in the March 2025 quarter alone, according to the SIGAR report. Past failures have not stopped Uncle Sam from cutting the checks. The report offers a multitude of examples of the waste over the years, including $7.3 billion on an ineffective counternarcotics program that did little to stem the production and exportation of illicit drugs; $4.7 billion on a failed stabilization project to keep insurgents out of an area after they had been expelled by security forces; $675 million on wasteful business development programs aimed at reducing violence to enhance stability and economic normalcy; $486 million for unused aircraft for the Afghan Air Force; $335 million for a USAID constructed power plant that was not utilized and $85 million for an unfinished—and never used—hotel across from the U.S. Embassy in Kabul. Most of the projects that seemed legitimate were also wasteful and failed to accomplish their goal, the final in-depth probe confirms. For instance, the U.S. allocated $90 billion to Afghanistan Security yet the nation’s security forces collapsed quickly without sustained U.S. Military presence. Investigators warn that the costly failure to rebuild Afghanistan was predictable. “Unlike past reconstruction efforts in places like post-World War II Europe or Japan where the United States successfully rebuilt countries whose modern economies, industry, and infrastructure had been degraded by war, Afghanistan was a severely underdeveloped state,” SIGAR writes. “U.S. efforts there were often trying to create capabilities, systems, and institutions of a type and quality the country had never possessed.” Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Team Trisha
subject: Blood in the water
body:
Our shocking victory in Boebert’s most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dVHJKAs8m9VAr-poYXgiYwjMEatizTRz3X3nvdcE8sJSyrpW2iOIbNDoeJqpifaSBhqVcGq1kjloAKpg76EbyQvDg_ccqRtbEfDwo8wo1HBu4_IyKXm9MCqzvYPnuXA5eUSOSlt3KSsnYbefk17Gxs69K7TqT1Y-gQanggUvvRt-pCuxkH6_YVKSysBEbDsKZwVakRaOIb-gVFHXt5ORPw_6FCynGvrhu-6dgqSeYkQ=&c=TPSY-2L9yK0v6MpFecJTZCBhcihVmXcO3X9aKGMLU6xaUeYbWLkJhQ==&ch=lDECoGXMzluNlS_4dmKAzqGOox3BkEySw_RQ7kNPWe8KyUX3M9eE6A==)
---
---
| Peter,
To say that Lauren Boebert is vulnerable in the upcoming 2026 midterms is an understatement.
After reading this we hope you will understand why we so wholeheartedly believe that Trisha Cavarese can beat Boebert in 2026.
In June 2025, MAGA launched a lightning push to pass a "home rule" ballot initiative in Douglas County, the most populous county in Lauren Boebert's congressional district. Home rule would have allowed this red county to create its own constitution and in a sense secede from the state putting the county at odds with the Governor and legislature.
Against all odds, Democrats managed the effort to stop home rule in Douglas County and together we defeated the initiative with a landslide 70% of the vote.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dVHJKAs8m9VAr-poYXgiYwjMEatizTRz3X3nvdcE8sJSyrpW2iOIbNDoeJqpifaSBhqVcGq1kjloAKpg76EbyQvDg_ccqRtbEfDwo8wo1HBu4_IyKXm9MCqzvYPnuXA5eUSOSlt3KSsnYbefk17Gxs69K7TqT1Y-gQanggUvvRt-pCuxkH6_YVKSysBEbDsKZwVakRaOIb-gVFHXt5ORP5LKsh-bcL-UoRIoRgPnDDY=&c=TPSY-2L9yK0v6MpFecJTZCBhcihVmXcO3X9aKGMLU6xaUeYbWLkJhQ==&ch=lDECoGXMzluNlS_4dmKAzqGOox3BkEySw_RQ7kNPWe8KyUX3M9eE6A==)
---
Our shocking victory in Boebert's most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, when Trisha faced Boebert, our campaign had the best performance any Democrat has had in this district ever and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points.
This combined with the deep unpopularity of the GOP and Trump, the fact that Boebert is seen as a carpetbagger (she moved hundreds of miles to CD4 after it became clear she would lose in CD3), and the Boebert campaign reporting their lowest ever fundraising this year, means that she is critically vulnerable for 2026.
There is blood in the water and everyone will soon know that Boebert is a paper tiger. She can be beaten this election. [Can we count on you to make a donation of $25 or whatever you can spare to get Trisha the firepower that she will need to demolish Boebert in this coming election?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dVHJKAs8m9VAr-poYXgiYwjMEatizTRz3X3nvdcE8sJSyrpW2iOIbNDoeJqpifaSK0VlSPR7Zp0zbSyaDa6ye2ABnzUsap2SBB1f1NN18Gp_VdEqLNEZ1w50zJYmFjt24cDPQKygtldsPmQ8rdZvK_IvszRpOJa-TOYzmonCEBdpMyVYsRvPuiN1F7scYdWxXgVssJc5cQ5R8e5NPYPZvYOQyXvvGRBHuiTJaeN9GD1zKkW4UPAqzw==&c=TPSY-2L9yK0v6MpFecJTZCBhcihVmXcO3X9aKGMLU6xaUeYbWLkJhQ==&ch=lDECoGXMzluNlS_4dmKAzqGOox3BkEySw_RQ7kNPWe8KyUX3M9eE6A==)

subject: Blood in the water
body:
Our shocking victory in Boebert’s most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UfwCXwQhg3TvNotEdBXdBEo08rtiN_4HjbqKO8XoKAXts-XAhW4_MOTo_AJ_uzmPOU7e5ThytG1HF77fgmT0J97rB9fyCDu55768QqMT7fu7--eJOSnqqwi980crH4OREptmR3-Q06JJu7m68n5J0anCJG-3aHzDMDDt0BQk_Ozs07fL9kvNgivVddZ8CSV5b2IUSGMDoUZTJwWmHq8ArTLAsaffiHg17NyQdpR_MgA=&c=MtqCSKeqONh-vF81D1OFvukSCJBAXJ2ACyj3RAhF_CWKoJrFV1I8tQ==&ch=th5isHVpq5wUiVD4BxNwVVmzlVU0IVAa6gxU2c_qzll4MzP1m5Ea7w==)

| Peter,
To say that Lauren Boebert is vulnerable in the upcoming 2026 midterms is an understatement.
After reading this we hope you will understand why we so wholeheartedly believe that Trisha Cavarese can beat Boebert in 2026.
In June 2025, MAGA launched a lightning push to pass a "home rule" ballot initiative in Douglas County, the most populous county in Lauren Boebert's congressional district. Home rule would have allowed this red county to create its own constitution and in a sense secede from the state putting the county at odds with the Governor and legislature.
Against all odds, Democrats managed the effort to stop home rule in Douglas County and together we defeated the initiative with a landslide 70% of the vote.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UfwCXwQhg3TvNotEdBXdBEo08rtiN_4HjbqKO8XoKAXts-XAhW4_MOTo_AJ_uzmPOU7e5ThytG1HF77fgmT0J97rB9fyCDu55768QqMT7fu7--eJOSnqqwi980crH4OREptmR3-Q06JJu7m68n5J0anCJG-3aHzDMDDt0BQk_Ozs07fL9kvNgivVddZ8CSV5b2IUSGMDoUZTJwWmHq8Arf6WvVtVuJUgFh4gyrzmfKE=&c=MtqCSKeqONh-vF81D1OFvukSCJBAXJ2ACyj3RAhF_CWKoJrFV1I8tQ==&ch=th5isHVpq5wUiVD4BxNwVVmzlVU0IVAa6gxU2c_qzll4MzP1m5Ea7w==)

Our shocking victory in Boebert's most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, when Trisha faced Boebert, our campaign had the best performance any Democrat has had in this district ever and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points.
This combined with the deep unpopularity of the GOP and Trump, the fact that Boebert is seen as a carpetbagger (she moved hundreds of miles to CD4 after it became clear she would lose in CD3), and the Boebert campaign reporting their lowest ever fundraising this year, means that she is critically vulnerable for 2026.
There is blood in the water and everyone will soon know that Boebert is a paper tiger. She can be beaten this election. [ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b002562e0af6f5bb7c5177a216de5eec698df8c6244cc2c5bf4aa3d219c2ea3e595b9ae5ddae1ba961cd08954c910a3566e566)| [Instagram](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b002562e0af6f5bb7c5177a216de5eec698df8c6244cc2c5bf4aa3d219c2ea3e595b9ae5ddae1ba961cd08954c910a3566e566)
---|---
| | |
---
### You did it.
Because of your dedication, your passion and your engagement for four months, the Indiana State Senate defeated the [redistricting bill](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b0025617b74f58180a0fc042c376951319a42a59855e8316d9f7a2198871951ef516890f9e582aa484c1c2534eb718569901d4 "redistricting bill ") by a vote of 31-19 on Thursday evening.

Thank you to every person who called, emailed, shared a social media post, educated a loved one, testified in committee, or made your voice heard at our statehouse.

The power of Hoosiers was on display for the entire nation this past week, and I could not be more proud to call Indiana home.

---
---
#
* * *
# Watch My Full Remarks Before the Final Vote on HB 1032
---
| [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b0025629191bbe19e08a9dbdb443ae0368507536b13bec3f6b157267eed36faf201cdce0dfde786674ad7b0ed37aa9465bd100)
---
* * *
---
|
---
### Now the real work begins.

Our legislative session picks back up on January 5, 2026--**just 23 days away. **

I am laser-focused on helping create a safer, more affordable Indiana; an Indiana where people are not just getting by, but prospering.

And that energy that you all brought every single day for four straight months? We are going to need you to keep it up.

**Your presence is undeniable, and it drives change. **

So what can you do?

Make sure to follow along with the legislative session at: **[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b0025654d8c3b7e0abeb94c8c978b84d9a144e525a9ece5edfd05796e1d0c66db2e7fb5279adfe0db8d8fa9abc07728b986f09 "iga.in.gov"). **

On this website, you can watch committee meetings, look up legislation and see important dates.

**Don't forget that the Statehouse is YOUR house. **

Whether it is protesting, testifying or meeting with legislators, don't be afraid to take your place in your government.

And, as always, keep emailing and keep calling.

Legislators really do read and listen to what you say; we saw that play out right before our eyes this past week.

**Remember that your voice matters, and we need it more than ever. **
* * *
---
|
---
* * *
---
---
**Recommendations for the future of public schools in Indianapolis have been revealed.

Swipe to learn about ILEA, the proposed plan and what you can do to take action.**
* * *
** **
---
|
---
### Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program
The Energy Assistance Program's (EAP) application is now live until April 20, 2026. You can apply [online](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b0025666b0a5875316732bde1120039d74079c8ef54a544ebcfecf675c9e310f4b86183b7f68535a1acb172181074b83bb5449 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$"), by mail or in person. To apply in person or request a paper application form, applicants must contact their local service provider (LSP). For more information on which LSP serves an area, be sure to check the map available on Indiana's [LIHEAP site](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b0025666b0a5875316732bde1120039d74079c8ef54a544ebcfecf675c9e310f4b86183b7f68535a1acb172181074b83bb5449 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$").

In addition to this program, Indiana's utilities have financial assistance programs available, as well as other tools that can help customers manage their bills. You can find _[AES's program here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b0025604547aa51b2dca9cc863e5259801315c1391c85c93a6bafb1cfe090f1311221078b02ba239f759bcf5684587b75d737c "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.aesindiana.com/payment-assistance__;!!FlTQaCg!jwpfitqHKx4bP-5cnhYvoAX1m8Q0kv3P901-pv7dMHXQdpRgas_bRhhF66AOaSuHe8tMuc2p6moGi_XjArAanOEmX3Q$") [.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b00256023ff9fff4433629371b04f8d961603dbcaa90ddc694e1411dd3b5b1ec77c49f3e5b40e9e2466c923b558df7a86f8d36 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.nipsco.com/bills-and-payments/financial-support__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHfV2_ol6Q$")_

As a reminder, the winter moratorium runs from December 1 through March 15 and prevents disconnection of residential energy utility service to any customer who is eligible for and has applied for the Energy Assistance Program. Moratorium protection applies once a household submits an application and allows the Local Service Provider time to determine eligibility.

Utility bills continue to rise, and what should be an essential service has become an overwhelming burden for many families. If you're eligible, please take advantage of the available resources so you don't have to choose between keeping food on the table and keeping the lights on.
---

* * *
---
| | |
---
| | **I am happy to share that I have filed the first two of my seven bills I will be authoring for the 2026 Legislative Session. **

Swipe through the carousel above for a brief overview of these bills and use the links below for more details! ⬇️
**[SB 60 - Advanced Practice Registered Nurses](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b002568b6a98012c476483df600dfa0f5ddee1b5d004ed9f802f23fc09708a033ed2866b0f4f915abf27263eca721d7d239056 "SB 60 - Advanced Practice Registered Nurses")
[SB 72 - Coverage of Orthotic and Prosthetic Devices (Every BODY Can Move)](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=3616b026a0b00256cf78c6dbafd25ebde629eb460f14dc7c2437c7e338c4ce52182eef92e05fcdd59c341b15ca21ae80383a4dff63bf3284 "SB 72 - Coverage of Orthotic and Prosthetic Devices \(Every BODY Can Move\)")**
**I am looking forward to the opportunity to share updates on more legislation I am carrying to help create an Indiana that works for all of us. **

Because of your dedication, your passion and your engagement for four months, the Indiana State Senate defeated the "redistricting bill " by a vote of 31-19 on Thursday evening. Thank you to every person who called, emailed, shared a social media post, educated a loved one, testified in committee, or made your voice heard at our statehouse. The power of Hoosiers was on display for the entire nation this past week, and I could not be more proud to call Indiana home. Watch My Full Remarks Before the Final Vote on HB 1032 | | Now the real work begins. Our legislative session picks back up on January 5, 2026--just 23 days away. I am laser-focused on helping create a safer, more affordable Indiana; an Indiana where people are not just getting by, but prospering. And that energy that you all brought every single day for four straight months? We are going to need you to keep it up. Your presence is undeniable, and it drives change. So what can you do? Make sure to follow along with the legislative session at: "iga.in.gov". On this website, you can watch committee meetings, look up legislation and see important dates. body:
The bi-weekly collection of all things grassroots! No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-alhcdl-didthutlhu-u/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alhcdl-didthutlhu-r/) **December 12, 2025** Patriot,Farm Team Training Events are underway across the state to help local candidates win meaningful elections and build momentum for Republican victories in 2026! Keep an eye out for more events to come!On top of training, the Farm Team candidates are collecting nomination signatures, alongside Supreme Court candidates. A great way to help Republicans is to collect signatures and mail them in. Find more info [HERE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alhcdl-didthutlhu-y/).Find events, local party information, and more ways to get involved at [wisgop.org/take-action](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alhcdl-didthutlhu-j/)!-Team WisGOP **Upcoming Events****12/12: St. Croix County Christmas Party
12/13: Kenosha County Signature Saturday
12/13: Wood County Member Meeting
12/13: Trempealeau County Chili Feed Fundraiser
12/13: WisGOP Coalitions Christmas Party
12/13: Portage County Farm Team Meeting
12/14: Milwaukee County Packers Watch Party
12/15: Racine County GOP Christmas Party
12/15: Kenosha County Pints and Politics
12/15: Manitowoc County Member Meeting
12/15: Marathon County Member Meeting
12/16: Shawano County Member Meeting
12/16: La Crosse County Member Meeting
12/16: UW La Crosse CR Meeting
12/16: Pepin County Christmas Dinner
12/17: Winnebago County Christmas Party
12/18: Green County Christmas Party
12/18: Dunn County Member Meeting
12/19: Burnett & Douglass Counties Farm Team Training
12/20: Monroe County Conservative Breakfast
12/20: Juneau County Game Day Tailgate
12/27: Jackson County GOP Luncheon with Congressman Van Orden
1/3: Richland County Caucus
1/3: Eau Claire County Member Meeting
1/3: Monroe County Conservative Breakfast & Farm Team Training
1/5: Barron County Member Meeting
1/5: Jackson County Member Meeting
1/5: Polk County Member Meeting
1/6: Buffalo County Member Meeting
1/6: Adams County Member Meeting
1/8: Walworth County Christmas Party
1/8: Rusk County Member Meeting
1/8: Taylor County Member Meeting
1/17: Pepin County Caucus****For more information, please visit:[wisgop.org/calendar/events/](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alhcdl-didthutlhu-t/) ** **Waukesha County**
Waukesha County Republicans helped to spread holiday cheer at a trio of Christmas Parades in Menomonee Falls, Oconomowoc, and Waukesha! On top of all that, they also got together for a pints and politics event in Delafield! **Barron County**
Republicans in Barron County held their monthly meeting and got to hear from a candidate for the 7th Congressional District! **Milwaukee County**
Milwaukee County Republicans held a fundraiser to support Operation Connecting Milwaukee with special guest and former Governor Scott Walker! They also got into the holiday spirit as they participated in the Cudahy Christmas Parade! ** Monroe County**
Monroe County Republicans gathered for a Conservative Breakfast Meeting, and they got to hear from State Supreme Court candidate Judge Maria Lazar! **Pierce County**
Republicans in Pierce County held a Pizza and Politics event with a number of guest speakers including State Senator Rob Stafsholt, State Rep. Rob Kreibich, Pierce County Sheriff Chad Koranda, RPW's Christina Estenson, and conservative UWRF Professor Trevor Tomesh! What a star-studded event! **St. Croix County**
St. Croix County Republicans were hard at work during their voter contact training, and they got to have fun and unwind later in the week during their massively successful Bags, Brats, and Beer Cornhole Tournament! **Vilas County **
Vilas County Republicans held a Pints and Politics event in Eagle River featuring a candidate for Lt. Governor! **Walworth County**
The Republican Party of Walworth County celebrated the holidays by welcoming visitors into their new headquarters during Elkhorn's Cocoa Crawl and attending Christmas Parades in Whitewater and Elkhorn! **Washington County**
Washington County Republicans gathered for their monthly Pints and Politics event featuring speeches by candidates for State Supreme Court, Lt. Governor, and Governor! They also got in on the holiday festivities at the Kewaskum Christmas parade! **Portage County**
Republicans in Portage County attended Farm Team Training with RPW's Christina Estenson to help empower local candidates to step up and win in 2026 and beyond! **Juneau County**
Juneau County Republicans came together for their own Farm Team Training and had a packed house for the event! **Richland County**
Republicans in Richland County held their annual Christmas Pizza Party and White Elephant Exchange and decorated a tree for Richland Center's annual Rotary Lights in the Park! **Kenosha County**
Kenosha County Republicans hosted a Farm Team Training and heard from WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming. Local races matter! [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alhcdl-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alhcdl-didthutlhu-d/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alhcdl-didthutlhu-h/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alhcdl-didthutlhu-k/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-alhcdl-didthutlhu-o/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-alhcdl-didthutlhu-b/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-alhcdl-l-a)
---|---|---

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: What Charlie knew all along
body:
Charlie didn't just talk about it. He built a movement that's changed history.

| | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdKz8A7a3oIiyQkpxb5vSGsazYF1jE2yW149INg-QbjTfmU8anZ8f7gNCDGn-hJUGfAW3F3cuUHGBPQb6SnRCjBBzmp3ksm-FbIW6UqLxA3qtZEODMLrXUumON8vwpCcQKd1p0lzerUdLXBjTgzU99s8mDJdJSKGE4Fzx24Ri8r0Fgd5PBIJ1_Ng8VCo3zKnQ_oIaXhRSyteU0w3z2sRhqXUrTH1jcmRyLITHTjdI5HO9EkyO9dhTSHO75ZBqexRgciTbS5qmqRXmLtvOTLy9K6NaeiLYCbVC6ZkaSz52JIfZE1OP7z8-je2sZVIfdXUr-XCsTD1ohRDfy78XTD0W2D2ULwf4640Q1g3CnC6YT3eSO0P6x3KqlCpTD2j2wW9niDEUbVjH58v-59n6v-W8Bvk7AAD__0Pfnjo)

Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdKz8A7a3oIiyQkpxb5vSGsazYF1jE2yW149INg-QbjTfmU8anZ8f7gNCDGn-hJUGfAW3F3cuUHGBPQb6SnRCjBBzmp3ksm-FbIW6UqLxA3qtZEODMLrXUumON8vwpCcQKd1p0lzerUdLXBjTgzU99s8mDJdJSKGE4Fzx24Ri8r0Fgd5PBIJ1_Ng8VCo3zKnQ_oIaXhRSyteU0w3z2sRhqXUrTH1jcmRyLITHTjdI5HO9EkyO9dhTSHO75ZBqexRgciTbS5qmqRXmLtvOTLy9K6NaeiLYCbVC6ZkaSz52JIfZE1OP7z8-je2sZVIfdXUr-XCsTD1ohRDfy78XTD0W2D2ULwf4640Q1g3CnC6YT3eSO0P6x3KqlCpTD2j2wW9niDEUbVjH58v-59n6v-W8Bvk7AAD__0Pfnjo)

Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. name: Andrea
subject: Gerrymandering Stopped: Thank You!
body:
We stood up for democracy, let's continue the fight for our communities. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/andreahunley/events-for-democracy-october-november-18254117?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| |
# AND THE WORK CONTINUES...
Dear Friends,
On Thursday, we proved the importance of being engaged in government. Every phone call, email, letter, and testimony mattered. Your voices mattered. Together, we protected our state's fair and just representation in Congress.

Now, we can turn to work on the things that you've told me really matter to you, from utility costs to healthcare to education. To do that, we need to build on our momentum and keep mobilizing public support. Community outreach, from town halls to community events, requires resources. **Would you be willing to contribute to make sure we continue having Hoosier's voices heard? [CHIP IN NOW](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=f285433999&e=d9ebccf591)**

Andrea

clean_body: We stood up for democracy, let's continue the fight for our communities. | | | | | | | AND THE WORK CONTINUES... Dear Friends, On Thursday, we proved the importance of being engaged in government. Every phone call, email, letter, and testimony mattered. Your voices mattered. Together, we protected our state's fair and just representation in Congress. Now, we can turn to work on the things that you've told me really matter to you, from utility costs to healthcare to education. To do that, we need to build on our momentum and keep mobilizing public support. Community outreach, from town halls to community events, requires resources. Would you be willing to contribute to make sure we continue having Hoosier's voices heard? Thank you so much for the part all of you have played. Together, we can keep working to build a stronger city and state. Andrea | | | | HELP KEEP THE WORK GOING! # Saturday, December 13, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1636, Massachusetts organized the first militia regiments in North America to defend the colony, a date now recognized as the founding of the [National Guard of the United States](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQQL_GbCB8NuAMHtKBdknXjMjEZ7jK2BFcYuXvq_QXur7hPeldL9PFUaS0fLsNLYc8JSxHRGbcp-KOldLCOYWYs6e0rDmSd68JWuhqCbVUk3cUX5OuvA2IgKpCK4e-60Gd5FCt1s9GqpuZdQD05nSaQSvXtR40KGN0qMi-bRKkkrLtZN-EoTPKGzQwYKu8FLpFT5z35idT4hVDfOUn7s0tb1W0K_P9EOosYBQwllKa5JhycnF5uN03G0UB43nOD655xfrzTQWMX7nUV6w_cHFJwFjt1t8LxUhHPwjdLpuj-Jfgf315WvgNAAD__1PEdqM). ****In our _Et Cetera_ section, we're happy to report that today is entertainer Dick Van Dyke's 100th birthday. To celebrate, [here's a link to the song-and-dance video](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvszAQxvFPY7Yg-wwGBg-v9Crqki4dOqJL7gzXOjgCJxbfvqJfoevzSL_h_3kZLyhRlukd7-xzSOPCZYucM69jwW2WZcppCTElkmWaUxTCfQQN7cnAydiRUOI-NhX5wAxsK_amc60DO5iumj0isgOiZsArD4MZNFBz00PobQsOXCX-0AwYa4xujatD1_aWeu6hY23JqEYzSU5r_ZVkyTOHuKcXr_Ut3avo55wfm7L_FJwVnEsp9Z6e-Xnl4z8WzLdZ2fNL2f-PD8a38E320lerp0eRGGVznWr0dEeJv2T-U4eXh58AAAD__y2LcRI) released for Van Dyke's birthday last year. When you need gifts people will actually love, _[The Flyover Christmas Guide](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7Fu7CAQheGngW5XnsEGbkFxm-02bUpEzIAnwrCyyVp--2jT5AFSn6NP-t_v_h64cM1vYSXXU_OVjr1Q77T5I-wL19xbTaW1yDUvrXAMp8cBpwvgBZSPgcvpRxldIkJSkhwYPWlU_8DIxX3YWafZzlMkrQ0QGUUUUkAzJqtwlOxeGiAogGECfU1msipasmhoUBHEOFDk3rbrZ-PaF0rlbE_arnNbZXFL749dqP8CbwJvv3Pm1PMXR3r9BN7k5uLj4FJ410aMQ14Dlx-j_yn86fA7AAD__6WybYs)_ is your shortcut. If you've ever wished someone would reinvent wisdom-teeth care the way Invisalign reinvented orthodontics, today's sponsor, [TriAgenics](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu4yAQQL8Gd7Z4GUhBsVKULttuiYgZ27PCYAFOlL9fOXt1f-C2c45mRufP3d09RkzLb7-BbXN2CV41QmtQ3MvXFdPScppjzgHTsuaIwb8dp3zsGe-ZcMFjfDvZBTsDcBAdWKbVqLi4MN2tdqSKGtATAMw-jObxCIEbPV-kp0xJ6NCe2xhngjE6MjXMejQiGDBcAxWBEUkhYMtl-JsxtRXm-M5PKMOUty7atbW9EvGL8BvhN0xPqG1oBf0CCad6WicSt6NtruajTEDEFTaPkXB1DjcIeGxEXHePod99aQlKXXH_4pPfdo9L-hjfkBnai1G4_xmOhM07IaXmxgipVVds2F8YI1aliaTLefDzcvtR56fl_wIAAP__ftmSfQ) may be the rare early-stage dental breakthrough worth a closer look.

## Flood Emergency Declared in Washington
Severe [flooding throughout western Washington](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkTHOnDAQRk8D3aywvV74C4qNIqpsUvxFSjRrDzCRsZE9u4jbR0SKcoC086Qnvfl-PsYHcuA4f8eVepnSGGkvgUQojzuWheMsKU4hJc9xXlJgj8eoG21BaVBm9MjhGK-17yciTaamXrU3e9PmQ7X10ltSWnedsRM-PbZOafu0ZD4-mqc1urvW3J82pZVRqrHqdpla2xnfUadbaoxX1bUhz5Ly5VfiKAtN4UhvyheX1jr0i8hWKnOv9FDpYd_3y1riySo9UIRXqfSwvZ6BHRScSA7A6IFWyjNFx3TyiPLKGMBzwSKUz9u_evibD1PKjgpgBIrCmcCxHCAJ6I3uhUKABTK_KReQtMHCRVJmBwvPyynFDPe7-nSPbz8qMyTHvjJfv5z_p718Ut7q3Ptt5xC43Nrq2swrcvhTKv81z7vXvwMAAP__-aColA) has forced the evacuation of at least one town along the Skagit River floodplain, with officials expecting many thousands more residents to be displaced. A powerful atmospheric river dumped a foot or more of rain in the Cascade Mountains this week, swelling rivers to record levels. Many residents were stranded on rooftops, and some homes were ripped from their foundations. [See storm photos here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M1qwzAQBOCnkW8x3pVtWQcd0h9D0iZQSinNxajRyt5WsYItYvL2JYU-Qc8DM3zzvut2lgOP_d6eyCQfu5GWOVBKNHWLnQce-xRHH2J0PPZDDOzstcMCqxXgCmTnLIdrV2bOeCIkmZEBVVc1Sg0qGwxpqRXI8vgJoAFL7Z2WhbegS13VjczY3NoAQQIUFdS5V1UjXUMNKiqkA1EW5DjFKf-KPKaBfLjGC035MZ6yYIaUzrOQa4GtwHZZlvybp6huqcD2xhHYnoeY4rz6cwhscX_Ap20pD9vH-8Pm42Hz9rx-ecXt3U5gm03GnRcOgedaibLoT5bD717610kXgz8BAAD__9R4eIg). Washington [Gov. Bob Ferguson said](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uwzAMBeDT2JsMS_KPPGjoki1dOxqMRdksZCmQmBi5feEA7QW6PhIEv_d1na9AgeL6CTta9mmOeJSAzJjnA8pGceUUfUjJUVy3FMjBa1at6oVUQurZAYXX3NXOekSFukYrx6EflJ7kWG9WutuC7aQBeu_10E_GdB4kgO8HnIyqyZ7XpJJayraXQ-PH3mhn0KgRW-1k1bXoiFNuvhNF3tCHV3pibpa018FuzPdS6Y9KXSp1OY6jibflVJzzM0HgDXOlLm9FOaM_mCgMjMLDQnEVGxVOmRbx6xVL2vdHJCYs5xIKh-GxoshLBNUZ03Z1tu5-UAhUhrHq2nUHCu_X-F99Pq36CQAA__886Y0C) on Friday that President Trump approved an emergency declaration and warned flooding could reach denser areas, with millions of people still under flood watches. The National Guard has deployed, going door-to-door in some areas to help residents escape danger. More rain is expected starting Sunday, with officials warning it could prolong flooding or trigger new floods.
## Trump Pardon Rejected for State Crime
President Trump announced a pardon for Tina Peters, a former GOP county clerk in Colorado now in state prison for election interference, but Colorado officials say [presidential pardons don't apply to state crimes.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZEZ2GzAXOLiEbC69EHlwA70yNrJ7Bs3fr9hf2Kykkqr03v_H_PAUKW3__IGO1zwnvGpEZizz5etOaeOc1phzoLTtOVLwnxkU9FKD1GYOnuJn7prgVkRA06DTdugHMH-0bXbnx341VgV4wjL4rjdKaQs4dos3OHZ9Q-5e06CN1qrXQ7vafjRhxBEsKhO06BQG4lzar0yJd1zjJ7-xtEs-muh25rMK81fAJGC6rqtdnvWmuHsB0x0FTFxexylPX0JOVTIlL09kLFU-XyyX3ZcNg6QkK3tGueRXYQFTU1w4L4qR6mBFp7bDU_x55l_pejv4DgAA___DeYAR) Peters was running for Colorado secretary of state at the time of the indictment, and attracted significant attention over the case. Her campaign website [calls her a "political prisoner"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUDuupDAQPI3JGLnbMGYCgk2cvU03RB7cQK-MG9l-g7j9ir3CS0oVlOr352v68hw5rb_9TmNdZEp0lki1Up5OXzZOa5W0RJHAad0kcvDXhBr7FrAFMwXP8Zq6JowLEZJpaAT77J9oXmCbbTSgjXm_yAw0ELxnHbSduxd49IADDQ2PtxsgGADdw_Ox2H4wYaABLWkTQHWaAlfJj7_CqW60xEs-lB-z7E0ct1qPoswvhU6hO8_z8V18leCvW6DQlSr5UujuZQrdIZErzze9gxU6wBtAoQuSfAxtzd_70ZZrf0vkuT18DpLaysm3B1XKpZ0lSg6i0A3WYmdNr7VV6Jo8huPkGLk8rer0unuO_4vWH737GfFfAAAA__-UeoyW) and "whistleblower" who has been "silenced for standing for truth." Colorado's position, as Secretary of State Jena Griswold said in a statement, is that Peters will remain in prison: "Tina Peters was convicted by a jury of her peers for state crimes in a state court. Trump has no constitutional authority to pardon her."
## Army-Navy Game Takes Center Stage
The 126th Army-Navy Game, one of the great traditions of college football, kicks off this afternoon on CBS, with the [Commander-in-Chief's Trophy](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu5CAQRE-DM0bQGGMHDjYh-5tuaCFoxr3C9AizY_n2q_lX-FElpVel9-dr-wpUqD5_hwPXnnmreJ0Fe8e2XeHcqT4711yYE9XnzoVSuDdQYKUGqc2WApV7G4e0ZkRAM-Cq3WQnMIt2w74uS9Q2OZsXa-MyB5i0wWTmqJPLZrYDrR-aBm20VlZPj-zsbNKMMzhUJmkxKkzUuT3-MtW-Yy43v7E9Ih9DWffeX6cwvwR4Af66rse_M3RO4f4UBPizc7s_-eLWTwG-xhCyAP_ZFeC1EuDVKMBHPo5QEzZJVcadMJ-yN37tt9zpGyMbRm5Jhnbcsob3LQM1mblFFODnabRumhelnAA_tDW9LiqFzsmJUT2PQOX7dP-R6fcK_wMAAP__TOCQ1w) on the line, and President Trump expected to attend in person. The annual tradition started on Nov. 29, 1890, and it's been played nearly every year since--a college rivalry that doubles as a celebration of America's Armed Forces. Navy leads the [all-time series](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGunTAQAE8DnRFeA4bCRRq6nzYlcvAaNlq8T7bzELePXq7w65FmpPn1tX15YkrHT3-hq1G2hHdhrBXzdvtyUjqqpMgigdJxClPwzwY9jEqD0mYLnvjZhja4iAhoWnTaTuMEZtG2PV3wwVq7TH3s92ECE8LuzeLnYVoMLGBach-bBm207kc9ddGOswkzzmCxN0E3Q4-BquTuj1CqJ0Z-5I252-Vq2Z21vkpjfjSwNrDe990V-qAG1l2Y8UAVRepvz9zA6vP1qOTfjzr8heqkUiU_KuMuOaj4l1kxlaokqptSwlza7MLrJmYqk22G_rg88f92_dawt4N_AQAA___5qYFP) 63-55-7, and enters today's game as the favorite over Army, led by dual-threat quarterback Blake Horvath. President Trump's attendance has led to additional security protocols for the game. Federal officials have also set a [temporary flight restriction](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAQxfGnsTssM_grBcU27rLtlhaBwZ5dzEQwm8hvf5X7Crc_Ovrp_-e-3R0lyvtvd6KVyFvGd00ogmV7u3pQ3oVzTMyB8n5wouCuDXoYlQalzRYcpWsb2mAjIqBp0ep5GicwNz23hwUY4OFvHkZYlgGD14MZY5wNTNGM3rRkP28atNG6H_XUxXlcTFhwgRl7E3Qz9BhIuHR_mbIcGNPFLyyd57NN9hB51sb8amBtYP3wu1ofvjj_77NoYBU8n1xcuVRMtB-iClYp5IU4K8yRi8egwn9UwsqV81LZvS61uxMVZfVwSejkgg2sbbHh-aaUqE5zM_T76Sh9Q-RH9V4WvgIAAP__7cGGRg) from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. Saturday and a strict no-drone zone within 2 nautical miles of the stadium. Kickoff at Baltimore's M&T Bank Stadium is set for at 3 p.m. ET. Here's [how to watch.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb8GOx15KGpBkcZu06Z0CDz0ZRB2kMjw95ndX0h_55455-uxPTR5CvunPlFlF7eA5fKYM6at6OugsOcYnI_RUtiP6MnqukEPY8uh5WKzmnzdhsYqhwgoGlR8kqMEsfCpOZR10tgR9Pw9zIMzcp6dgV7IoXdiWcA1pF5vHLjgvB-57Nw0zsLOOMOEvbCcDT1ayjF1P5FCPtD5Gm9MnYln49WR8_Ni4oPBymAtpXS_wWKycbc16CvX147Bqk9MZHRoTQwOEwaDDNaBy2VhsL6NdDprG_Rd212f2D4T3oSlSco-C3lPl5zY0O-nJv-G538VuxX8BQAA__815YBO)

Army-Navy Game Takes Center Stage The 126th Army-Navy Game, one of the great traditions of college football, kicks off this afternoon on CBS, with the on the line, and President Trump expected to attend in person. The annual tradition started on Nov. 29, 1890, and it's been played nearly every year since--a college rivalry that doubles as a celebration of America's Armed Forces. | | | For decades, ibuprofen has been the go-to for inflammation and pain. But while it may dull discomfort temporarily, it often comes at a cost—potentially harming your gut, liver, and heart with long-term use.
Now, researchers are turning their attention to something far more promising: a marine-derived compound that actually works with your body’s natural systems—resolving inflammation at the source rather than masking it.
Even more impressive? This breakthrough nutrient doesn’t just help with pain. It also supports brain, heart, and liver health—three systems ibuprofen may compromise over time.
Whether you’re dealing with joint stiffness, post-workout soreness, or chronic pain /inflammation, this could be the upgrade your body’s been waiting for.
[👉](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1222436/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTM/LbmNsRW04U2o4bw/qP3NpZD02NDUmcHViPTI0MDU3MyZjMT0yMDI1MTIxM0FGV1ItMTUwMCZjMj1LT0ImYzM9QUZXUg/gaT1MpQ/seha4c3cf64) **[Discover the Marine Nutrient Changing How We Treat Inflammation](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1222436/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTM/LbmNsRW04U2o4bw/qP3NpZD02NDUmcHViPTI0MDU3MyZjMT0yMDI1MTIxM0FGV1ItMTUwMCZjMj1LT0ImYzM9QUZXUg/gaT1MpQ/seha4c3cf64)**

HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming - Prepare Now!
HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3

The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis".

Which means 2 dangerous things for you:

1. Higher prices at the grocery store

2. Less meat available

That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile.

But there is a catch.

Not all protein is created equal.

And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis.

See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements:

It needs to:

- Last a while
- Taste great
- Store without refrigeration
- Can't break the bank
Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!

Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars?

Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops.

Grocery store meat doesn't work either.

First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year.

But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight.

But don't worry friend.

There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:

- This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years.
- It doesn't need to be refrigerated.
- And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank.
- And most importantly, it tastes delicious!
Introducing for the first time ever...

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3
The BRAND NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3

And
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3
right here on this page , you can score an introductory price plus some amazing FREE gifts.

Now, there is one thing you should know.

Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT.

So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush.

I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit.

It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit,
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3
you need to act fast .

For starters, you get 5 meat options.

Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes.

Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it.

You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store.

Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation.

That's it!

No funky chemicals.

No artificial gunk.

The only things in your food are food.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3
Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!

Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process.

We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can.

That means 2 important things.

First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can.

And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way.

And guess what?

This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from.

And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3
Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!

Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now.

Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis.

Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option.

Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans.

And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity.

Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis.

There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then."

Disasters come out of nowhere.

And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket.

Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find.

All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family.

This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path.

When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones.

You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3
Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3

To your survival,

Frank Bates

Patriot Headquarters

P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront.

Customers Love Their Ultimate

Meat Survival Food Kits!

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fed6f02b030006bd906e702237098c6120586a44bfab2da4fba7b5b36099f5932970958598c4092948be8630cb3eb4e55bfd558c95d9aa021a7fd9c6ece751a3

Joseph L.

"I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy."

Danielle M.

4Patriots Employee

"I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store."

Michael M.

"My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where's the meat"."

Ernest K.

"It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein."

clean_body: Here’s a brief update... | | | | | Hi Fellow Conservative, As we reach the middle of December, I wanted to take a moment to share a brief update on what's ahead for our campaign team as we close out the year... Our campaign team is reviewing the key priorities that will carry into the new year, and we're continuing to monitor the issues our grassroots supporters have identified as critically important for Republicans to address. These conversations directly shape our strategy to put Texas and America First. Your feedback has made a big difference and we appreciate it. At the same time, our team is reviewing the numbers as you read this email. What we can tell you right now is this: we need to accelerate our fundraising to keep pace with the radical Democrats. With the end-of-month -- and end-of-year -- deadlines approaching fast, every single contribution matters more than ever, and right now we 're pacing to FALL BEHIND our online fundraising goal. If you can make a gift today, of any amount, it will give us the critical boost we need before the final stretch begins... Will you chip in now to help STOP DEMOCRATS? Thank you for staying involved and for taking the time to stay informed as we move into the final stretch of 2025. More updates soon, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. id: 2025-03-20-13:13:46:473t |

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: $9B Electric Superhighway, Offbeat Texas Destinations, and a Battleship Renovation
body:
The Electrical Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT) unanimously approved a [$9.4 billion project](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ywyAQhJ8GdXi40x8UFGnUOW1KDYiTRIKFBrBlv31GrtKn3tlvf76u49X44Lfl09xIl-ccx42OHKgUSqOyFGgqyU_5vlNa_bIe5hXneUSBLQfkUI_O-PAam8ppK5yCijT0Xdthjz1Wq5bQtdiqhlAp2U1oO2NAWiFrJVspusrrEwYINaAAoS7oGpQWoOl7UGCRNYKcLzFdykqFnibP4RUflC5TvFVBr6XsmdUfDAeGwxqjC36jU2Q4nGyGAyDDgdIUC7cxZ8o8_nDFrQ_Bx43v8aDE_47kJfLvu5-IvxP5krxjOFRJu_04XbnrWSOWm_Hh3aP8772Hxt8AAAD__ymDgoU) this week to build a network of long-distance power lines being called a “superhighway.”

| | |

| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuupDAQAE9jsofotvkFDkYakc2mGyIbt6ElM0am53f71ewVXl6qkurvbb45Tnxf_7idrLxjnu_0OhOJUJlHT4kWKbycj4PKxuv2cp8c44wNtj-AP6Dn4Dh9ZlMF65swQkUW-q7tsMceq82OnW8GY7SHkQZvsDWu922M2LUuDqOv2H5lgKABG2jGGoPBwQOYvocRPCrTUGDJpZaNhN7ujOmTn1TqJe9VspvIcSp9UTgpnFaSo_BOnvNOX0Lh9ORAuT62Q-nJxciJnZDSV59TcAe9QWEnHJS-xrQ_TgkUQF9pwfZSFRuOF6fEZ9cr06y74_Q_LL_b9bT4LwAA__8ESn5C) | |
# Saturday, December 13, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1989, the Texas legislature passed the [Texas Workers' Compensation Act](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSgyAQxvGnwU6HXVG0oLjGLtde6aCsygyRDOyF-PY3yStc9a--X_H93Oab9cGf-7e9k-HXFueTSg7ETGkeFwq0cvJr_n1QOvx-FHvFbZtRYlcD1tDOzvpwzapyZpFuhIoM6L7rUaPG6jCOBmkVjWQ73dt2QNl3Kwx6IamgVbLy5o0BQgsoQY4NOoXDAqC0hhEWFEqS8xxTwwcxvWzewhWflJo13qtgDuZHFu2XwEngVEppOB82nsGf1MS0C5w-q9rZq16udwROdHJ6t5NDlYx7FB-Cz70WSu5368MH5_9d8jT4FwAA__-UOnQ7), which replaced the Industrial Accident Board with the Texas Workers' Compensation Commission and increased maximum benefits from $238 to $416 a week. Uncertain of your next Texas destination for a weekend visit? You could try the town of Uncertain! Find out more about some of Texas' [best offbeat towns](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOgzAQBNCvgc6I3YCNCxfX0OXaK5HBS1jJ4Ajvxcnfn5JfuH70ZjQ_1-nqOfJx-_Y7OXmuaTqo5EgidE52pkiLnLzk3zudG9-24l9pXSdssVeACi5T8BxfU1cHN7fBQk0OjO41GjRYb84E7S1qrS31Fuy8DOSHHjo07QBh1TW7NwYIF8AWWttg6HCYATpjwMKMVddSYElnIxsJPX1e4ys96GyWtNfRbSL3XF2-KhwrHEspTUlnDF6iz-9IhePCwpQrHK1K6zqTFyWpHFlJUg_OLIoP9aHVe0yzyR7r04V74Rg5a1N17W33HD-V8r-jHg7_AgAA__8L1Hx9) in today's _Roundup_. In today's _Flyover Podcast,_ host Amy __ Hess offers a special feature on an Austin man known as “The Singing Cowboy,” who fulfills musical last wishes for the terminally ill—offering comfort, dignity, and peaceful goodbyes through bedside concerts. You can [watch the interview here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVuQ72zsMHioFGVqslWVuiCDD7DkhAgOHN6-oq_Q9fuk3_D_vjU3H1N8Dnf_IMfvfmqelJdEzDQ3dUuJOp5jt6wvmsc4jNnvU983KLE6AZ5ANcHHtDe6CK6VoYaCHFhTGbRosRidrzowWus-yIoI5LmGHkNljUQpyfgiugMDBAUoQdYlBo3nFkBbCzW0KLSkEHmaSx6J6e2XPu3TRnPZTY8iuZH5tQj1IfAq8JpzLvdp5bWl4z8Wz90o1HUT6kKf4NfLz_Z1HwQaFupi1VLMLrxyTCkuxgoth4eP6Q_n_yXZHP4GAAD__wHQcw4). Keep an eye on your inbox later today: we’re sending a partner message from [Incogni](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkjGP2zAMhX-NvF0gUj7LGTxcEXi7rh0NWqJsArJlWPLl8u-LtNe0mbu-j-_xgeCP9-GdJMo6faeFu_IZ0rDyNUcuhffhPHJkV3Zx-dh4n2War3RLIQyo8fUF8AXM4Enibagr343an6HiDmzz2qBFi9XcwWh8A4x1i74ObQOtCdgi12ZsCDRV0t3DAMEAatDnE_oa2xGgthbOMKKqNXspaT-VmQt_Ug7xlj54P7m0VLGbS9myMm8Ke4W9rC5Nq9yZwt4zRYV93tgJRWX6stOayRVJ6yBemQto1K5lY0OA0RlLtbO6YdeCbltU2NCyKfMthcD7b0fzECkEiUKFv6KM_ctyOnbHylw8e3FU2P9rG_IxKnN5SEdZhofj7U9sfuILezmWrz3ipifoaNlIplWZy6PV80BaC6_l3r_aO79dJUbJjVW1nhaS-OuY5f9e4KPDnwEAAP__SObBZg) about how scammers get your data and what you can do to protect yourself. If you’re curious about emerging beauty trends backed by early laboratory research, today’s sponsor, [Prime Biome,](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMFugzAQRL_G3ILYtTHh4EOkiFt67REZvMBKJlCzIUm_vkqqfkGvo6fRzPu8tBfPka_jh5_JyWNY2ivdt0gilNq6o0i9JO6320pp4nG6--cyDC0WWB4AD6Db4Dk-W5MF1xWhhowcVLa0WGGF2eQIamuhP5aFJyQ8ln3nS6wDVcZqY3TG7lUGCBqwgKLOMRg8dgCmqqCGDpUpKLAsKZeJhB5-G-Jz2Snl_TJn0U0i66b0SWGjsBlJ1sQzdbzM9CIUNjsHeh_7uvE35uu0Kt3swkHp81-q0Pph4MheSOlzt8TgV3qAQvsLDnG-bRIogD5Tj-UpSy6sd46RN1spU4yz5_jeJP8zuTv8CQAA___cXofR) has a new presentation spotlighting a buzzed-about technique many people are exploring to improve the look of their skin.

## ERCOT Approves $9B Electric Superhighway
The Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT) approved a [$9 billion project](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ywyAQhJ8GdXi40x8UFGnUOW1KDYiTRIKFBrBlv31GrtKn3tlvf76u49X44Lfl09xIl-ccx42OHKgUSqOyFGgqyU_5vlNa_bIe5hXneUSBLQfkUI_O-PAam8ppK5yCijT0Xdthjz1Wq5bQtdiqhlAp2U1oO2NAWiFrJVspusrrEwYINaAAoS7oGpQWoOl7UGCRNYKcLzFdykqFnibP4RUflC5TvFVBr6XsmdUfDAeGwxqjC36jU2Q4nGyGAyDDgdIUC7cxZ8o8_nDFrQ_Bx43v8aDE_47kJfLvu5-IvxP5krxjOFRJu_04XbnrWSOWm_Hh3aP8772Hxt8AAAD__ymDgoU) this week to build a network of long-distance power lines being called a “superhighway.” The network will cover massive swaths of East Texas as ERCOT seeks to address the state's growing energy needs, stemming from extensive growth as well as the development of high-powered data centers across the state. With a planned completion set for the next decade, the superhighway will consist of 765-kilovolt lines, more than double the voltage of 345-kV transmission lines commonly used on the grid. Public Utility Commission of Texas Chairman Thomas Gleeson emphasized the need for transparency as the now-approved project takes shape, especially “given the [magnitude of this](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O6yAUhVeDOyK4wSYUFK9xl9dOaWG4jhlhY8FNHO9-5EizgqmPzs93vu7D3cUU18d_t6Cl95SHFfeakAjLYEZM6KlEX58bljk-5t0deZoGENByCVxeh-BiOgbVBDuKYGSDVuqu7UCDhma2QoCWyoAGYbww2ntsvTftrdMgUOkm2jNMgrxKEFKYCwQFt1FKpbU0cgSmBIZIuVxoRsK3q1M68gvLxeelSXYm2iq7_mPQM-j9WN2zUlxPlUF_4jDoU_YuMeix-EzcbVvJL6zc8DGmFPPKt5K_0ROnzBdE4p8i_ssf6eABF7eG2hQbtv101U4zJR6Li-kzhf524MvCTwAAAP__MXOGFQ) and the cost.”
## Texas Sues Healthcare Giant Epic Systems
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has sued Epic Systems, the healthcare data software company behind platforms such as MyChart, alleging monopolizing practices in the market and the [“gatekeeping” of children’s](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuupDAMxvGngS4jYm5LkWIbutl2SxQSh1hrLko8F95-xRSnOO3pLP2ln6zv7326W2Lalj92RSPvsE8bvjKjCKZpmJHRSSKXHwemSEt82XMPYYIKWqVB6XrylvicmtKbufKDLtHovms76KGHMpoBAFvrbGi70FTBt9jV192H2gUPXUnmwjToWkOlq-EGvoFfs9ZN3-tBz1A0FXqSPd0kouDb5sDn_sR0c_tasokiRy7q3wWMBYwRLUvEN7orFzDKfpDLX0WRFDCu6MlZVgndnvxVP7DKD8wKD3LKMuOCnk-1WMF_iAdti3KR2CfcsvomlMn440XMlLu-aKpltcSfB-Vnsz4N_A8AAP___P6Pyg) medical information. Paxton is claiming in the antitrust suit that Epic [is intentionally hiding](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp8Gd0RmQvxTUGzj7m67pTU2EzNaDBZMbuJ9-lXyCrc--o70nT9f8xdy5LT9xp2cvO55TvSskUSozONCkVYpvNbHQSXwFp545vt9hhZu2oA219kjx3O2jXdL60fTkDN9d-ughx6a4HBsAW6LHdqxW_0A4zB2g73ZBQZP1mLD7i0zYK4GWtOOF_AWhsUY2_dmNAso25JnyeUigYReWO_xzN9ULmvem-iCyFHV9ZeCScEUcvaRE72hguntVjAZUDB9thpFckl06o0SFYz6LyV94Ety0vVBVdPBq65nFdqrxhhp47TpPad85Mj_UDgnjcnrR_JUdk5vfGChJBh14S1I1Zx0IIwSViykYGqK88eTY-Ta9cq2244cPwfkZ9m_HfwPAAD__3rZmcE) “children’s medication lists, treatment notes and provider messages from parents.” An electronic health record (EHR) giant, Epic holds records for over 325 million patients and is used by 42% of U.S. hospitals.
## List: Nine Offbeat Texas Destinations
Texas’ thriving metropolises offer plenty of reasons for people to visit, but WorldAtlas has created a list of [nine towns](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOgzAQBNCvgc6I3YCNCxfX0OXaK5HBS1jJ4Ajvxcnfn5JfuH70ZjQ_1-nqOfJx-_Y7OXmuaTqo5EgidE52pkiLnLzk3zudG9-24l9pXSdssVeACi5T8BxfU1cHN7fBQk0OjO41GjRYb84E7S1qrS31Fuy8DOSHHjo07QBh1TW7NwYIF8AWWttg6HCYATpjwMKMVddSYElnIxsJPX1e4ys96GyWtNfRbSL3XF2-KhwrHEspTUlnDF6iz-9IhePCwpQrHK1K6zqTFyWpHFlJUg_OLIoP9aHVe0yzyR7r04V74Rg5a1N17W33HD-V8r-jHg7_AgAA__8L1Hx9) off the beaten path that offer their own unique attractions as well. The list includes Goliad, the site of a battle for Texas independence that rivals the Alamo in historical significance, as well as Muenster, which might feel more like a town in Germany to some visitors. Rocksprings offers the Historic Rocksprings Hotel and proximity to the Devil's Sinkhole natural wonder, San Saba is the Pecan Capital of the World, and Pittsburg has a full-scale replica of the Ezekiel Airship. And you can’t miss the town of Uncertain, if only for its name! See the full list of offbeat [Texas towns here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOgzAQBNCvgc6I3YCNCxfX0OXaK5HBS1jJ4Ajvxcnfn5JfuH70ZjQ_1-nqOfJx-_Y7OXmuaTqo5EgidE52pkiLnLzk3zudG9-24l9pXSdssVeACi5T8BxfU1cHN7fBQk0OjO41GjRYb84E7S1qrS31Fuy8DOSHHjo07QBh1TW7NwYIF8AWWttg6HCYATpjwMKMVddSYElnIxsJPX1e4ys96GyWtNfRbSL3XF2-KhwrHEspTUlnDF6iz-9IhePCwpQrHK1K6zqTFyWpHFlJUg_OLIoP9aHVe0yzyR7r04V74Rg5a1N17W33HD-V8r-jHg7_AgAA__8L1Hx9).

subject: Why won’t you wish Trump a Merry Christmas, Peter?
body:

| Much like the concerned scientist in the disaster movie whose dire warnings fall on deaf ears --
Defend our Courts has been working desperately for the last seven months to inform the voting public about MAGA's alarming plan to take over critical state courts across America.
Now we've just received a soulcrushing example of what happens when we lose one of these courts to the far-right:
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ag21JAEE81zT6xBb9L_gG7GU8hVx27I52bWy8ismMr6uBPflVpuNAVxXYlxBS-I9DWtDQQc_gOSCQ9lpaTU2IEahrrnncX4jCF6hDlhku-GQz0aKpBugWK6rd51kn8HP96hB2KmnMnvxTl88igTiVYCRzdbj5WBD38y1S8iBVkf8uF_xr83-VVNRMUgaRhe7dlJWQ75FTcFpnrRhOCyhpQ==&c=aR0PvcYd8PqdZxleIueGtO8Ra7ZN8K4KkWDejZFUcL4IvxL9hVHU8w==&ch=D99cJyYysvA1HHAiUVOJd8__xFxiELb4O5U3AasJQ3rprPJaUdPZ1w==)
---
The Arkansas State Supreme Court just gave the Republican state legislature a green light to kill any constitutional amendment passed by voters.
As the Arkansas Times eloquently puts it:
"Even when Arkansans manage the Herculean task of collecting tens of thousands of signatures and jumping through the myriad hoops Republicans have placed in the path of a constitutional amendment reaching the ballot, the Legislature can simply change or reverse that measure."
If voters were to pass an amendment to loosen Arkansas's near-total ban on abortions, state lawmakers could simply undo it after the fact. Every person in Arkansas could vote to save abortion and it wouldn't matter. Arkansas just lost its democracy. Full stop.
This is what is at stake if MAGA takes your local State Supreme Court. Overnight they can enshrine one party MAGA rule, implement redistricting, and rule that your votes no longer matter as Arkansas' Supreme Court just did.
While it's too late for Arkansas there is time to save courts in Arizona, Michigan, and Georgia where MAGA is working overtime to seize their courts. [Everything is on the line but sadly state courts are a hard issue to get donors to care about. We need your support to protect them. Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us defend these key swing state courts?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ag21JAEE81zT6xBb9L_gG7GU8hVx27I52bWy8ismMr6uBPflVpuNAVxXYlxBS-I9DWtDQQc_gOSCQ9lpaTU2IEahrrnncX4jCF6hDlhku-GQz0aKpBugWK6rd51kn8HP96hB2KmnMnvxTl88igTiVYCRzdbj5WBD38y1S8iBVkf8uF_xr83-VVNRMUgaRhe7ZhzNk1b6dOcVoXlqf5Yeuw==&c=aR0PvcYd8PqdZxleIueGtO8Ra7ZN8K4KkWDejZFUcL4IvxL9hVHU8w==&ch=D99cJyYysvA1HHAiUVOJd8__xFxiELb4O5U3AasJQ3rprPJaUdPZ1w==)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
