If not...

[Click HERE and I'll reveal what you're missing.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=b96ecc95a5d247819c8b7a4e935eb619&_e=Ce3ogA5LjWuJnkWu6OOl3iEjNsD2KBO5-n4q5BVICgDv67a8QMIQlX0aEKkuBffEBYA7iGRkSnKcYvifq1gY-jUIPo0rikky2IkeR8qWr3QNYJaUdjYgszcSSuM9a8_NSuT6scZsV_fC0a2WWO-OLQJunpsOaImfwYHWvl44lMHxKMsWyIQgYjwuJyfi0NsdO5n_vnVH3vtZSsZjrvCa3CN_sfz-iHbtH5N7QshlYa5CK8iwnS7sYylP-CNyE0TTFwKVNAVKnNToskBQ98wNa6jYSClR6C1huevmefWzTDZMirEnYcQI7DhPhdV9-rbK-nCuQcALvQftO9IdFAWr7EqUI3Qt7Dbuz5clMwClZonD7laGpXhiU4F9pd715nOSEb7MTmtMangBqUXmb8hZs-P2Pi1oNAopKbMUppQxEVQoi5j6vbwaiIOZEeeLon34UPrJ-KrLwYYxn8JY2mkROXoZzmER0NX2QvWNqH0WXctYpkfnlJaUVa7cpLakTDbuvfR05giJEcxo_ViiVOQk-w0S16w0QmfaQVx4yQYIXWphiDQZspSBdtqMpnghpeBRncqplB6iDxbx5mvHRIW0Aw%3D%3D)

You may be **shocked** by what you discover.
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Washington Examiner: Mississippi’s free-market turnaround is now national news
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/washingtonexaminerpublication?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
I wanted to share some exciting news with you. **This week, the _Washington Examiner_ – one of America’s leading national publications – wrote a major five-page feature on Mississippi’s economic resurgence and the policy ideas that are driving it.**

The article, titled “Mississippi Turning” makes the remarkable point that Mississippi has had more growth in the past five years than over the previous fifteen.
---
|
---
| Most importantly, the article highlights that it is the free-market reforms that many of you have helped champion that is the engine behind this turnaround.

**You can read the[FULL ARTICLE HERE](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9b493806d0&e=5703353baa)**

In just the past five years, Mississippi has put in place big structural changes that are delivering results:
1. **Labor-market freedom** – Universal recognition of out-of-state occupational licenses (2021) and the removal of needless red tape that once required hundreds of hours of training for everyday jobs. This has opened the door to talent and put downward pressure on remaining in-state barriers.
2. **Historic tax reform** – A move to a 4% flat income tax and legislating to allow the complete elimination of the state income tax.
3. **Low-cost energy** – By largely resisting subsidized green mandates and keeping electricity prices among the lowest in America, Mississippi has become a magnet for energy-intensive industries like data centers and advanced manufacturing.

The result?

**$42 billion of inward investment in five years, the second-fastest state GDP growth in America last quarter, rising university enrollments, and – for the first time in generations – people moving _to_ Mississippi rather than away from it.**
---
|
---
_Policies matter: Mississippi growth is driven by free market reform_
| Having a respected national outlet spotlight these reforms, and give credit to the ideas many of you have supported for years, is a genuine milestone. It marks a great end to a highly productive year.

It shows that Mississippi is no longer just catching up – we’re becoming a model others are looking to follow.
---
|
---
_Mississippi is no longer last, but leading!_
| Thank you, as always, for your partnership in making Mississippi a freer, more prosperous place. Moments like this don’t happen without the steady, principled work so many of you have done alongside us.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=faa05c9ca4&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
With gratitude,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=6b53849b3b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=6b53849b3b).

_Copyright © 2025 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: Rebecca Hardy
subject: Before the Year Ends, See What You Built
body:
| |
---
We’ve accomplished so much together! | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTczNjc5MzIwMDA4NDkyNDk2LFwiclwiOjE3MzY3OTM5MDk5Mjg5MzIzMn0iLCJzIjoiMzcxY2E0NmIyYTk0ZDNmNSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTczNjc5MzIwMDE1ODMyNTMyLFwiclwiOjE3MzY3OTM5MDk5Mjg5MzIzMn0iLCJzIjoiMTNiNTAzOGJmNTc3MWJiOSJ9)
---
|
---
Peter, As the year comes to a close, I want you to see something special. This short recap video tells the story of what your support made possible in 2025, not just in headlines, but in real families, real victories, and real momentum for the medical liberty movement.

|
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTczNjc5MzIwMDIxMDc1NDE1LFwiclwiOjE3MzY3OTM5MDk5Mjg5MzIzMn0iLCJzIjoiY2JlMmZmOThjNjhiYjk5ZSJ9)
---
|
---
This year marked a major milestone: **10 years of Texans for Vaccine Choice.** What started as a handful of determined mothers standing on the steps of the Texas Capitol, wondering if anyone was going to listen to us, has turned into a national force that grew strong enough to usher in the MAHA movement at the federal level, with people like Robert F. Kennedy Jr. by our side. _But the victories didn’t stop there._ This year, TFVC traveled to the **Santa Monica Film Festival** , where our co-produced documentary, **_Follow the Silenced_** , won the **Best of Festival Award** , shining a global spotlight on the stories Big Pharma tried to bury during their Covid vaccine clinical trials. We also launched **Aaron Siri’s Texas book tour** , bringing medical liberty advocates together at a special TFVC-hosted event in Round Rock. Texans from across the state showed up in force, reminding the country that the heart of this movement runs through Texas. And of course, we can’t forget the Capitol battlefield. With your support, TFVC helped **pass seven critical medical liberty bills** while again defeating **every single bad bill** filed this session. That’s not luck. That’s real grassroots power. But Peter, this movement does not survive on victories alone. It survives on faithful supporters who refuse to sit on the sidelines when freedom is at stake. As we prepare for a new year and new battles, I’m asking you to stand with us once more. **[Will you make a generous year-end gift to fuel the fight ahead?](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTczNjc5MzIwMDI2MzE4Mjk5LFwiclwiOjE3MzY3OTM5MDk5Mjg5MzIzMn0iLCJzIjoiYzI2MjhjODU1ZTZlOTc4MCJ9)** Your support today helps us:
* Train and mobilize more advocates
* Educate Texas voters through the primary and general elections
* Prepare to platform our legislative agenda
* Expand our legal and media reach

| | | [ ****Make Your Year-End Gift Today!**** ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTczNjc5MzIwMDMxNTYxMTgyLFwiclwiOjE3MzY3OTM5MDk5Mjg5MzIzMn0iLCJzIjoiZjFkNGIzNGU2YmJjN2FhYiJ9)
---
|
---
Before the year ends, take a moment to watch the video. Remember what you helped build. And if you’re able, help us make 2026 even stronger than the last ten years combined.
|
---
| | | **Gratefully,
Rebecca Hardy
President, TFVC**

---|---|---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
##### Texans for Vaccine Choice
1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States |
---

name: Alex, GOP Project Coordinator
subject: America’s 250th Birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
|
Friend,

I just stepped out of a strategic briefing about something almost no nation in history ever gets to experience -- America will cross the 250-year mark greater than ever before.

**Most countries collapse long before that. Ours hasn 't, and it won't, because patriots like you keep this Republic standing proud.**

During that meeting, we reviewed the shortlist of supporters who have consistently shown up. Your name wasn't just on that list. **It was highlighted and starred.** **Senior leadership made it clear that you are one of the people we 've been able to count on when the pressure is at an all-time high.**

I told them you aren't just another contributor. **You 've been the backbone - someone whose commitment never wavers, no matter how chaotic the battlefield gets.**

And as we close in on this once-in-human-history milestone, we need our strongest fighters locked in. The next chapter of America's story will be written by the people who refuse to back down -- **the people like you.**

**That 's why I'm giving you early, private access to our America 250 Membership. This isn't a public offer. This is a handpicked invitation for the patriots who've earned it.**

To honor this moment, we're offering it at a symbolic **_$17.76_** -- a special rate reserved only for the core supporters who've carried this movement on their shoulders.

clean_body: | Friend, I just stepped out of a strategic briefing about something almost no nation in history ever gets to experience -- America will cross the 250-year mark greater than ever before. Most countries collapse long before that. Ours hasn 't, and it won't, because patriots like you keep this Republic standing proud. During that meeting, we reviewed the shortlist of supporters who have consistently shown up. Your name wasn't just on that list. It was highlighted and starred. Senior leadership made it clear that you are one of the people we 've been able to count on when the pressure is at an all-time high. I told them you aren't just another contributor. You 've been the backbone - someone whose commitment never wavers, no matter how chaotic the battlefield gets. And as we close in on this once-in-human-history milestone, we need our strongest fighters locked in. The next chapter of America's story will be written by the people who refuse to back down -- the people like you. That 's why I'm giving you early, private access to our America 250 Membership. This isn't a public offer. This is a handpicked invitation for the patriots who've earned it. To honor this moment, we're offering it at a symbolic $17.76 -- a special rate reserved only for the core supporters who've carried this movement on their shoulders. | Lock in your membership now and stand with me as we fight for the next generation of American freedom. God Bless America, Alex M. Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
This is how we fix the immigration crisis. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=970997f05ea1452580f92840f276bea9&_e=UaiQbg-S5oozO4SDKPC9Z6RMfQRoqo6eRTSVR83Nd9PJ6cn7RD21-XpNebuhLQYHTzloE_1JtP1vSkWvtu26vXhDCh9E_YHeiY2PMja5uhFfvvoPxbT5CZkVJgGe1MyerWF1Dmh5ZgpaL5avpBQWVbs_LunLzb-95PWD-wk_SqfyWjr0TnN_YykjvwPo2T00ef5mnFCfMP43_tySLAojWm9TdVH_AU0ceSYS4ptdLgfZJJO5dLzVkSAP920YetMXQHe4nLn1n_IfOUwrPLUmNcKRboS1XLYef0CxfL6CASWBoOq5_ZklJfCaCov22FUjcnl1jNMJuvSvW63zoG7ORSmTWo2JbBPNrkiKHNPkOXoA8LqoT1_TOYbum5FT68mMIJKPmNB3vNb3Q027y6IgEpFciinJd0qqFiVwt3cb3GJ2SsJLi7MJBK0pDdY1UbFKHhgDrdOxlejq7fGTZRHPUvTKPBkdx_hDONhaCNBa9QprmoLVMtvzhE8H72Lx41nrmGVhIwACRfowMkaZrVJOrKAx61NTlwCv2GoSxcAY3EaCODn54vv-ai3TFKx2vJS1pQK4P46-HtVRL09Pzcc4KmYlQDYYEQz6g2X7D-uG_gOKLC5raX5kOYssdQcxbhbg4Y2dq1omSXUgy202y8EnQx4AArNMJlLz7QjGoVyNICg%3D)
Fellow Patriot, the solution is simple.

1. Continue Mass Deportations.
2. Pause Immigration.
3. Take Down, Defund, and Investigate Corrupt NGOs that keep the Immigration Industry going.
4. Restore American Sovereignty and the Rule of Law in Dem Enclaves.

Biden and Mayorkas broke our immigration system deliberately. That's why I am calling for a historical precedent to freeze immigration, end abuses, close loopholes and put Americans first.

**No more loopholes, no more magnets.**

For too long, the Swamp has enabled a coordinated push to bring in massive foreign populations and exploit taxpayer resources.

**[Fellow Patriot, if you agree, I need you on my team.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=970997f05ea1452580f92840f276bea9&_e=UaiQbg-S5oozO4SDKPC9Z6RMfQRoqo6eRTSVR83Nd9PJ6cn7RD21-XpNebuhLQYHTzloE_1JtP1vSkWvtu26vXhDCh9E_YHeiY2PMja5uhFfvvoPxbT5CZkVJgGe1MyerWF1Dmh5ZgpaL5avpBQWVbs_LunLzb-95PWD-wk_SqfyWjr0TnN_YykjvwPo2T00ef5mnFCfMP43_tySLAojWm9TdVH_AU0ceSYS4ptdLgd7noe-rkAG6-rSXTUksNEy-KI9spqqbOoUrvuhwGNRU4IhWTI2PGPz_1SJ-5XZFfXFtXB6c5NQz0BsHT-QXi22S74CXZ1hiYH707OyprBsmYslmU7c3TpvcYiTJog21hmkuULXCuat5PTenYgH8fCQUMJJJFIu56jB4cRilgBzGUO893RyR5g3LONyy2pldRjXHoLmUgtAUatiVskg5bEyt2JKCt-eTxJ-k1-4GlfsfwCxmyg1QjMtY8oxC542nDurj_cB9aLfMc6ZBLPRQRxLldNBebMztQ-Abxy-EdAB8MqwaWmwwSwWBT4yAE4X2bg-W7O1gR8rv3h-a6yCZPuuvWbQHZv1l6be_Spe2PKQ9jzXsBS3CRY2-ZoFXdyIgkHarrmnpjNBEp9tfE7z9kpk-cu_iMPIFZUGGsYFeLtCXwnyPFY-q8Mo5OLoJSs3LbY%3D)**

It's time to hit PAUSE and prioritize the American people and Western values.

**Get our House in order and put American citizens _first_.**

Let's **_PAUSE_** immigration to end this crisis.

clean_body: This is how we fix the immigration crisis. | Fellow Patriot, the solution is simple. 1. Continue Mass Deportations. 2. Pause Immigration. 3. Take Down, Defund, and Investigate Corrupt NGOs that keep the Immigration Industry going. 4. Restore American Sovereignty and the Rule of Law in Dem Enclaves. Biden and Mayorkas broke our immigration system deliberately. That's why I am calling for a historical precedent to freeze immigration, end abuses, close loopholes and put Americans first. No more loopholes, no more magnets. For too long, the Swamp has enabled a coordinated push to bring in massive foreign populations and exploit taxpayer resources. It's time to hit PAUSE and prioritize the American people and Western values. Get our House in order and put American citizens first. Let's PAUSE immigration to end this crisis. Chip Roy | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Team Trisha
subject: Jewish “reconaissance” tours???
body:
Accusing Jews of conducting recon tours and spying on the Capitol is par for the course for Boebert.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019Qktjp2ZIJmqfc0Zd2XQbpkDBwBuFBzwIALUOPorLWazADfsh4pq4LoOSuJbGZYe1svuEKAMd24mRSf8zNpuVNqRfM6Dww6U5mhl4iHHP_RoGJkTeKamOD7StVXkLeyjO3ySG-RVyeWhTJjeFCJ9TaSzw2PjOonB5auNWf0Jqo92bEp_C3TIGXdU4FxKUCkfbRDXaTGtGHZRrHHyyuZD1zrr-zP1MmbI&c=aZ1hCkIHFc50NcNaxwDB9DExOqAUiNKJLGB4JyHu7ddGJjKRfzqfew==&ch=LYccIUx1GxJea0-KnE5yS67OcNpLWjIFJV8vJTXTeFu2avVpMcilfA==)
---
|

Peter,
This year marked the four year anniversary of the January 6th attack on our nation's Capitol.
Congresswoman Lauren Boebert was not a bystander, she played a key role in setting the stage for the attack. In the days leading up to the insurrection, she led groups of MAGA militia on "tours" of the Capitol, pointing out entrances and security weak points.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019Qktjp2ZIJmqfc0Zd2XQbpkDBwBuFBzwIALUOPorLWazADfsh4pq4LoOSuJbGZYe1svuEKAMd24mRSf8zNpuVNqRfM6Dww6U5mhl4iHHP_RoGJkTeKamOD7StVXkLeyjO3ySG-RVyeWhTJjeFCJ9TaSzw2PjOonB5auNWf0Jqo92bEp_C3TIGXdU4FxKUCkfbRDXaTGtGHZRrHHyyuZD1_4BiaaioyJV&c=aZ1hCkIHFc50NcNaxwDB9DExOqAUiNKJLGB4JyHu7ddGJjKRfzqfew==&ch=LYccIUx1GxJea0-KnE5yS67OcNpLWjIFJV8vJTXTeFu2avVpMcilfA==)
---

Boebert never faced accountability. She even voted against honoring the brave Capitol Police officers. And later, she mocked a group of Jewish visitors in the Capitol, asking them if they were "doing reconnaissance" -- a callback to how the media framed what she did in the leadup to Jan. 6.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019Qktjp2ZIJmqfc0Zd2XQbpkDBwBuFBzwIALUOPorLWazADfsh4pq4LoOSuJbGZYe1svuEKAMd24mRSf8zNpuVNqRfM6Dww6U5mhl4iHHP_RoGJkTeKamOD7StVXkLeyjO3ySG-RVyeWhTJjeFCJ9TaSzw2PjOonB5auNWf0Jqo92bEp_C3TIGXdU4FxKUCkfbRDXaTGtGHZRrHHyyuZD19A_eTOw5Tx7&c=aZ1hCkIHFc50NcNaxwDB9DExOqAUiNKJLGB4JyHu7ddGJjKRfzqfew==&ch=LYccIUx1GxJea0-KnE5yS67OcNpLWjIFJV8vJTXTeFu2avVpMcilfA==)
---

In 2022, while walking through the House of Representatives, Lauren Boebert encountered a large group of Jewish tourists that included Rabbis and Orthodox Jews with traditional beards and yarmulkes. She came up to the group and asked them if they were "doing reconnaissance."
This behavior isn't new. Boebert and her allies thrive on spreading hate and conspiracies especially about Jews. Take for instance the conspiracy propagated by Boebert co-conspirator Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene that "Jewish space lasers" were causing wildfires across America.
Accusing Jews of conducting recon tours and spying on the Capitol is par for the course for Boebert. In her five years on Capitol hill, her callous hate fueled speech has alienated Palestinians, Jews, Muslims, the disabled, Ranchers, the list goes on and on. This behavior caught up to her and forced to her to flee old district where her constituents had turned against her. Now, the constituents in her new district are turning on her too, she is more vulnerable than ever and Democrat Trisha Calvarese can beat her.
[If there was ever an election to beat her, it is this one. Can we count on you to make a donation of $25, $15, or even $5 to help Team Trisha remove Boebert once and for all?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019Qktjp2ZIJmqfc0Zd2XQbpkDBwBuFBzwIALUOPorLWazADfsh4pq4LoOSuJbGZYe96pYVZ13H8hO8-64zTGGjDobR-0sp5xpT_0EMfM0KZ3Mcg1lnE1C__kdT-wNzxMupeIHqpYyiOs2YK5CI_G-WwD-PMwGnK3BrMrQKFiDzAMPfQY5dx-cDGCUTBpha-8rueunk3E6wpOix3AvBz_jDVVmWt8CH3FmPilja1jH4_k=&c=aZ1hCkIHFc50NcNaxwDB9DExOqAUiNKJLGB4JyHu7ddGJjKRfzqfew==&ch=LYccIUx1GxJea0-KnE5yS67OcNpLWjIFJV8vJTXTeFu2avVpMcilfA==)

clean_body: Accusing Jews of conducting recon tours and spying on the Capitol is par for the course for Boebert. | | | | | == | Peter, This year marked the four year anniversary of the January 6th attack on our nation's Capitol. Congresswoman Lauren Boebert was not a bystander, she played a key role in setting the stage for the attack. In the days leading up to the insurrection, she led groups of MAGA militia on "tours" of the Capitol, pointing out entrances and security weak points. | == Boebert never faced accountability. She even voted against honoring the brave Capitol Police officers. And later, she mocked a group of Jewish visitors in the Capitol, asking them if they were "doing reconnaissance" -- a callback to how the media framed what she did in the leadup to Jan. 6. | == In 2022, while walking through the House of Representatives, Lauren Boebert encountered a large group of Jewish tourists that included Rabbis and Orthodox Jews with traditional beards and yarmulkes. She came up to the group and asked them if they were "doing reconnaissance." This behavior isn't new. Boebert and her allies thrive on spreading hate and conspiracies especially about Jews. Take for instance the conspiracy propagated by Boebert co-conspirator Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene that "Jewish space lasers" were causing wildfires across America. Accusing Jews of conducting recon tours and spying on the Capitol is par for the course for Boebert. In her five years on Capitol hill, her callous hate fueled speech has alienated Palestinians, Jews, Muslims, the disabled, Ranchers, the list goes on and on. This behavior caught up to her and forced to her to flee old district where her constituents had turned against her. Now, the constituents in her new district are turning on her too, she is more vulnerable than ever and Democrat Trisha Calvarese can beat her. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Lets restore the halls of Congress to a place of respect and service -- not hate and conspiracy. | | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j9skJ5GIWKQU1sb9fb6v00NuwZggo7Q52RZU5AWVccsfeJy-8QjbOhg-3xMHkFbZcHSuK0rmz5LuLyr9uQjY8W6g_6jo1YphQnSGe2TVHBiwlTFpdirhfvgPc4Nw798tSzEke3_WagL7GjusrXDCpAF4PP3d229ddJLwIf8VDnsgUIN4sBa38QW6QEerChA_jp3W7VxC78r89wycbkBhbt-UqFgB-JSh&c=bvCJIu0OsqQB9-DNyhHDH-dUUyaQf79Zyho3FLbIW_jBWFn4pH1tbQ==&ch=Zwzd2tZYGqBPyiva3H8Dksqz97WzPGHUJTGpZ5ANx2X3l9yCX9lhxg==)

|

Peter,
This year marked the four year anniversary of the January 6th attack on our nation's Capitol.
Congresswoman Lauren Boebert was not a bystander, she played a key role in setting the stage for the attack. In the days leading up to the insurrection, she led groups of MAGA militia on "tours" of the Capitol, pointing out entrances and security weak points.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j9skJ5GIWKQU1sb9fb6v00NuwZggo7Q52RZU5AWVccsfeJy-8QjbOhg-3xMHkFbZcHSuK0rmz5LuLyr9uQjY8W6g_6jo1YphQnSGe2TVHBiwlTFpdirhfvgPc4Nw798tSzEke3_WagL7GjusrXDCpAF4PP3d229ddJLwIf8VDnsgUIN4sBa38QW6QEerChA_jp3W7VxC78q5o2-DVioHQzdGOKBzVc5a&c=bvCJIu0OsqQB9-DNyhHDH-dUUyaQf79Zyho3FLbIW_jBWFn4pH1tbQ==&ch=Zwzd2tZYGqBPyiva3H8Dksqz97WzPGHUJTGpZ5ANx2X3l9yCX9lhxg==)
---

Boebert never faced accountability. She even voted against honoring the brave Capitol Police officers. And later, she mocked a group of Jewish visitors in the Capitol, asking them if they were "doing reconnaissance" -- a callback to how the media framed what she did in the leadup to Jan. 6.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j9skJ5GIWKQU1sb9fb6v00NuwZggo7Q52RZU5AWVccsfeJy-8QjbOhg-3xMHkFbZcHSuK0rmz5LuLyr9uQjY8W6g_6jo1YphQnSGe2TVHBiwlTFpdirhfvgPc4Nw798tSzEke3_WagL7GjusrXDCpAF4PP3d229ddJLwIf8VDnsgUIN4sBa38QW6QEerChA_jp3W7VxC78qC4wd-fkII_A0TY5ie0yGl&c=bvCJIu0OsqQB9-DNyhHDH-dUUyaQf79Zyho3FLbIW_jBWFn4pH1tbQ==&ch=Zwzd2tZYGqBPyiva3H8Dksqz97WzPGHUJTGpZ5ANx2X3l9yCX9lhxg==)
---

In 2022, while walking through the House of Representatives, Lauren Boebert encountered a large group of Jewish tourists that included Rabbis and Orthodox Jews with traditional beards and yarmulkes. She came up to the group and asked them if they were "doing reconnaissance."
This behavior isn't new. Boebert and her allies thrive on spreading hate and conspiracies especially about Jews. Take for instance the conspiracy propagated by Boebert co-conspirator Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene that "Jewish space lasers" were causing wildfires across America.
Accusing Jews of conducting recon tours and spying on the Capitol is par for the course for Boebert. In her five years on Capitol hill, her callous hate fueled speech has alienated Palestinians, Jews, Muslims, the disabled, Ranchers, the list goes on and on. This behavior caught up to her and forced to her to flee old district where her constituents had turned against her. Now, the constituents in her new district are turning on her too, she is more vulnerable than ever and Democrat Trisha Calvarese can beat her.
[If there was ever an election to beat her, it is this one. Can we count on you to make a donation of $25, $15, or even $5 to help Team Trisha remove Boebert once and for all?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j9skJ5GIWKQU1sb9fb6v00NuwZggo7Q52RZU5AWVccsfeJy-8QjbOhg-3xMHkFbZ1ddvad-svdboMRsIE_MfRBE5UAGrixfFMtL14ntfWd21pw-sIgbRAzNF2RxkplAT4p-zLuN1Y9F3-vR9FtbJ3KdKXabYk4ceFXOhpZRSwecT19zVH-h6FuYR-NJvR169lU9bciBP5XlNcBRIiRmAADke-DxZtchbUSjdt9qeiio=&c=bvCJIu0OsqQB9-DNyhHDH-dUUyaQf79Zyho3FLbIW_jBWFn4pH1tbQ==&ch=Zwzd2tZYGqBPyiva3H8Dksqz97WzPGHUJTGpZ5ANx2X3l9yCX9lhxg==)

clean_body: If you see this, send Cheez Whiz 🆘 | | | | | | | | Friend, Team Burchett is still buzzing like a bunch of elves on Christmas Eve. Tim’s 15-minute Christmas party was another one for the books. Every year we swear it can’t get any better, and every year Tim finds a way to outdo himself. The line to get in was long, the Mountain Dew kept flowing—and there was plenty of PB&J; to keep the vibes going strong. Plus, singer/songwriter Gary Chapman was there to sing “Tennessee Christmas,” and yes, the boss man shed a tear or two during that musical snack. Only one little problem: Senator John Fetterman totally for being stingy with the Cheez Whiz. He’s a fiscally responsible conservative, can you blame him!? But maybe you can help us out. 15 minutes with Tim Burchett is all you need for the most epic Christmas party in Washington—and that’s a fact. We wish you a very merry Carthartt Christmas! Hi friend, I have a small favor to ask you: can you chip in $1 to this campaign? [**I know a dollar might not feel like much, but in a race as close as ours, it truly makes a difference. MI-08 is one of the most competitive districts in the country – and every person who steps up helps us build the grassroots strength we need to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121198603/588683371/-185804085?refcode=em-12.13.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ3ZDg2YS0zNGQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNWmOy_-dHXZNRRfsxKf-vJmBoezp-5GyFEhlUK7EJo=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121198607/588683380/-185804085?refcode=em-12.13.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ3ZDg2YS0zNGQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNWmOy_-dHXZNRRfsxKf-vJmBoezp-5GyFEhlUK7EJo=)

Just last month, the _Cook Political Report_ named MI-08 the “tipping point” district – meaning this seat could decide whether Democrats take back the House.
National Republicans know it, too. That’s why they’ve already spent more than $1 million on attack ads trying to weaken our campaign before we even make it to the new year.
Look, I know that when we’re up against that kind of spending, it might not seem like a small donation can make a difference. But the truth is: it does. Every contribution adds up – and it sends a powerful message about the grassroots strength and momentum driving this campaign.
Your support will help us stay competitive, reach more voters, and push back on the attacks flooding our district. And with our final FEC deadline of the year coming up, every contribution right now helps us show we’re ready for the fight ahead.
[**So friend, if you can, will you chip in $1 today? It would mean a lot — and it will make a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121198613/588683418/-185804085?refcode=em-12.13.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ3ZDg2YS0zNGQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNWmOy_-dHXZNRRfsxKf-vJmBoezp-5GyFEhlUK7EJo=)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision

body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. | Hey, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do. **[I’m asking you to split a donation between the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121199351/588685724/-797884224?refcode=em-12.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ3ZDg2YS0zNGQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U_HKPg4nn0OVEFDuC0DI5cjk4L7lGAYasXbu8MbOzoU=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mark Kelly and DASS will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121199352/588685752/-797884224?refcode=em-12.12.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ3ZDg2YS0zNGQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U_HKPg4nn0OVEFDuC0DI5cjk4L7lGAYasXbu8MbOzoU=)**

It’s been a big year.

In the Senate, we’ve delivered President Trump’s agenda, cut your taxes, and secured our border.

**I’ve officially filed to run for re-election and I’m proud to be endorsed by President Trump, Governor Sarah Sanders, and conservative leaders across the country. **

We’re in for a fight come 2026.

**Democrats have their eyes on Arkansas. **

They’re running the same playbook they always do: _Pick a far-left fraud and send their campaign millions to dupe voters about their record. _

clean_body: grassroots support is critical| | | It’s been a big year. In the Senate, we’ve delivered President Trump’s agenda, cut your taxes, and secured our border. I’ve officially filed to run for re-election and I’m proud to be endorsed by President Trump, Governor Sarah Sanders, and conservative leaders across the country. We’re in for a fight come 2026. Democrats have their eyes on Arkansas. They’re running the same playbook they always do: Pick a far-left fraud and send their campaign millions to dupe voters about their record. There’s no path to keeping the Senate Majority without keeping Arkansas red. So that’s why it’s so important we earn as many grassroots endorsements as we can, before the attack ads even get started. Thank you for standing with me before in defense of our conservative values and the fight to make America strong again. In service, Tom Cotton | | Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any Service Branch. name: Dylan
subject: We can't organize without you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter!
I hope you’re doing well! My name is Dylan, and I am Rep. Morrison’s Campaign Coordinator for the 2026 election cycle. It is great to connect!
As Kelly mentioned in her email earlier this week, our team set a goal of raising $50,000 to kick start our 2026 organizing goals. While we know this is ambitious, this grassroots team has already made a dent in our goal - we cannot thank you enough!
I also wanted to take a moment to give you a glimpse into our budget so you can better understand why it is so important that we are able to meet our goal and head into 2026 strong:
* As you may remember from Kelly’s previous campaigns, we have an incredible team of paid interns each cycle! From summer through fall, they knock on doors, host events, engage with neighbors, and spread the word about Kelly’s campaign and Democrats up and down the ballot in MN-03. This year, we’re taking that impact even further by partnering with flippable House seats across the Midwest. We are planning to send our interns to knock doors, make phone calls, and help get out the vote to win back the U.S. House of Representatives in November.
* We know that in order to win, we must be organizing everywhere, all of the time. And when we can’t have in person conversations, we need to leave the voter with clear, concise, and appealing information on Kelly. From campaign literature to leave at doors, to mailers to send to thousands of people across MN-03, to a prospectus about Kelly to bring to events – the cost of printing adds up!
* While we are currently a small but mighty team, our campaign will continue to grow. The busier the year gets, the more staff we will be looking to hire.
I can’t wait to get back out there and be on the doors with our incredible team of interns and grassroots volunteers. I have had so many conversations across the district this year, and it has never been more clear that MN-03 is fired up to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. I don’t need to remind you that MN-03 was in Republican hands for almost 60 years – until the district turned blue in 2018 because of supporters like you!
Now through the end of the year, our entire team is focused on fundraising to meet our organizing goals and ensure we are in a strong position to hold our seat and uplift Democrats everywhere in 2026.
Peter, could you chip in any amount today to help us meet our goals? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=10] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=50] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
Thank you so much for your support, Peter! I look forward to working with you this year!
Best,
Dylan Nilsson
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=jmgvaG621Dmfs4%2B0kImLWhPbP2r%2FCyZznLMBuqzAq%2FPb5%2B6GEXQM2r2%2BXg7hKNwwNrNLW4ztw52nRF%2ByQ9FZZquHV7rg96oWHm2QNm9yQuxuJg%2BmDp0NCJBGU9x5epFfZMpDePIKud30QOFIfL%2BF265MTe05zsB2tu89%2BSct5x8cav157xxypBuwPBw4RZyuHQWwad%2FvslF%2FaUp7GCJ8JkLaJneNVn2uf6SOp0LBlBPKuBoC88BDjsewitwE9fdlJyS8DqzrWf0EzNHxCuv2uCsqJ0p8IHQVqvWj9ngjEXw0lD6dnEHL7Q8f7f1ofHi%2F6uEPqbOVgJn%2Bh%2FaWKeL9QiBKIc%2FNEGw3pPEtJP06BsG8mErZ7S6F7BrV3%2FucBEJlO3vmrcM9ZXmlJhxGrCWCiZfflXndCKHKm5TuwkJqZrC1hWwHN8A7F42wDEF9LnI%2F] .
Morrison for Congress
PO Box 684
Wayzata, MN 55391
United States
Paid for by Morrison for Congress

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7e9276e4e3044f7d991aeacdd871620e&_e=l6GKZWgUGgj3LN0bZMLOeec5b180h25oDBGk4BAwdNxlpJerLFB5GKBT6MIgJeKUjrKIC7xEzSvr8UivJKE9-bpC7Qq6PTD73NN4sOCmXeZFd4Plgwk_ubEjg4RrnihUJ5O-XBSInHRnpQXky182HAyg6b2_Cko4DJGS2-8BLGnnicFZd_gtBTtnzuy5lRMQSUWdUx6RLSdId4tEqSF05jZhKjd8Syh2Jny44Mq9uLLigCEXhjvV-Soju32_KDMPLaX_k0JuU6YOQA8bqAm0pxFFh1ejksdQJm9B4vWxTKRiZDXLYbOpBP4IvWACdBPsV9bDqTCN4SLbwGvX2s6az4hPK84kG4N9DTU_gUjCQDpHCEINNmxmTd3fbv9AVvEBzK35XxeHM3cBh_A67_7a4Nt1dOEFTPIvErYgu1GJdtbKf-BxMhs5Plu9Ly-usTj4erojflkVor_Sv-0WcqyjpX-TpBOx2941tGLvorl_5HwYqfo9s6oABUeo3dOF4LE_XQTs3_bf0zSNudw_b-Bp76TYr1haypnLFQvPSLL_l9slbZC83le_N9D741SZmzKhMFOHuJ8M4Uh22ZIOIXVNmdSXWuDSgBPYIfSaaO97cMu92GClm8NxPQuYOHn2GeMg4EFxdkZzCHfXrMXhdjMsi4kc-ZpInGAaAS3_r0QPaB8yjkAxkgJFLL9gOoUmP19oChKQQ_f1oIKD1UnozhOl1Nn1pkC7QgJ65L5WhscFHopz1yaxpFVmcB5W4fcbU4lqMhUI24ypCAnGY5G4P4vw4g%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I'm proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn't a "gimme." We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That's because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who'd smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

**Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, _**but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority.**_

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Fellow American, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I'm proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn't a "gimme." We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That's because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who'd smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines - the Republican Senate Majority Maker! - booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve's radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she's been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader's chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They'd love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

body:
Yes, this is about Taylor Swift.
Today is Taylor Swift’s birthday, and as a day one Swiftie, I’m thinking about the songs that were the soundtrack of my year. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121203366/588694486/-510661250?amount=13&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.13_Taylors-Birthday_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmZmM2M5Yi0zOGQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gnwlPAqvyC68lFXmpWUQqgUonkzVov52JOMy2cNO_Y=) From _Look What You Made Me Do_ to _The Smallest Man Who Ever Lived_ to _Shake It Off_ , Taylor’s songs deeply resonate. Her music reminds me to be _Fearless_ , to _Speak Now_ before the GOP rips away all of our fundamental rights and to stay focused on defeating the MAGA majority in 2026. These songs have gotten me through long nights in the Senate, countless Amtrak rides and flights home to see my family and the many challenging moments we’ve faced this year under the GOP’s reckless leadership. _Long Story Short_ , I’m coming up on my massive public fundraising deadline at the end of the month — _our most important deadline of the cycle so far_ — and I’m asking for your help as directly as I can: **[_In honor of Taylor’s birthday today, will you give $13 or more to flip the Senate in 2026 and meet our $100,000 public fundraising goal? clean_body: Yes, this is about Taylor Swift. Today is Taylor Swift’s birthday, and as a day one Swiftie, I’m thinking about the songs that were the soundtrack of my year. = From Look What You Made Me Do to The Smallest Man Who Ever Lived to Shake It Off , Taylor’s songs deeply resonate. Her music reminds me to be Fearless , to Speak Now before the GOP rips away all of our fundamental rights and to stay focused on defeating the MAGA majority in 2026. These songs have gotten me through long nights in the Senate, countless Amtrak rides and flights home to see my family and the many challenging moments we’ve faced this year under the GOP’s reckless leadership. Long Story Short , I’m coming up on my massive public fundraising deadline at the end of the month — our most important deadline of the cycle so far — and I’m asking for your help as directly as I can: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = — Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

|

If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress.

All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.

If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Derek.

I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.

There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.

If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.

And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:

name: Tech Billionaire Takeover via Our Revolution
subject: Palantir vs. All of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Billionaire venture capitalist and co-founder of Palantir Joe Lonsdale
just publicly called for bringing back public executions in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34856?source=email-20251213&t=1011&akid=9969%2E5885482%2EjCNfj7 ]Headline: Billionaire Palantir co-founder pushes return of public
hangings as part of 'masculine leadership' initiative

You read that right. A Big Tech oligarch is throwing his weight around in
a push to revive public hangings, insisting the U.S. needs more "masculine
leadership." And Palantir isn’t some run-of-the-mill tech firm – it’s
Peter Thiel’s surveillance behemoth, intricately tied to Donald Trump’s
inner circle through senators like JD Vance and right-wing operatives like
David Sacks – Trump’s AI czar now openly targeting immigrants, workers,
and activists with tools built using OUR tax dollars.

We CANNOT let our public money continue to fund this terror. And Congress
can stop it. But only if enough of us speak out and build a wave of
pressure they can’t ignore heading into an election year.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34856?source=email-20251213&t=1012&akid=9969%2E5885482%2EjCNfj7 ]Will you add your name to call on Congress right now to cut Palantir’s
contracts and put a stop to Big Tech’s dystopian dreams?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34856?source=email-20251213&t=1013&akid=9969%2E5885482%2EjCNfj7 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Palantir is raking in BILLIONS in federal contracts – powering ICE raids
on immigrant families, surveillance of peaceful protesters, and
algorithmic targeting of union organizers. They're building a national
dragnet, funded by us, designed to watch *all* of us, while their founder
dreams of reintroducing executions in the public square.

In recent years, Palantir’s software has been deployed to identify,
detain, and deport migrant parents. In Los Angeles, LAPD and ICE used
Palantir’s “Gotham” system to surveil Black Lives Matter organizers. If
you’re a worker organizing for rights, a parent fighting for immigrant
dignity, or an activist in the streets, Palantir has its eye on you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34856?source=email-20251213&t=1014&akid=9969%2E5885482%2EjCNfj7 ]Headline: ' Palantir poses a grave threat to Americans', says former
U.S. Secretary of Labor

Meanwhile, Big Tech oligarchs stretch deep into the halls of power –
writing policy, building the databases, and cashing the checks.

That’s why Our Revolution staged protests at Palantir offices across the
country this year, and this is why our Community Action Teams are gearing
up for something even bigger in 2026 (stay tuned for a MAJOR announcement
in the New Year!!).

But right now, Congress has a simple choice: continue subsidizing a
surveillance state run by billionaire extremists – or stand with people
everywhere fighting for freedom, justice, and democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34856?source=email-20251213&t=1015&akid=9969%2E5885482%2EjCNfj7 ]Can you add your name to demand Congress cut Palantir’s contracts and
defund the oligarchy? Every signature builds pressure and fuels our
momentum.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34856?source=email-20251213&t=1016&akid=9969%2E5885482%2EjCNfj7 ]ADD YOUR NAME

We CANNOT let our democracy be held hostage by tech barons dreaming of
public executions. With your action, let’s put a check on their dangerous
agenda – before it’s too late.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive

establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring

name: Marc Elias
subject: Two really important things.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, it's Marc Elias.

I'll get right to the point: [**This is a request for a donation of $5 to the DSCC ahead of their mid-month deadline.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251213-MarcElias-EliasDeadlineFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251213-MarcElias-EliasDeadlineFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21858%2E9716520%2ELTPDze)

But please, **let me explain why this moment is so important.**

I've gone to court dozens of times to stop Donald Trump's lawlessness, and I'm proud to say that I've beaten him 64 times. That tells you two really important things:

**FIRST, Donald Trump and his MAGA minions _don't quit_.** If we don't want their extreme agenda, we'll have to stand up and stop them. And stop them again. And _again._ **Every single time.**

**SECOND, the GOP is _beatable._** We just have to put the work in -- and that includes at the ballot box.

That brings me to today. The DSCC is working to lay the groundwork for a MASSIVE blue wave in the midterms, and to get us in tip-top shape, they've set a $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal.

**But as of now, we're on track to _fall short_ of that mark -- and unless we play catch-up immediately, we could be handing victory right back to the GOP.**

[**So now's the time to show up, because that's how we win -- take it from someone who's done this before. So please, before the mid-month deadline, will you chip in $5 or more to beat Republicans and elect Democrats who will stand up for our rights? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251213-MarcElias-EliasDeadlineFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251213-MarcElias-EliasDeadlineFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21858%2E9716520%2ELTPDze)

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | | Hi there, it's Marc Elias. I'll get right to the point: But please, let me explain why this moment is so important. I've gone to court dozens of times to stop Donald Trump's lawlessness, and I'm proud to say that I've beaten him 64 times. That tells you two really important things: FIRST, Donald Trump and his MAGA minions don't quit. If we don't want their extreme agenda, we'll have to stand up and stop them. And stop them again. And again. Every single time. SECOND, the GOP is beatable. We just have to put the work in -- and that includes at the ballot box. That brings me to today. The DSCC is working to lay the groundwork for a MASSIVE blue wave in the midterms, and to get us in tip-top shape, they've set a $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal. But as of now, we're on track to fall short of that mark -- and unless we play catch-up immediately, we could be handing victory right back to the GOP. We need your help to fight for the Senate. name: Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: #1 on my to-do list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[1]Angela Alsobrooks

Americans can only live happy, productive, safe lives if they take care of
their health. And they can only take care of their health if they have
affordable health care.

That’s why affordable health care isn’t just AN issue,
Peter; it’s THE issue. I made it a
centerpiece of my campaign for Senate, and it’s been a major priority
during my first year in office.

All the while, Republicans have been working just as hard to take your
health care away.

They’re preparing to raise health care premiums for millions and millions
of Americans, just after they forced several more million off of Medicaid.

I’m pushing back, and I hope you’ll join me. My team and I put together
this urgent petition to show that a) we have the numbers on our side, and
b) that our commitment to affordable health care is unshakeable.
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/survey/EM_BS_AAL_251213_EN_HealthCareSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=1006&akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz ]Please, for the sake of a healthier future, will you add your name
today?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/survey/EM_BS_AAL_251213_EN_HealthCareSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=1007&akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz ]I’m All In for Affordable Health Care →

Fortunately, the state of Maryland is gearing up to provide relief for
working families. But many Americans will either be forced to cough up
two, three, or four times more for health insurance, or lose their
coverage altogether.

Peter, health care
is at the very top of my to-do list at this moment. I will vote to
continue federal health care funding because it’s not only the RIGHT thing
to do, it’s the SMART thing to do.

But if Republicans refuse to fix this crisis, (and it seems likely they
will), then I need to know you won’t give up the fight.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/survey/EM_BS_AAL_251213_EN_HealthCareSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=1008&akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz ]The more names, the stronger our position, so please consider adding
your name to my petition right away!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/survey/EM_BS_AAL_251213_EN_HealthCareSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=1009&akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz ]I’m All In for Affordable Health Care →

In solidarity,

Angela Alsobrooks

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz ][IMG]

An important update from Team Alsobrooks:

Angela is so thankful for this grassroots team’s support and is eager to
get to work for Marylanders in the Senate. That’s why you’ll be receiving
fewer fundraising emails from us moving forward, in an effort to not clog
up your inbox for the next six years.

Instead, we’d rather send you emails you want to read – like updates on
Angela’s work in the Senate, or rundowns of key issues and news stories
from Washington.

But to make this possible, we’re relying on supporters like you to
consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution of $3 or even $5
to keep our operations running while Angela is busy fighting for Maryland
families.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/33703?t=1002&akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz ]Make a recurring contribution to Angela Alsobrooks' campaign here.
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz ]click here.
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4693?t=1004&akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz ]Chip in a one-time donation
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4694?t=1005&akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation!

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3417%2E52803%2Ez22zGz

Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792

name: Roy Cooper
subject: An investment now can go even further.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Is there any amount you can give?
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251213-9828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9828%2E614464%2EnXET6U)
Peter, I know better than anyone how difficult it is to win as a Democrat in North Carolina, and how hard we’ll have to work to succeed in this toss-up U.S. Senate race.
I also know that _early investment goes further._ That’s one rule of campaigning that never seems to change.
**With my opponent gaining in the polls, it’s more important than ever that we can stay competitive.** The earlier funds come in, the earlier we can plan our campaign expenses for the months ahead. That makes our efforts all the more effective, so I’m asking for your help today, so please don’t put it off.
**[Any contribution you could split between our campaign and State Democrats Committee would go a long way to meeting our fundraising goal. Just click here to give.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251213-9828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9828%2E614464%2EnXET6U)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98480?refcode=em20251213-9828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9828%2E614464%2EnXET6U) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98480?refcode=em20251213-9828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9828%2E614464%2EnXET6U) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251213-9828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9828%2E614464%2EnXET6U)
---
It’s no secret that national Republicans see me as the greatest threat to their control in Washington, plus that GOP lawmakers in Raleigh have taken steps to make it harder for Democrats to win here.
We can overcome far-right radicalism. We’ve done it before. And to secure this nation’s future, we have to do it again. But every day and every single cent will count in an election this competitive.
Right now, my MAGA opponent is attracting major investment from far-right donors. Experts even think this could become the first Senate race in history to cost more than a _billion_ dollars. We have to increase our grassroots fundraising efforts to stay competitive, and the earlier your donation comes in, the more effectively we can put it to use.
**[Winning this toss-up race won’t be easy, but I know that we can do it — especially if we’re able to make the most of these early days. If you’re able to split a contribution between our campaign and State Democrats Committee, I would deeply appreciate it. Any amount will help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251213-9828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9828%2E614464%2EnXET6U)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98480?refcode=em20251213-9828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=7&akid=9828%2E614464%2EnXET6U) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98480?refcode=em20251213-9828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=8&akid=9828%2E614464%2EnXET6U) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251213-9828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9828%2E614464%2EnXET6U)
---
Thank you,
Roy Cooper

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A fundamentally important deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
On New Years Eve we will hit our final, official FEC deadline of 2025. After that, we’re legally required to report how many donations we’ve received, how many people chipped in, and how much we’ve raised.
#

Team,
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign before Monday, the 15th — the halfway point to our final FEC deadline of the year.
Please, let me explain why that deadline and your donation are so important.
We know the report Hegseth demanded on whether he could court-martial me was delivered to the Pentagon on Wednesday. We’ve seen it reported that it is under review, but we haven’t heard any real update beyond that.
There are a number of potential outcomes here, and at the top of the list is a court-martial.
But this was never about me, or about what I said in that video. It’s part of a broader pattern we have seen throughout the year — a concerted effort from Donald Trump to stomp out and shut up any and all opposition to his pursuit of power.
They think they can make an example out of me and use that to scare others into silence and obedience.
That’s just not going to happen, and that is why I am writing to you now with this request. On New Year's Eve, we will hit our final, official FEC deadline of 2025. After that, we’re legally required to report how many donations we’ve received, how many people chipped in, and how much we’ve raised.
When that report hits, we will show everyone from Trump on down the true strength of this movement.
[**If you want to send a loud message to Trump, please make a donation. The amount really isn’t as important as the donation itself, because we need Trump to know that thousands and thousands of people are unafraid.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251213-1-1mil&t=1&akid=6292%2E6688874%2EX2tad2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.F_hIMP&refcode=em251213-1-1mil&t=20&akid=6292%2E6688874%2EX2tad2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.x-uxze&refcode=em251213-1-1mil&t=21&akid=6292%2E6688874%2EX2tad2)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.RiF5s9&refcode=em251213-1-1mil&t=22&akid=6292%2E6688874%2EX2tad2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.CJLCi0&refcode=em251213-1-1mil&t=23&akid=6292%2E6688874%2EX2tad2)**

| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.-YNXpy&refcode=em251213-1-1mil&t=24&akid=6292%2E6688874%2EX2tad2)**

Thank you for everything,
Mark

Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
