Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: America's National Addiction
body:
Have you noticed how nearly every demographic in America has ONE thing in common... EVERYONE IS OFFENDED. Republicans are offended. Gays are offended
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13773.1.00554c342845add8c45dba4beb741261) |
---
Have you noticed how nearly every demographic in America has ONE thing in common... **EVERYONE IS OFFENDED**. **Republicans** are offended. **Gays** are offended. **Christians** are offended. **Illegal Immigrants** are offended. **Young Men** are offended. **Atheists** are offended. **Women** are offended. LITERALLY EVERYONE IS OFFENDED. Tomorrow, at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13774.1.aad972be1bde75ba18799fb5d24584f1) we will take a deep dive in the subject matter about the _moment offense_ and the _continual decision to be offended_. We are continuing our series over the **Gospel of Matthew** and we will look at **Matthew 5:21-24** at our Tulsa campus at 10am CT. I will also be preaching out of **Genesis 13** in OKC at 2pm CT. I look forward to seeing you tomorrow! Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/the Mission of Sheridan.Churcb ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13775.1.0732d9bd4adbd6b5319ff6bb285eea8a)
---
---

Join me this WKND for more powerful services!
**Tulsa** | 10am CT | Matthew 5:21-24
**OKC** | 2pm CT - Genesis 13
**Online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13778.1.f4863d1e974c67ba56d423309728799d)

Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13779.1.9d438d8e4780cc09ca64a74e8429f310) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13780.1.eafc15bc7e63a541adfc94f94d665c15)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13781.1.d281f04da8653029e767ad117c8790c6)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13782.1.b0fd6e604b013fc499cdfd371e9d7d32). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13783.1.0d008138f330c440144699aafa3c8685) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13784.1.62ca66ccc728e9f87d83808b6290da71) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26765928.13785.1.be430cffc2cbb2d7299ba93ca5e97814) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

Hi friend, We wanted to make sure you caught Jane’s invitation to her 88th birthday celebration on December 17th! We’re gathering some of her dearest friends and favorite co-conspirators for a virtual roast-and-toast honoring her legacy, complete with stories, laughs, and the kind of joyful chaos Jane inspires wherever she shows up. **And the best part?[Every dollar from this event goes directly toward JanePAC’s work to flip the House of Representatives in 2026. Don’t miss out. Read Jane’s message below and click here to reserve your ticket.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121209612/588713654/1820297183?refcode=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNDM5YTczLTNmZDgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t8enzT_pkcF6aMTYsXJTnxEXJUBq5i5POOWJl4EQHVg=)** | [**🎟️ Reserve your ticket →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121209613/588713655/1820297183?refcode=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNDM5YTczLTNmZDgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t8enzT_pkcF6aMTYsXJTnxEXJUBq5i5POOWJl4EQHVg=)

We hope to see you there,
– Team JanePAC
P.S. If you’ve already grabbed your ticket, thank you so much. Our records can take a bit to update, so please feel free to ignore this email. We can’t wait to see you next week!
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
I'm turning 88 this month, and my team has decided that instead of letting me celebrate quietly (which, let's be honest, was never going to happen), they're throwing me a proper roast.
**[On December 17th, some of my dearest friends are gathering virtually to roast and toast me — which means embarrassing stories, heartfelt moments, and reflections on a lifetime of raising hell for what's right. And I want YOU to be there.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121209614/588713656/1820297183?refcode=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNDM5YTczLTNmZDgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t8enzT_pkcF6aMTYsXJTnxEXJUBq5i5POOWJl4EQHVg=)**

[**🎟️ Reserve your ticket now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121209616/588713658/1820297183?refcode=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNDM5YTczLTNmZDgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t8enzT_pkcF6aMTYsXJTnxEXJUBq5i5POOWJl4EQHVg=)

At 88, you start to realize that what matters isn't how many candles are on the cake — it's what you do with the time you have left.
And what I want to dedicate my final act to is living life with intention. To electing climate champions who will fight like hell for our planet. To proving that ordinary people, standing together, can outmatch the fossil fuel industry’s billions. I want to look back on my 88th year knowing that we fought for one another, for the planet we love, and for every generation that will inherit what we do next.
**That's why every ticket to this event goes directly toward JanePAC's work to flip the House of Representatives on November 3, 2026, because my birthday wish is simple: send climate champions to Congress and send Republicans into a spiral.**
Oh, and did I mention? All ticket holders will receive the recipe for one of my favorite holiday cocktails (or mocktails, if that's more your style). You'll want something festive to toast with!
**[So don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity! RSVP today to join us virtually on December 17th at 5:00PM PT/ 8:00PM ET.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121209617/588713659/1820297183?refcode=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.7a439a73-3fd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNDM5YTczLTNmZDgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t8enzT_pkcF6aMTYsXJTnxEXJUBq5i5POOWJl4EQHVg=)**

clean_body: Did you get Jane’s invitation? | Hi friend, We wanted to make sure you caught Jane’s invitation to her 88th birthday celebration on December 17th! We’re gathering some of her dearest friends and favorite co-conspirators for a virtual roast-and-toast honoring her legacy, complete with stories, laughs, and the kind of joyful chaos Jane inspires wherever she shows up. And the best part?= | = We hope to see you there, – Team JanePAC P.S. If you’ve already grabbed your ticket, thank you so much. Our records can take a bit to update, so please feel free to ignore this email. We can’t wait to see you next week! \---------- Forwarded message --------- I'm turning 88 this month, and my team has decided that instead of letting me celebrate quietly (which, let's be honest, was never going to happen), they're throwing me a proper roast. = = = At 88, you start to realize that what matters isn't how many candles are on the cake — it's what you do with the time you have left. And what I want to dedicate my final act to is living life with intention. To electing climate champions who will fight like hell for our planet. To proving that ordinary people, standing together, can outmatch the fossil fuel industry’s billions. I want to look back on my 88th year knowing that we fought for one another, for the planet we love, and for every generation that will inherit what we do next. That's why every ticket to this event goes directly toward JanePAC's work to flip the House of Representatives on November 3, 2026, because my birthday wish is simple: send climate champions to Congress and send Republicans into a spiral. Oh, and did I mention? All ticket holders will receive the recipe for one of my favorite holiday cocktails (or mocktails, if that's more your style). You'll want something festive to toast with! = = I hope to see you there! xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: [Split a donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and me. name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: What they're saying about our trip to Beacon Hill.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
We're getting the word out!

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

This week, I led a New Hampshire delegation straight into Massachusetts to deliver a simple message. **New Hampshire works. Massachusetts does not.** We stood in Boston and talked about taxes, regulation, and why employers and families are voting with their feet. Within hours, the press took notice.
---
| [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/1/0100019b188a5179-28dc421c-c4ca-4a8a-9864-0db7ff0dd237-000000/WZrsRAZwxmUyjw-omTGGChhZNx8=456)
---
Axios Boston. Boston.com. NBC Boston. NH Journal. Regional outlets across New England. **They all covered the same reality. New Hampshire’s low taxes, reduced regulation, and pro-growth approach are winning. Salem is winning. New Hampshire is winning.** Massachusetts leaders tried to brush it off. That only made the point stronger. When major employers like Analogic and SynQor move their headquarters to New Hampshire, that is not luck. That is policy. That is leadership. That is the result of Republicans refusing to copy Massachusetts-style government. I am proud to be making this case as both a Salem Town Councilor and as Deputy Majority Leader in the New Hampshire House. I am even prouder that the message is landing far beyond our state’s borders. [_But here is the truth._ **The other side has money. Bureaucrats, unions, and special interests are happy with high taxes and heavy regulation. They will spend whatever it takes to stop New Hampshire from continuing to prove them wrong.**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/2/0100019b188a5179-28dc421c-c4ca-4a8a-9864-0db7ff0dd237-000000/UMH_B9ukWHECcSkBzhc-9omTduc=456) If we want to keep winning, we have to fight. [If you believe New Hampshire should stay New Hampshire, I am asking you to contribute today.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/3/0100019b188a5179-28dc421c-c4ca-4a8a-9864-0db7ff0dd237-000000/8klbvkR2FVazZvp-UMb9lf6mmBk=456) Your support helps us take this message statewide, protect our pro-growth policies, and keep New Hampshire the best place in the Northeast to live, work, and build a business. [Let’s keep driving the narrative. Let’s keep winning.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/4/0100019b188a5179-28dc421c-c4ca-4a8a-9864-0db7ff0dd237-000000/0CLfgpxHMnTEazMZLzb3n2Hm6Bk=456) Thank you for standing with me.
Sincerely,
Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions
---

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: If you can’t afford to chip in today, we totally understand.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey there, Peter.
[**We’re reaching out once again to ask if you’ll chip in to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251213-1-full-a&t=1&akid=1268%2E5691347%2EeHynCA)
If you can’t afford a contribution, we totally understand. We hope you’ll just archive this email and remember that your vote and your involvement are critical too.
But if you’re able to make a donation today to Jon’s campaign, we hope you’ll keep reading and hear us out:
Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Donald Trump won last year. That makes him MAGA’s top target in the midterms.
The GOP has already spent over $10 million in this race and they’ll spend hundreds of millions more by Election Day because they know they have a good shot at retaking this seat.
With the Senate majority and our most vital freedoms on the line in November we cannot afford to fall short.
That’s why we’re ramping up our campaign right now by hiring more staff and talking to voters. But in order to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen, we need to make a historic — _and early_ — investment in this race.
[**That’s why we’re asking: If you’re able, can you please chip in any amount to Jon Ossoff’s campaign today. Even $5 goes a long way in fueling our efforts.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251213-1-full-a&t=2&akid=1268%2E5691347%2EeHynCA)

name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: $1 vs. Corporate PAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1427%2E251025%2Eb742FM ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1427%2E251025%2Eb742FM ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

AIPAC and corporate PACs have chosen their preferred candidate in this
race, and it’s not Abdul.

That’s because Abdul stands for something they can’t control: Ending
corporate greed, empowering working people, passing Medicare for All, and
refusing to let our tax dollars fund genocide overseas.

Our campaign fights for what the people want and deserve.

AIPAC and corporate PACs know if Abdul wins, it’ll prove that grassroots
movements can beat billionaire-funded politics.

That’s why every single donation matters, even [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/547?c0=em-ms-aes-20251213-1-ak.p9JOip&refcode=em20251213-1423&t=1004&akid=1427%2E251025%2Eb742FM ]$1.

Because when someone pitches in $1, another follows. Then another.

Together, those small acts of solidarity become something powerful — a
campaign fueled by working people, fighting for working people.

Every $1 helps us:

* Keep Abdul on the road, meeting Michiganders face-to-face.
* Share our message on college campuses, online, and over the air.
* Defeat our corporate PAC and AIPAC-backed primary opponent.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/547?c0=em-ms-aes-20251213-1-ak.p9JOip&refcode=em20251213-1423&t=1005&akid=1427%2E251025%2Eb742FM ]If you believe in a government that answers to people, not
corporations, chip in $1 or whatever you can today.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/547?c0=em-ms-aes-20251213-1-ak.p9JOip&refcode=em20251213-1423&t=1024&akid=1427%2E251025%2Eb742FM ]Donate $1 ››

Thank you,

Team Abdul

Every $1 helps us: Keep Abdul on the road, meeting Michiganders face-to-face. Share our message on college campuses, online, and over the air. * Defeat our corporate PAC and AIPAC-backed primary opponent. [ ]If you believe in a government that answers to people, not corporations, chip in $1 or whatever you can today. [ ]Donate $1 ›› Thank you, Team Abdul

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Quick morning update
body:
This is why I have to ask.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH)
[Peter, I’m going to have to ask for your help this morning, and I want to quickly explain why:](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2622?t=7&akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH) 👉 Right-wing PACs have already started spending hundreds of thousands of dollars trying to buy this U.S. Senate seat for the GOP 👉 My opponent and I are locked in a toss-up race, and polling suggests that Michael Whatley has room to gain ground and pull ahead 👉 We set a huge online fundraising goal of $1 million this month, ahead of our final filing deadline before the election year begins — we’d like to hit the halfway mark by Monday to stay on track **[We can’t take on my opponent and his mega-donor allies without committed supporters who step up to invest in our campaign. If you can donate before Monday, it would go a long way.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2622?t=8&akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH)** | **[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2622?t=9&akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH)**
---
We couldn’t do this without you,
Roy
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2622?t=10&akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH)

[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=159%2E124072%2EdiBndH)

Peter, There is so much more Congress should be doing to improve people’s lives. Congress _could_ be taking real action to bring down everyday costs and ease the financial burden on working families. Congress _could_ be standing firm to safeguard Social Security, nutrition programs, and the basic supports millions of Americans rely on. And Congress _could_ be tackling the big challenges we face: investing in infrastructure, strengthening our democracy, and ensuring that government actually works for the people instead of special interests. Instead, this Republican majority has shown they are more beholden to Donald Trump than to the people they were elected to serve. **It’s time for a new majority that actually cares about making life better for the American people.** Valerie Foushee serves in Congress to fight for North Carolina every single day. From working to bring more good-paying jobs to our region, to securing resources for local schools, healthcare, and infrastructure, Valerie is dedicated to making sure _every_ voice in her district is heard loud and clear in Washington. Keeping this seat blue and flipping critical seats nationwide puts us on the pathway to a Democratic House majority that will stand up _to_ Trump and stand up _for_ the American people. So today, given the enormous stakes of next year’s midterms and our upcoming primary, we’re asking for your support. **[Please, can you donate $4 or more to Valerie before midnight? clean_body: There is so much more Congress should be doing to improve people’s lives. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, There is so much more Congress should be doing to improve people’s lives. Congress could be taking real action to bring down everyday costs and ease the financial burden on working families. Congress could be standing firm to safeguard Social Security, nutrition programs, and the basic supports millions of Americans rely on. And Congress could be tackling the big challenges we face: investing in infrastructure, strengthening our democracy, and ensuring that government actually works for the people instead of special interests. Instead, this Republican majority has shown they are more beholden to Donald Trump than to the people they were elected to serve. It’s time for a new majority that actually cares about making life better for the American people. Valerie Foushee serves in Congress to fight for North Carolina every single day. From working to bring more good-paying jobs to our region, to securing resources for local schools, healthcare, and infrastructure, Valerie is dedicated to making sure every voice in her district is heard loud and clear in Washington. Keeping this seat blue and flipping critical seats nationwide puts us on the pathway to a Democratic House majority that will stand up to Trump and stand up for the American people. So today, given the enormous stakes of next year’s midterms and our upcoming primary, we’re asking for your support. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: Aria, United We Dream
subject: The most dangerous moment in DACA’s 13-year history
body:
Your support makes our advocacy for DACA recipients possible. | | | Peter, In case you missed the news, **the Dream Act is BACK in Congress**! Earlier this month, Senators Dick Durbin and Lisa Murkowski reintroduced the bipartisan Dream Act — a bill that would give a pathway to citizenship to immigrants who have lived in the U.S. for most of their lives, contributing to our communities, economy, and workforce. **DACA recipients are Americans in every way except on paper.** We’re committed to fighting for congressional action to protect the millions of lives and families who are currently at risk. **[You can help us by pitching in before the end of the year.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBFzVIJ7HXPKVuP4IXDeh5WiMRUpxoA4HCvUd5ltTOFMLZ3Y5kBp2gi2vNzB04dBxbpqCvU9frqeieBepdDZkpaxFMZurfXDVRF6P119-6MNX1asnJyHkj82BiZxfn8bBs5x76RP_pw-lY6nqjoLRK6xpjDBC11oU18MRlciPSN0MLUyex5VPnFU4-Xfc69cOaMsB-WrU4yQrGeje5drGgBLYEifY3m7oPL-YUjb9tLtvcPUjxfI8v7p1rkNKUhvn7AwKzDqPlChm3YcP7zs4RLmScfwxGaBoBaiWoSFWjIP0L3p_fzfeD0cXZF7wgzRIefbMlDZZojoqg5WDbKMthNmzJnoBC-Fh5wkP84mY2ZszuOFTDdzU39yNkchJQu7o9VllAT3iOdg6tS6K9mdf7wFs/4me/ZF_tyikISc2PD3j6foHDGw/h0/h001.yYjOvcHjuFPu7hkGwI_UKVesCSNQjWDcKEuO0DOg2ms)** | | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBFzVIJ7HXPKVuP4IXDeh5WiMRUpxoA4HCvUd5ltTOFMLZ3Y5kBp2gi2vNzB04dBxbprG5i8BUIUHhuvE3mycGeWjHdUb-O_xNYyKa0slJ1JxFHJFM-3jO-3RKvmEZw8m0tWpe_zR0HgGmeE0EgIHz8WGgCtfERiBaAR-xMQG-d1XAy_2mD6MPxqNgz5eRFR1lYbEzgPDPyde7ST270CHldKNzXPf1JCEOPmTUoXwDCpjIBV0goVB5_EkuROTrqRCSeORugEAB3lVkJEmCGUDJD4WvHCOXLJyGpm5jm8lImThwQwiUuZLDKLt_fSnjN8EOzoWoFNizCbcs2N1azTA9871O1bRe3XH-DXcVLALdcfvvm9KQEAEvDiN5rIWdlsa4e5wy02HqTRZguynYnqgOJdE/4me/ZF_tyikISc2PD3j6foHDGw/h1/h001.fob-5t7lJ_7yyyohiwtOLbb8tDJtfs4WKyPRC2GxJzg)

In the face of unprecedented legal, political, and administrative attacks on DACA and DACA recipients this year, Congress has a concrete, bipartisan solution to provide permanent protections for immigrant youth.
Our lawmakers have a responsibility to protect our communities. Federal agents have snatched and disappeared neighbors and loved ones, DACA recipients have been targets of detentions without due process despite having federal protections, and budget cuts have stripped healthcare from thousands.
**In the middle of the most dangerous moment in DACA’s 13-year history, United We Dream is here to make sure our immigrant communities are not facing this moment alone.**
Your support makes our advocacy for DACA recipients possible, from sharing updates on the program’s status to rallying for the Dream Act. Over 6,000 donors just like you have powered United We Dream’s work so far this year, and with your continued generosity, we can deepen our advocacy in 2026.
****
****
****
**[We’re over a quarter of the way to our $100,000 End-of-Year goal. clean_body: Your support makes our advocacy for DACA recipients possible. | | | Peter, In case you missed the news, the Dream Act is BACK in Congress! Earlier this month, Senators Dick Durbin and Lisa Murkowski reintroduced the bipartisan Dream Act — a bill that would give a pathway to citizenship to immigrants who have lived in the U.S. for most of their lives, contributing to our communities, economy, and workforce. DACA recipients are Americans in every way except on paper. We’re committed to fighting for congressional action to protect the millions of lives and families who are currently at risk. | | In the face of unprecedented legal, political, and administrative attacks on DACA and DACA recipients this year, Congress has a concrete, bipartisan solution to provide permanent protections for immigrant youth. Our lawmakers have a responsibility to protect our communities. Federal agents have snatched and disappeared neighbors and loved ones, DACA recipients have been targets of detentions without due process despite having federal protections, and budget cuts have stripped healthcare from thousands. In the middle of the most dangerous moment in DACA’s 13-year history, United We Dream is here to make sure our immigrant communities are not facing this moment alone. Your support makes our advocacy for DACA recipients possible, from sharing updates on the program’s status to rallying for the Dream Act. Over 6,000 donors just like you have powered United We Dream’s work so far this year, and with your continued generosity, we can deepen our advocacy in 2026. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Thank you for your support, Aria, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Nadav (via NikkiForCongress.com)
subject: re: end of year update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
Hi friend, it’s Nadav here. 👋

I’ll get straight to it: I’m reaching out because we’re a few weeks away from the end of the year -- and the final end-of-quarter benchmark before the midterm election year.

Will you chip in $3 to stand with Nikki when it matters most, then let me explain exactly what sets this deadline apart?

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-q4-2025?refcode=em-12.13.25-all-a

As Nikki’s finance director, it’s my job to stay on top of our goals to make sure we have the tools we need to reach voters and protect this seat. This deadline is one of only four times this year we’re required by the FEC to report our fundraising.

Our supporters, opponents, and political pundits alike will be able to scour our data. If we miss the mark, you can bet Nikki’s multiple GOP challengers will take it as a sign that they can flip this seat.

We cannot let that happen. Nikki is a champion for working families and is getting real work done in Washington despite the Republican majority -- protecting veteran care, saving local jobs in Granite City, fighting for federal funding, and more.

If this past year has shown us anything, it’s that the GOP can’t be trusted to do what’s right for Illinoisans. They refuse to address the affordability crisis, and millions stand to lose their healthcare or face huge insurance increases.

Holding them accountable starts with Democrats winning the House majority, and it’s impossible without Nikki’s seat. Will you chip in $3 to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal?

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-q4-2025?refcode=em-12.13.25-all-a

Thank you,

Nadav

https://www.facebook.com/NikkiforCongress/?
https://www.instagram.com/nikkibudzinski/?
https://twitter.com/NikkiBudzinski?

Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. Chip in to Nikki's campaign today.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-q4-2025?refcode=em-footer

To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: NikkiForCongress.com [https://nikkiforcongress.com/?]

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.

| | | Folks,

If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress.

All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.

If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks.

I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.

There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.

If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.

And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:

**[Split a donation between Deb Haaland and me. It would mean a lot.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1835?t=1&akid=6200%2E400544%2E8ZtGLP)**

name: NDRC
subject: January
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Our actions over the next few months will determine whether our representative democracy prevails.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121214033/588722963/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhZmZmMjJlLTQ1ZDgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MGPZYA40z4qMa7jj90n-ERgQTc2IrkyO1LGNcw459Pg=&emci=41c57a4a-8ad7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=4afff22e-45d8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, It’s not hyperbole to say that January will be a make-or-break month for the fair maps movement. What happens over the next few months will determine whether voters will have their voices heard in the 2026 midterm elections, and far beyond. Here’s what’s at stake:
* **The Supreme Court is poised to issue a ruling** in a case that threatens Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, which prevents states from diluting votes on the basis of race. If the crown jewel of the Civil Rights Movement is gutted, we could see a rash of Republican states rushing to redistrict and dilute the votes of people of color, and we need to be prepared to respond.
* **Florida is set to push through a mid-decade redraw** of their electoral maps — setting the stage for a major fight to stop this brazen attempt to steal congressional seats for Donald Trump at the expense of Floridians.
* **Meanwhile, states from Indiana to Kansas** are eyeing their own mid-decade redraws despite massive public backlash to these power grabs.

**Our opponents are gearing up for a major fight come January, and we have to be equally prepared.[One way you can ensure we’re equipped to wage this fight on all fronts is by making a donation to the NDRC. Help us defeat their well-funded effort to undermine our fair democratic process — and be prepared for whatever comes next.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121214037/588722965/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PreparedForWhateverScotus_email_20251213-NDRC-Tier1-PreparedForWhateverScotus_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251213-NDRC-Tier1-PreparedForWhateverScotus_&utm_campaign=PreparedForWhateverScotus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhZmZmMjJlLTQ1ZDgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MGPZYA40z4qMa7jj90n-ERgQTc2IrkyO1LGNcw459Pg=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Our actions over the next few months will determine whether our representative democracy prevails. | Peter, It’s not hyperbole to say that January will be a make-or-break month for the fair maps movement. What happens over the next few months will determine whether voters will have their voices heard in the 2026 midterm elections, and far beyond. Here’s what’s at stake: The Supreme Court is poised to issue a ruling in a case that threatens Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, which prevents states from diluting votes on the basis of race. If the crown jewel of the Civil Rights Movement is gutted, we could see a rash of Republican states rushing to redistrict and dilute the votes of people of color, and we need to be prepared to respond. Florida is set to push through a mid-decade redraw of their electoral maps — setting the stage for a major fight to stop this brazen attempt to steal congressional seats for Donald Trump at the expense of Floridians. Meanwhile, states from Indiana to Kansas are eyeing their own mid-decade redraws despite massive public backlash to these power grabs. Our opponents are gearing up for a major fight come January, and we have to be equally prepared.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As Attorney General Eric Holder says, we are living through the most consequential period in our history since the Civil Rights Movement. Our hard-won rights and freedoms are on the line right now — chief among them, the ability to elect representatives who advance our interests and are responsive to the will of the people. In short, nothing less than our representative democracy will be on the line come January.= Thank you for your commitment to our work in this inflection point for our democracy. — Team NDRC = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply**

subject: please friend

body:
please friend

| | |
---
$5, friend.
**_[That's the donation I'm asking you to make – right now – to my campaign for governor ahead of Monday's final mid-month deadline of 2025.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121214716/588724502/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMwYjJlMC00NWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOZTpq_IOM1Xm3rM-upIHTDqp4gFUAjQMM9-hGhGors=)_**
| | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121214717/588724503/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMwYjJlMC00NWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOZTpq_IOM1Xm3rM-upIHTDqp4gFUAjQMM9-hGhGors=)
---
But I want to make sure you understand what your $5 has the power to do.
$5** ** to help open new field offices and keep the lights on at HQ.
$5 to help reach undecided voters with my vision for Colorado's future on the air and through social media.
$5** ** to help build out a massive canvassing effort, with volunteers knocking on every door, in every neighborhood, across every corner of Colorado.
$5 to help fight back against the guaranteed onslaught of attack ads from right-wing, billionaire-funded super PACs.
$5** ** to help forge a better politics here than what we see out of Washington – and to make Colorado the best state to live, work, and raise a family.
Since Trump's reckless tariffs have sent the purchasing power of a dollar plummeting, you might not think your $5 would make that big of a difference.
Well, as you read this email, lots of other grassroots supporters are thinking that, too. _[**_And if all of you pitched in _**_**$5**** _ now, we'd hit our $20,000 mid-month goal in no time._**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121214718/588724504/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMwYjJlMC00NWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOZTpq_IOM1Xm3rM-upIHTDqp4gFUAjQMM9-hGhGors=)_
Realistically, though, I know not everyone will.
Still, I'm not a billionaire who can bankroll my own campaign like the president, and I don't take shady dark money gifts like his Republican allies, either.
**So if we're going to assemble the manpower, resources and reach that we'll need to win the governor's race next November, we have to start laying the groundwork ahead of time** – and I can't do that without you.
_[**_Will you please rush just _****$5**** _ (or anything you can spare) right away? More than just helping us reach this goal by 11:59 p.m. on Monday, it will immediately be put to work WINNING the Colorado governor's race._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121214719/588724505/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMwYjJlMC00NWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOZTpq_IOM1Xm3rM-upIHTDqp4gFUAjQMM9-hGhGors=)_
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121214721/588724506/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMwYjJlMC00NWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOZTpq_IOM1Xm3rM-upIHTDqp4gFUAjQMM9-hGhGors=)
---
| [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121214722/588724507/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMwYjJlMC00NWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOZTpq_IOM1Xm3rM-upIHTDqp4gFUAjQMM9-hGhGors=)
---
There are no words to fully express my gratitude – so I'll leave it at thank you.

Michael
| Bennet for Governor
PO Box 270117
Louisville, CO 80027
United States **Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: MAGA extremists won’t stop — but neither will we
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251213-1713-foote&t=1001&akid=1713%2E342411%2EzolYuD ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The far-right is coming after us — and they’re not holding back.

MAGA extremists are attacking our champions, spreading lies, and trying
to silence the movement we’re building together. They’re scared because
we’re fighting for a democracy that works for all — not just
billionaires or special interests.

clean_body: These poll numbers shocked me| | | Friend, it’s Ted Cruz. My jaw almost hit the floor when I saw these poll numbers. Yes, 14 points. Too much is at stake. Nothing is guaranteed. It starts with you. You’ve been there for us before, and now I’m personally asking you to step up during what could be our most desperate hour. No, a single $1 gift won’t erase a 14-point lead and guarantee Republicans keep the Senate. But if everyone reading this sends $1, it’ll add up quickly. It’ll help us fight back against the onslaught we’re facing from the Soros machine and other radicals. And it’ll give us a fighting chance of stopping the Democrats from marching us down the road to Marxism. \- Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | |

name: Congresswoman Julie Johnson
subject: I represent the gerrymandered TX-32nd district. Now, I’m running in the new TX-33rd to take back the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Hi, this is Congresswoman Julie Johnson.
I just announced that due to Trump’s racist gerrymandering in Texas, I’m running for the newly-drawn TX-33rd district to continue representing my community in Congress. [**I need your help – so if you’re able, split a donation of $33 between my campaign and Sarah McBride, or keep reading.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1333?c0=mcb-em-20251213-1.3Uvsft&refcode=em20251213-2581&t=1&akid=2581%2E21716%2EDz2P3e)
I’ve spent most of my life in North Texas. I didn’t just live here; I showed up, stayed involved, and worked alongside families who needed someone willing to fight with them and for them. Long before I ever held public office, I was advocating for people who were ignored or brushed aside as an attorney, and that experience shaped every part of how I serve today.
**That’s what drove me to flip Texas House District 115 after forty years of Republican control, and it’s what guided me as I continued serving many of the same neighborhoods in Congress.**
The new TX-33 includes thousands of families I have represented since 2018 and since my historic election in 2024. **I know these communities not because they appeared on a newly drawn map, but because I have been here, doing the work through every challenge we’ve faced.**
This new district deserves representation that has been present in the tough moments, including throughout the redistricting fight, instead of a candidate who parachutes back in when another campaign doesn’t work out. Trump and his far-right allies are attacking our rights, our democracy, and our economy—so we can’t afford leadership that doesn’t stand up and fight back.
As this race continues, my commitment stays exactly where it has always been: focused on delivering results, staying accessible, and leading with respect and consistency. I am here to fight for the people who are too often overlooked and to make sure North Texans are not an afterthought.
That is the work I’ve been doing, and it is the work I will continue. Steady, present, accountable, and rooted in the community I serve—not in the next opportunity that comes along.
[**My primary election in March will be here sooner than we know it, so I’m counting on an immediate boost in support. If you’re ready to end Trump’s hold on our government, I am personally asking you today: Will you split a donation of $33 between Sarah McBride and my campaign for the new 33rd district?** ](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1333?c0=mcb-em-20251213-1.3Uvsft&refcode=em20251213-2581&t=2&akid=2581%2E21716%2EDz2P3e)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251213-1.QSXjYj&amount=5&refcode=em20251213-2581&t=21&akid=2581%2E21716%2EDz2P3e)**
Together,
Julie Johnson
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251213-1.QSXjYj&refcode=em20251213-2581&t=22&akid=2581%2E21716%2EDz2P3e)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251213-1&t=23&refcode2=2581_21716_Dz2P3e&akid=2581%2E21716%2EDz2P3e)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=2581%2E21716%2EDz2P3e)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=25&akid=2581%2E21716%2EDz2P3e)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2581%2E21716%2EDz2P3e)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

_Begin forwarded Message from George Latimer:_
Peter,
We’re entering an election year in just a few weeks — and I want to be clear with you: the work to take back the House majority starts now. Not tomorrow. Not next month. Now.
We need to do all we can to take back the House in 2026. **Because the chaos, confusion, and harm we’re seeing from the Republican majority are direct consequences of falling short in 2024.**
Republicans went all-in on the Trump agenda to slash healthcare for millions of Americans, SNAP benefits, disaster relief, environmental protections, and more to fund a massive giveaway to the wealthiest individuals in America.
**But they’re not stopping now — and we can’t either.**
**[That’s why I’m asking grassroots supporters like you to pitch in $10, or anything you can afford so we can reach our $5,000 mid-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121216647/588730435/-2078637570?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_121325_MM02_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNlMzY3YTMtNDhkOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ul-slFBnQpBVkAmvpHRkPdWm_u0Eqkh40bh1Ytq4oeQ=)**

Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey Peter, it's Team Latimer. We wanted to reach out and make sure you saw George’s message about our upcoming mid-month deadline. We’re entering an election year in just a few weeks, and our team carefully set the goals we need to hit each month to make sure we’re in the strongest possible position to win in 2026. That means we can’t afford to miss the deadlines that get us there — especially with our fundraising numbers going public for everyone to see. The clock is ticking on our mid-December fundraising goal, and we know we can’t reach it without your help. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Peter. Read on for George’s original message. — Team Latimer Begin forwarded Message from George Latimer: Peter, We’re entering an election year in just a few weeks — and I want to be clear with you: the work to take back the House majority starts now. Not tomorrow. Not next month. Now. We need to do all we can to take back the House in 2026. Because the chaos, confusion, and harm we’re seeing from the Republican majority are direct consequences of falling short in 2024. Republicans went all-in on the Trump agenda to slash healthcare for millions of Americans, SNAP benefits, disaster relief, environmental protections, and more to fund a massive giveaway to the wealthiest individuals in America. But they’re not stopping now — and we can’t either. = = We must take lessons from the 2024 losses, build on our successes, and most importantly, double down on our efforts to secure even more wins in 2026. Starting right now. At the end of this month, our fundraising numbers will go public for everyone to see, so we need to meet each and every deadline along the way if we want a shot at taking back the House next November. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, George Latimer | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. Our courts are under attack — and some Senate Democrats are standing by,
allowing it to happen.

Right now, Trump loyalists who refuse to tell the truth about the 2020
election and January 6 are being confirmed to the bench. These judges
aren’t impartial — they’re willing pawns in Trump’s plan to pack the
courts with cronies who prioritize his authoritarian agenda over the
American people.

Senate Democrats must object and fight. But they’re not. And if they don’t
hear from us, they won’t.

That’s why Demand Justice PAC is leading the No Crony Judges campaign — to
spotlight these dangerous confirmations and hold these complicit senators
accountable.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Valerie Foushee doesn’t meet the moment.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats just endorsed Nida Allam in North Carolina’s 4th
district because she will be a progressive champion for working-class
people in Congress. But if that’s not enough, let us tell you about her
opponent.

Valerie Foushee, NC-04’s current representative, is simply unprepared to
meet this current moment.

The Durham area is being hit hard by Trump’s attacks, as communities there
face rising healthcare costs, creeping authoritarianism and ICE raids, and
the highest number of federal DOGE funding cuts of any district in the
country.

What's been Foushee's response? Well, seemingly not much of anything.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251213-na.BT-BLS&refcode=em20251213-37275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37275%2E1203867%2EPBPJUX ]If you think not much is not enough anymore, split $5
between Nida’s campaign and Justice Democrats to help us send Foushee into
retirement!

The reason for Foushee’s inaction is simple: she has more sponsors than a
NASCAR team. Republican donors from AIPAC and the Crypto lobby alone
dropped more than $4 million to buy her seat, and the corporate PAC checks
haven’t stopped flowing.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251213-na.BT-BLS&refcode=em20251213-37275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37275%2E1203867%2EPBPJUX ]Durham Dispatch: Foushee’s Finances: Pharma, Railroads, and Weapons
Companies Pile in for 2026 Campaign

Here’s just a sample of the other special interests corrupting her vote:

* Big Pharma;
* Big Tech;
* Walmart;
* Wall Street;
* Corporate defense contractors.

Foushee is bankrolled by the same corporate interests that are raising our
healthcare, housing, and energy costs. She even received money from the
PAC that actively lobbies against Medicare for All – despite signing on to
the bill!

Clearly, working-class families can’t count on Foushee to have their backs
— we have to vote her out next year.

NC-04 deserves a representative who stands up for all of us and fights
back against ICE, Trump, Musk, Republicans, and corporate interests with
every tool at their disposal to actually protect and support North
Carolinians.

Justice Democrats endorsed Nida because she has the moral courage and
track record to deliver for her community, and she has what it takes to
win this race — but only if our movement steps up to support her right
now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251213-na.BT-BLS&refcode=em20251213-37275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37275%2E1203867%2EPBPJUX ]So Peter, will you split
$5 between Justice Democrats and Nida’s campaign right now
to help her defeat Foushee in the 2026 primary?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251213-na.BT-BLS&refcode=em20251213-37275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37275%2E1203867%2EPBPJUX ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251213-37275-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37275_1203867_PBPJUX&akid=37275%2E1203867%2EPBPJUX

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=37275%2E1203867%2EPBPJUX

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

It's not a movie. It's Minnesota under Tim Walz and lieutenant governor Peggy Flanagan. And it's enraging. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0bd8e61a3e704c598cc03338856e5b17&_e=fyfLL-hQPAMZKUbwKL9G4rQDlf_WdJqeqSlYOzl8FOVT-zmu7EG0A524Fe85F73e33GZpAGKSXJHNtl6lK_5Gfvko7R98IyktUbjoNExl-9Am_ZeYLolLwgiBlPOVj6eYiXPCKdusFgbQH-ltlsJFgDSMiQIHOb7pa68-KiM2GbGerjo6JTquD6o2z3jQMM6xJuufNBM1ND-ECAQdGIZScySOxV8VJo6kLZVo6VBHlPLdCkh8wYIA6f6lUO6OlFqXphnR3FzLoFNXft6vB8_jglZ0ggK5LyCHEX1wfSk-6cZLkgK0GUaVbrpdm_in0TJbXfKuRwwkqEgc-bqysktzhw5qnBzWZ8qxEZdTxJy8NxzbRanTkawxPOtE_Uq7NhE1I3K4Jc6cAkrUQAIjE_VEpiVbnxXNHJKYGMQX6cPbXtMnPYtliy7O8vTprEWg_Ce8uKnngtoCmIO3jXCho2Zr47UghdclWxpvAQ1g4weUKDRk92ckk9393Ln3V9ytlYcoocE3mPMTU6rmr7rhuZ4QvtBMcUaXRWvk4gVyryhkid-VwhF8w6GBU5uFa2Xqn5uIPJYlJzS4Ss9iXj1VZoCjVr2-S4UlR2O1hKkGQmsSO2ROIS4FrjK7iLVNMmtnfr4-wP2_MhPRpKIzABaTV2aF9JfigJ0Z1mnuwN6X5fhLKiFMlWaimrjaFKB4KkE9now2qXg8o436Qr1TCUKLHvo5L52cJja_tU4L2COjpXSySs1B3EqG2xcvpwoCYDyUj_D)

Fellow Conservative,

Picture this: Your hard-earned tax dollars—meant to feed starving kids, house the homeless, and help autistic families in our backyard—stolen by the billions. Not by faceless crooks, but by a network of Somali fraudsters, Tim Walz welcomed with open arms, some wiring cash straight to al-Shabaab terrorists plotting against America.

It's not a movie. It's Minnesota under Tim Walz and Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan. **And it's enraging.**

The New York Times dropped the bomb: "How Fraud Swamped Minnesota’s Social Services System on Tim Walz’s Watch." Over $1 billion vanished—more than our entire corrections budget—in brazen schemes: ghost kids "fed" in fake meal programs, phantom therapy sessions for non-existent patients, sham housing for the invisible homeless. 78 of 86 charged so far are tied to the Somali immigrant community Walz and Flanagan have shielded.

**Worse?** Whistleblowers—**over 400 brave DHS employees** —begged Walz to act years ago. Red flags everywhere. His response? _**Retaliation. Monitoring their emails. Threats to their jobs.**_ Discrediting their reports to avoid "racism" smears and keep those precious Somali votes flowing. One employee put it plain: "Walz is 100% responsible... We got the full weight of retaliation."

President Trump saw it coming.

But Walz? He gaslights on Meet the Press: "_**I take responsibility for putting people in jail.**_ "

Federal prosecutors did that, Tim. Not you.

**This is Democratic leadership:** Soft on crime, addicted to power. They audition for D.C. jobs while our state bleeds—kids go hungry, families lose homes, and terrorists get richer. **If it can happen here in the heartland, it'll devour America.**

I’m done watching from the sidelines. My name is Adam Schwarze - I’m a retired Navy SEAL, and I’m ready to serve the people of Minnesota and Americans around the nation in the United States Senate.

I'll haul Walz in for hearings, help identify every stolen cent, and slam the door on this madness.

Strong borders. Ironclad audits. Republican muscle in Washington to protect what's rightfully ours.

_**[But I need you. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today—help me put an end to Democrat fraud and incompetence.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0bd8e61a3e704c598cc03338856e5b17&_e=fyfLL-hQPAMZKUbwKL9G4rQDlf_WdJqeqSlYOzl8FOVT-zmu7EG0A524Fe85F73e33GZpAGKSXJHNtl6lK_5Gfvko7R98IyktUbjoNExl-9Am_ZeYLolLwgiBlPOVj6eYiXPCKdusFgbQH-ltlsJFgDSMiQIHOb7pa68-KiM2GbGerjo6JTquD6o2z3jQMM6xJuufNBM1ND-ECAQdGIZScySOxV8VJo6kLZVo6VBHlPLdCkh8wYIA6f6lUO6OlFqXphnR3FzLoFNXft6vB8_jj98wYy0NWg8qh_y2Nu4Qjfb7XruGc8JuifC4YvkC0o5fi-E_yMkBEoTzoXxFzi4-pE-JDZpGhrCJ11y2R6aLMdRnpaUELQpiA9UACD4k4TzEYZHapfRGHSdRAMgtvJ0uE5hqABWal03fD2PDT5YHLHyBPK-P4L9Ks3p57QA94_fEJ8ZO986n_IcjhHucSVxy0szrfkEopX4SwOdw8uloYPjN6ap_sBxOUU0QJH2prMx-H5KdpDon20vJlPtO0CyKSHmfOF8mewKY6Nag76wdkvUxpo8R90uMCPx129nFhmMqVQCiSEqkkgFzfWFBM08UUAswiiBij2EfEQvI2fgGQ6qzo7_A83f9SHSMpAy36jtY4zLr4BiyB04sZtC0vg_6XMRZ4SooCx0qoOjvRRtwGJsXdQ5y4hzP75_wkwNsd-XwgI7mVnefm0co9X8PLQWvgj1SjIf3VQz-yO7mu1SzqJZSfoPMV1VGXZ-gbdV28s0) **_

clean_body: It's not a movie. It's Minnesota under Tim Walz and lieutenant governor Peggy Flanagan. And it's enraging. | Fellow Conservative, Picture this: Your hard-earned tax dollars—meant to feed starving kids, house the homeless, and help autistic families in our backyard—stolen by the billions. Not by faceless crooks, but by a network of Somali fraudsters, Tim Walz welcomed with open arms, some wiring cash straight to al-Shabaab terrorists plotting against America. It's not a movie. It's Minnesota under Tim Walz and Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan. And it's enraging. The New York Times dropped the bomb: "How Fraud Swamped Minnesota’s Social Services System on Tim Walz’s Watch." Over $1 billion vanished—more than our entire corrections budget—in brazen schemes: ghost kids "fed" in fake meal programs, phantom therapy sessions for non-existent patients, sham housing for the invisible homeless. 78 of 86 charged so far are tied to the Somali immigrant community Walz and Flanagan have shielded. Worse? Whistleblowers—over 400 brave DHS employees —begged Walz to act years ago. Red flags everywhere. His response? Retaliation. Monitoring their emails. Threats to their jobs. Discrediting their reports to avoid "racism" smears and keep those precious Somali votes flowing. One employee put it plain: "Walz is 100% responsible... We got the full weight of retaliation." President Trump saw it coming. But Walz? He gaslights on Meet the Press: "I take responsibility for putting people in jail. " Federal prosecutors did that, Tim. Not you. This is Democratic leadership: Soft on crime, addicted to power. They audition for D.C. jobs while our state bleeds—kids go hungry, families lose homes, and terrorists get richer. If it can happen here in the heartland, it'll devour America. I’m done watching from the sidelines. My name is Adam Schwarze - I’m a retired Navy SEAL, and I’m ready to serve the people of Minnesota and Americans around the nation in the United States Senate. I'll haul Walz in for hearings, help identify every stolen cent, and slam the door on this madness. Strong borders. Ironclad audits. Republican muscle in Washington to protect what's rightfully ours. For Minnesota. For America. For the kids they robbed. Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: This is what Josh actually believes
body:
Let’s set the record straight. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121217255/588731927/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjE4ZDIxMGEtNGFkOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eKtcAme_s_3oyNl8DfvmuBljqLt6HKUYAwxZx_xsJb8=) | Peter, Donald Trump and his allies love to paint Josh as a “far-left, radical extremist.” **So here is what Josh actually believes. You can decide for yourself whether any of this sounds extreme:**
* Healthcare should be affordable and accessible to everyone.
* Every kid should be able to attend a good school.
* Parents shouldn’t have to choose between groceries and their mortgage.
* Elected officials should work for the people who sent them to Washington, not corporations or special interests.

Josh believes these things because of how he grew up. His parents taught him the value of hard work early on. He started as a local paperboy and worked his way through college. He decided to run for Congress to protect healthcare for people like his brother. name: David Hogg
subject: Big news about young voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We can win them back.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251213-1&t=1&akid=2938%2E587540%2EyNxNEu)
**This is important, Peter:**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251213_1_youth.WZtlBi&refcode=em20251213-2938&amount=5&t=2&akid=2938%2E587540%2EyNxNEu)
I’ve said it before: Just because young people swung toward Donald Trump in 2024 does _not_ mean that they’re a lost cause or Democrats can’t win them back.
Young voters weren’t satisfied with their choices in the last election. Now they are making it clear they _don’t_ approve of the wannabe dictator in the White House.
**Democrats CAN win young people back. But we need the right message — and the right _messengers._** And that’s one big reason why Leaders We Deserve exists.
We’re empowering the next generation of Democrats who are ready to meet the moment — young leaders unafraid of challenging the establishment and fighting on behalf of the constituents they serve. The reason why things in our party feel like they rarely change is because they rarely do. That’s what happens when you spend the better part of a decade talking about how we have a “messaging problem” instead of addressing the messenger problem. Young voters are looking for a clear answer on who can most quickly make their lives easier. We have to show them exactly how we plan to do that and that we aren’t just changing what we say but we are changing who we are as a party to offer them something new.
We simply cannot do that by changing what we say while keeping the same out of touch messengers who voters don’t believe anymore.
That’s why we do this work. It’s not because it’s easy or makes us many friends on the Hill. It’s because oftentimes the thing that needs to be done is that last thing many people in the establishment want. We have made the decision to do not what is popular with the establishment but what we truly believe is required to win back a generation and show Americans of all ages how our party is changing who we are to represent the people's interest, not special interests.
We just announced a slate of new endorsements this week and we’ve got more on the way. We need your support so we can keep recruiting, training, and investing in the leaders who will help Democrats win back young voters.
**[If you’re with us, make a $5 contribution right now to power our work.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251213_1_youth.WZtlBi&refcode=em20251213-2938&amount=5&t=3&akid=2938%2E587540%2EyNxNEu)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251213_1_youth.WZtlBi&amount=5&refcode=em20251213-2938&t=22&akid=2938%2E587540%2EyNxNEu)**
We truly can’t do this work without grassroots support from people like you.
Thank you,
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251213-1&t=23&refcode2=2938_587540_yNxNEu&akid=2938%2E587540%2EyNxNEu)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=2938%2E587540%2EyNxNEu)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2938%2E587540%2EyNxNEu)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve

| | | We have a quick question for you:

If you knew $10 could help flip the House next year, [_**would you give right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121217548/588732455/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-12-13_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmRjMGQ1NC00YmQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_1F-2S2XohufQnTxJk8l78VQQ9i8-vXt833rxxN3Y4=)

name: Seth Moulton
subject: This is what fighting forward looks like.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
Affordable housing, healthcare, and education for all.

| |
---
Team, Right now, there are two Americas: one for the wealthy and well-connected, and one for everyone else. Across Massachusetts, I meet families who are doing everything right and still falling behind: rent that jumps every year, healthcare that feels one surprise bill away from disaster, and an education system that costs more and delivers less opportunity. Meanwhile, President Trump’s policies keep making his billionaire friends even wealthier. That’s wrong. And it’s un-American. On Friday, I introduced my [American Affordability Agenda](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121217565/588732500/1899774522?refcode=251213_sm_affordability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDkzMTYzMC00YmQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=if9wpOfUdnSa8Vr2Nw0udBu-OCcbu4AQ43HtiCah5kg=&emci=859012c5-97d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=6d931630-4bd8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=194769) \- a Democratic plan to declare housing, healthcare, and education as human rights. It’s part of my answer to MAGA’s Project 2025 - not just opposing Trump, but offering a positive vision that fights forward for working families. Here’s what it means: **Housing is a human right.** We’ll crack down on private equity firms buying up homes, help first-time homebuyers, protect renters, and build the housing Massachusetts needs. **Healthcare is a human right.** We’ll extend ACA subsidies, lower prescription drug costs, expand access to maternal care, and create a strong national public option that forces insurers to compete and bring premiums down. **Education is a human right.** We’ll guarantee universal pre-K, expand workforce training, end predatory student lending, and modernize education so our kids are prepared for AI and the jobs of the future. And we’ll pay for it by making the ultra-wealthy finally pay their fair share,**through a national wealth tax on mega-millionaires** and by closing tax loopholes that reward the wealthiest and most well-connected. Here’s the truth: this agenda won’t happen on its own. The lobbyists and billionaires who like things exactly the way they are will fight it every step of the way. That’s why I’m asking you to help power this campaign. **[If you can, please chip in $3, $30, or whatever you’re able today to help us build this movement and make it real:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121217566/588732501/2090747700?refcode=251213_sm_affordability_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDkzMTYzMC00YmQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=if9wpOfUdnSa8Vr2Nw0udBu-OCcbu4AQ43HtiCah5kg=)** | [CHIP IN $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121217567/588732502/1375639745?amp;refcode=251213_sm_affordability&amount=3&refcode=251213_sm_affordability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDkzMTYzMC00YmQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=if9wpOfUdnSa8Vr2Nw0udBu-OCcbu4AQ43HtiCah5kg=)

Friend, do you remember when Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth leaked classified war plans via an unapproved app and inadvertently included a reporter in the communication? The Pentagon’s watchdog has now found that Hegseth put U.S. personnel and their mission at risk. Peter –

We know we often say that every fundraising deadline is critical and so important, and in truth, every fundraising goal we set is vital in keeping this campaign running smoothly. But our December fundraising goal is one we truly can't afford to miss.

This month marks our final end-of-quarter deadline before the election year. It's our final chance to make an impact before we are in a full sprint to Election Day. And it's the last time our fundraising numbers will go public for 2025 – proving if we have what it takes to keep our momentum going against the challenges ahead.

To help us stay on track for the month, we set a big mid-month fundraising goal. Take a look at our progress so far:
