clean_body: To help us stay on track for the month, we set a big mid-month fundraising goal. | = Peter – We know we often say that every fundraising deadline is critical and so important, and in truth, every fundraising goal we set is vital in keeping this campaign running smoothly. But our December fundraising goal is one we truly can't afford to miss. This month marks our final end-of-quarter deadline before the election year. It's our final chance to make an impact before we are in a full sprint to Election Day. And it's the last time our fundraising numbers will go public for 2025 – proving if we have what it takes to keep our momentum going against the challenges ahead. To help us stay on track for the month, we set a big mid-month fundraising goal. name: Chris Taylor HQ
subject: Is there anything we can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251213-908&t=1&akid=913%2E294397%2EdUVcMC)
What if we told you that even $4 makes a difference in helping us reach Wisconsinites during these final four months of our campaign?
It’s true.
Small-dollar gifts from thousands of supporters are how we reach more voters and push back against coordinated right-wing attacks.
Alongside that mounting pressure, there’s another big reason why we need every supporter to step up: **At the end of this month, we’re facing a major public fundraising deadline.**
Everything we’ve raised will be made public for our opponent and the right-wing special interests backing them to see.
If they think our grassroots coalition is losing steam, they’ll unleash a flood of dark money to take us down.
[**That’s why we’re asking: Will you pitch in $4 today to help elect Judge Chris Taylor and protect Wisconsin’s future?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/201?c0=em_ms_jct_20251213_1_ak.fuCdAU&refcode=em20251213-908&t=3&akid=913%2E294397%2EdUVcMC)
**[Donate $4 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/201?c0=em_ms_jct_20251213_1_ak.fuCdAU&refcode=em20251213-908&t=22&akid=913%2E294397%2EdUVcMC)**
On the bench, Judge Chris Taylor has shown what real judicial integrity looks like. She’s committed to a justice system that works for people — _not powerful interests_ — which is exactly why extremist groups are so desperate to defeat her.
Thanks for taking action,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251213-908&t=23&refcode2=913_294397_dUVcMC&akid=913%2E294397%2EdUVcMC)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=913%2E294397%2EdUVcMC)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=913%2E294397%2EdUVcMC)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

body:

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Food relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This holiday season, we're supporting food relief efforts across New York City and the country.
#
In the past few weeks, we've seen the Trump administration use the food security of millions of Americans as a bargaining chip for their political agenda.
**So as the holiday season begins, we're supporting three organizations that are providing food relief to millions of families across NYC and the country** — from those who are struggling with the rising cost of living to those who need extra help in the face of disaster.
[Will you make a $3 contribution today — $1 for ICNA Relief, World Central Kitchen, and Connected Chef — to support organizations that are providing food relief to those who need it most this holiday season?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251213.WnJefs&refcode=em20251213-10393-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10393%2E2526796%2EGCE_Ab)
_100% of your contribution will go to these incredible community organizations._
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251213.WnJefs&refcode=em20251213-10393-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10393%2E2526796%2EGCE_Ab)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251213.WnJefs&refcode=em20251213-10393-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10393%2E2526796%2EGCE_Ab)
We’ve seen this movement step up to achieve incredible things before. Together we’ve raised millions for mutual aid groups, relief programs, and more.
Whether or not you can contribute today, **thank you for standing with us**.
Wishing you and your loved ones a happy holiday season,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251213?refcode=em20251213-10393-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=22&refcode2=10393_2526796_GCE_Ab&akid=10393%2E2526796%2EGCE_Ab)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251213-10393-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=23&akid=10393%2E2526796%2EGCE_Ab)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=10393%2E2526796%2EGCE_Ab) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=10393%2E2526796%2EGCE_Ab) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=10393%2E2526796%2EGCE_Ab) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=27&akid=10393%2E2526796%2EGCE_Ab)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: This crisis is real
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=5151%2E35263%2EWIk14j ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

This reality is brutal.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-dec25.Xhg_L0&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251213_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=5151%2E35263%2EWIk14j ]The Atlantic Daily: Trump Campaigned on Affordability. Now He's Calling
the Idea a 'Con Job'

Anyone struggling to pay their rent or mortgage, student loans, buy
groceries and prescriptions — they’re feeling the impacts of Trump’s
broken promises.

The affordability crisis might not be hurting Donald Trump and his
billionaire buddies, but I can assure you, it’s hurting working families
across America.

I will always work to help provide fairness, equality, and economic
opportunity for all. It means we have to keep working together for a
future where those goals are realized.

I will always stand up for you and your economic interests, but it will
take real people power to send a message that the American people won't
stand for this.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-dec25.Xhg_L0&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251213_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=5151%2E35263%2EWIk14j ]That’s where you come in. If it’s in your budget, could you help me

body:

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=df2b93d432414e3686b8a2f6e1d82886&_e=pR3Dno-7qA26MDX0-b2Sjmr9ssbBYIpEW1vF6zDEL2emvlqenCNf7TSeg-AeB_dVpgCfd2bibUN80xgwa0i2JNLSEWKGoDmK72HP9Bcj4NyC6Sa2XZfYa_IFGjqeK4k6B-WNns1abw-Lsyu6MT9CL-wFrqt2Ub1_jzpO5O-pWAUXnFRMmOh3gzsaYR6pPNBsNyZN9zYVcglIOonzBzbkExiHIdtupHdbXMILzEcRNET--hbJVOoGrg-N3ta4FAkKRCMuofKAggDJS8nx8Wx8UTF5AOWCizUSPgCUmvQCaQVEIAmC8Xnj9otIQLm_hyeeEq4_BkGHVRoUPaYjs4ZcQ4iMqnL4N6ZICe-gSj8182kNZ6WdSbdqyTXJdugZiJFsUXway3JXGQfHP2mi2q2RwgwZ9D3Zgx8QGXHcGt176dPnecRm2MN5NaoH_u5bd8F2o8b8tFowGh-EXPJ7g80ls7FdiTq7zwaBV6XYx4UuZlxWHGC33mpaVmEbJkhbhyvFY-Q6fN3EQGyoOrqsgTRIHTGAuNWf_pH31IVrYDpD4SfuLC1yMcnV08zojuxLLjt8fOdTRejh3k5wl2-cv31uOgqTrgHgwmQ6dE5UyZpG2MmbNX6_3BPzcDJTuCAzaT4U)
---
Peter,
---
Ever since he left the White House, Barack Obama has been looking for an “heir” to his political movement who will continue pushing his Far Left, socialist vision for America.
---
**_And now, Obama and the entire Democrat Party appear to have embraced their “ _NEXT_ Obama” in Zohran Mamdani. _**
---
They’ve caved to and endorsed Mamdani’s communist agenda, they’ve treated him like the NEW LEADER of their party, and they’ve even directed MILLIONS of dollars from their liberal donor network his way.
---
_Peter, do you remember you remember how many Republicans brushed off the rise of a relatively unknown liberal activist from Chicago?_
---
But knowing what we know today, no one would have taken Obama’s rise so lightly.
---
**_That’s exactly why I’m imploring you now NOT to brush off the rise of Zohran Mamdani._**
---
As it stands, there’s _only_ _one_ _check_ left at our disposal to stop Mamdani’s rise...
---
**...We must FIRE Kathy Hochul – _the worst governor in America_ – and give the state of New York its _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ against Mamdani! **
---
And here’s the good news:
---
We’re polling within the margin of error against Hochul, she’s been labeled the _most_ _vulnerable_ governor in the country, and this race is **TIED**!
---
What's more, we have one of the greatest tools at our disposal to WIN this race. In fact, it’s the very same secret weapon that Mamdani used to win the New York mayoral race.
---
**_It’s time to beat the Left at their own game!_**
---
**_You see, the State of New York unlocks matching funds at a rate of 6-to-1 once a candidate hits the fundraising benchmarks written into state law._**
---
**And with your help today, we can turn Mamdani’s secret weapon against his puppet governor Kathy Hochul by unlocking the _LEGAL_ _MAXIMUM_ amount of matching funds to FIRE her!**
---
Hochul and her allies know her only hope of winning reelection is to _BUY_ the governor’s race, so when we unlock this REAL 600% MATCH, they’re going to see it as a devastating setback.
---
Just think about it...
---
Kathy Hochul will wake up one morning to discover that _her own administration_ has to pay out a 600% match on thousands of grassroots contributions to FIRE her from office!
---
**_So, I’ll ask again... Knowing what you know now, would you really leave this _REAL 600% MATCH_ unused?_**
---

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Every single day, millions of seniors struggle to get by—living below the poverty line—even while collecting Social Security. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Do You Know What’s Hidden in Section 5101? | Every single day, millions of seniors struggle to get by—living below the poverty line—even while collecting Social Security. Team, we're days away from the end of the year, and when we flip the calendar to 2026, health care costs are going to skyrocket for millions of Americans.
Instead of doing something to fix it, GOP members of Congress, including Jocelyn’s opponent John James, are doing... nothing. _Except voting to cut Affordable Care Act tax credits._

name: Wes Moore
subject: Army-Navy Game
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1059%2E1086043%2EtqHHJ3)
**Today, we’re welcoming President Trump to Baltimore for the Army-Navy game.**
He’s had a lot to say about our city lately, so while he’s inside the stadium (watching Army beat Navy) I want to highlight the progress that’s happening outside its walls. And if you’re already on board to build on that progress, **[I would be so grateful for a donation today.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251213-1.YEdMGs&refcode=em-20251213-1&t=2&akid=1059%2E1086043%2EtqHHJ3)**
Since taking office, we’ve partnered with the city to make historic investments in cleaning up vacant properties, fighting blight, and creating housing. Now, we’re on pace to eliminate Baltimore’s _entire_ vacancy housing inventory.
We’ve also made our communities safer. With the help of Baltimore Mayor Brandon Scott, States’ Attorney Ivan Bates, local law enforcement, and our community groups, we’ve seen _double-digit_ drops in homicides and non-fatal shootings in Baltimore since coming onboard. In fact, the last time homicides were this low in Baltimore City, _I wasn’t born yet._
We’ve locked in the Orioles for a 30-year lease. We kept the Preakness in Baltimore, while also investing in Park Heights. And, now, Baltimore is the 4th best city for college graduates.
And we’re doing this all while also quickly rebuilding the Francis Scott Key Bridge -- one of the most important pieces of infrastructure in this country.
I’m proud to show the President the progress we’re making in Maryland -- the best place in the world to change the world. **[If you’re with me and want this momentum to continue, will you power our reelection effort by donating today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251213-1.YEdMGs&refcode=em-20251213-1&t=3&akid=1059%2E1086043%2EtqHHJ3)**

Let’s go Army!
Elevate,
Wes

clean_body: Today, we’re welcoming President Trump to Baltimore for the Army-Navy game. He’s had a lot to say about our city lately, so while he’s inside the stadium (watching Army beat Navy) I want to highlight the progress that’s happening outside its walls. And if you’re already on board to build on that progress, Since taking office, we’ve partnered with the city to make historic investments in cleaning up vacant properties, fighting blight, and creating housing. Now, we’re on pace to eliminate Baltimore’s entire vacancy housing inventory. We’ve also made our communities safer. With the help of Baltimore Mayor Brandon Scott, States’ Attorney Ivan Bates, local law enforcement, and our community groups, we’ve seen double-digit drops in homicides and non-fatal shootings in Baltimore since coming onboard. In fact, the last time homicides were this low in Baltimore City, I wasn’t born yet. We’ve locked in the Orioles for a 30-year lease. We kept the Preakness in Baltimore, while also investing in Park Heights. And, now, Baltimore is the 4th best city for college graduates. And we’re doing this all while also quickly rebuilding the Francis Scott Key Bridge -- one of the most important pieces of infrastructure in this country. I’m proud to show the President the progress we’re making in Maryland -- the best place in the world to change the world. Let’s go Army! Elevate, Wes

name: Derek Tran
subject: [SIGN] Stop Trump’s drilling plan
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121221648/588744181/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjFmODRlMWItNTZkOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0SA4C969EXBWyU19o-q06RXoJ7BGW8ZjHeR58nU-h4M=)
Friend,

With all the chaos coming out of Washington and this reckless Administration, here’s something that has flown under the radar:

**Trump is quietly trying to bring back offshore drilling to California’s coastlines. His new plan would reopen our waters to dangerous drilling that would wreak havoc on our environment and devastate our communities.**

Oil spills have taken a real toll in our state over the years, and experts agree that restarting offshore drilling would be a “ticking time bomb.”

This is a rare issue that the overwhelming majority of California and Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike agree on: We cannot let Trump decimate our coasts by bringing back offshore drilling.

**[That’s why I was proud to join my colleagues in signing a letter to Trump demanding that drilling in California is fully taken off the table. But we need an all-out push to sound the alarm: Will you sign my petition today to protect California’s coasts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121221655/588744186/296671474?refcode=em-12.13.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjFmODRlMWItNTZkOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0SA4C969EXBWyU19o-q06RXoJ7BGW8ZjHeR58nU-h4M=&emci=464e6a14-56d8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b1f84e1b-56d8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=27336212)**

clean_body: | = Friend, With all the chaos coming out of Washington and this reckless Administration, here’s something that has flown under the radar: Trump is quietly trying to bring back offshore drilling to California’s coastlines. His new plan would reopen our waters to dangerous drilling that would wreak havoc on our environment and devastate our communities. Oil spills have taken a real toll in our state over the years, and experts agree that restarting offshore drilling would be a “ticking time bomb.” This is a rare issue that the overwhelming majority of California and Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike agree on: We cannot let Trump decimate our coasts by bringing back offshore drilling. | Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121222482/588747161/1949054306?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.13_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjRlOTA2Zi01OWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqhXJ21n4KR5-fH73usb2QykZ5kQ9W4y14D3Fcie9PM=) Hey, it’s Mark Kelly.

Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.

I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.

But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.

So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.

I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.

We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.

After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.

[**_I’m asking you to split a donation between Maggie Hassan and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121222483/588747162/1949054306?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.13_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjRlOTA2Zi01OWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqhXJ21n4KR5-fH73usb2QykZ5kQ9W4y14D3Fcie9PM=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121222484/588747163/1949054306?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.13_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjRlOTA2Zi01OWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqhXJ21n4KR5-fH73usb2QykZ5kQ9W4y14D3Fcie9PM=)

clean_body: We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. = Hey, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. I’m honored to share that our grassroots campaign to flip CA-22 has now been endorsed by some of the most respected voices in the country, including:

* Bernie Sanders – U.S. Senate, Vermont

...and dozens more mayors, school board trustees, and advocates across the Valley.

**Organizations**

* Working Families Party
* Latino Victory Fund
* Blue America
* Leaders We Deserve
* Power CA Action

...and many others.

Dr. Jasmeet Bains is a family physician who has dedicated her life to serving the Central Valley. As the first South Asian American woman and first Sikh American elected to the California state Assembly, she's already made history — and she's delivered results.

In the California state Assembly, she secured funding for a new medical school and fought to expand health care access and addiction treatment services. She knows what it takes to tackle the challenges facing families in the Central Valley.

**Now, she's running for Congress to protect Medicare and Medicaid, make health care affordable, and ensure Washington works for working families — not just the wealthy and well-connected.**

Meanwhile, her opponent, Republican Rep. David Valadao, voted for Trump's disastrous budget bill, threatening health care for millions of Californians.

Families in California's 22nd Congressional District deserve a champion who will fight for them, not against them. EMILYs List is proud to endorse Dr. Jasmeet Bains — and we're ready to help her flip this seat and take the fight to Congress.

[**Will you split a donation between EMILYs List and Dr. Bains' campaign today to help her flip this seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121222569/588747503/-1395254195?refcode=WUEFHL26_20251213_JasmeetSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057471&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTRhMTEyMi01YWQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=znz2UWZvuzw6WI5L-qFhNlSyhBhNldDc9CNmTkzq61Q=)

clean_body: Jasmeet is ready to take her fight to Congress | = Peter, The race for California's 22nd Congressional District is heating up, and we need to build momentum to flip this seat blue. = | = Dr. Jasmeet Bains is a family physician who has dedicated her life to serving the Central Valley. As the first South Asian American woman and first Sikh American elected to the California state Assembly, she's already made history — and she's delivered results. In the California state Assembly, she secured funding for a new medical school and fought to expand health care access and addiction treatment services. She knows what it takes to tackle the challenges facing families in the Central Valley. Now, she's running for Congress to protect Medicare and Medicaid, make health care affordable, and ensure Washington works for working families — not just the wealthy and well-connected. Meanwhile, her opponent, Republican Rep. David Valadao, voted for Trump's disastrous budget bill, threatening health care for millions of Californians. Families in California's 22nd Congressional District deserve a champion who will fight for them, not against them. EMILYs List is proud to endorse Dr. Jasmeet Bains — and we're ready to help her flip this seat and take the fight to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your split contribution will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. subject: The holidays shouldn’t break the bank
body:
But prices just keep rising

| |
---
Hi friend, Every year, the holidays stretch family budgets. Gifts, decorations, groceries, travel, it all adds up. But this year, rising prices are hitting even harder, and too many families are struggling to keep up. And here’s the hard truth: our opponents have special interests and super PACs backing them. Flooding the district with false ads. And for them, these holiday expenses don’t matter. They won’t slow down. They’re pouring money into this district because they know this race is competitive. We’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help fight back. If you can, please make a contribution today. **[Times are tough, and we know not everyone can give. But if you can chip in today (even $5 makes a huge difference), you’ll get us one step closer to taking back the House. name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: ICE hit me with their car and tear gassed me
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xb-W2XNZJudcq39uH0iGDtrFBTT7_KJ7s2GDmvMCCV7QfpCaVLvxGN662i2ttxUluK0WFYkfieSmQB-rBZwfxNUuqFGMTmshM7Lt6xrFoL6PSEmlPq2xdS6dIdWr82NdqueRbZH5O3QOilSWyjMN9QC0tD1RcSskatTmrlUNq9RtyyrHFnY0TyGJxVrBqd0taFI73tuzQO3fReHC2F_KD5cuI-oS5vB2Y3rUlTX2RF0=&c=G6mqQab1dz8C9bP2lmIblOdvqO-80npf-O1JABsW09vG_WuTdRVQxg==&ch=01327hz3lv0SAybHLWKgPv39HI8ABwkcnlG-48-Qt7NLbC3oG43tuQ==)
---
|
Peter,
People often ask me what kind of Representative I will be in Congress.
I didn't answer that question with a press release or Tik-Tok video. I answered it by standing shoulder-to-shoulder with my neighbors outside the Broadview ICE facility.
I went there because I believe a true leader doesn't hide behind a desk when their community is under attack. If my constituents are on the front lines, that is exactly where I belong.
We showed up to protest peacefully. ICE responded with brutality, ramming protestors with vehicles and firing tear gas into the crowd.
ICE hit me with a car and tear gas.

Scenes from the chaos. That's me on the bottom left and right getting hit by the car and sprayed with tear gas.

We are facing a fascist agenda that requires more than just talking points, strongly-worded letters, or snarky social media posts to defeat. We need leaders who are willing to put their bodies on the line to protect their people. And I have been leading in this fight before I was even a candidate -- canvassing businesses and neighborhoods to make sure my community knows their rights, standing side by side with families under attack, and showing up in the streets.
That is the fearlessness I will bring to Congress. I will take this fight from the streets of Chicago directly to the halls of Congress, and I will not back down when the smoke clears.
Help me take this fight to them. subject: If they can silence voices, what else can they erase?
body:
Don’t miss these special offers from my trusted partner - Goldco
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e6147275/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yvck5qSlhSVVlFdA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTM/LbmNsR0w2dVhhTQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNYTVJ1QjFZU0U5TGxscw/gaT3Dvw/s8j4d0448d4)

| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | **It’s Candace Owens.**
---
**When my friend was recently assassinated, the cruelty spoke volumes.**
---
Instead of mourning, elites mocked. **Some even celebrated.
** _That’s not free speech._ That’s erasing a voice. By force. **By death.**
---
**And the hypocrisy doesn’t stop there.**
---
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**Jimmy Kimmel laughed when Roseanne Barr lost her career.**
---
**He cheered when Tucker Carlson was taken off the air.** But when HE was fired, suddenly it was about “free speech.”
---
**We all know the rules. If you are on the “approved” side, you’re protected. If you’re not, you’re silenced. Or worse..**.
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | **Google recently admitted that the Biden administration pressured them to take down YouTube content that didn’t even break the rules.**
---
They called that pressure “unacceptable and wrong.” The only reason they are admitting it now is because President Trump will not **put up with their nonsense.

** Banks have **openly canceled conservatives.** Melania Trump. Kanye West. If they can target public figures, what chance does the **average person** have?
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**So here’s the truth...**
---
If they can pressure platforms to **censor** , if banks can **cancel accounts** , if the IRS can **weaponize audits** , what makes YOU think your savings are _safe in their hands?_
---
**Based on what we have seen recently, we are at a turning point.**
---
Institutions are showing _they will not hesitate_ to use their power.

**I may be targeted next. Or it could be you...**
---
| | **So I will _never_ trust my family’s future to people who have _already_ shown they will use any tactic, no matter how dirty.**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
That is why I keep part of my savings in GOLD and SILVER.
---
Assets that _cannot_ be censored, deleted, frozen, or murdered.
---
**If freedom still matters to you, protect your voice and protect what you’ve earned!**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. clean_body: It’s about Social Security. | | Peter, can we get your John Hancock on this? President Trump’s plan to END taxes on Social Security is in motion - it just needs your endorsement. ENDORSEMENT ID: 471776Peter DUE: TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT ENDORSEMENT STATUS: INCOMPLETE You know how HUGE this is for our seniors, Peter . They worked hard for their Social Security payments. That money belongs in their hands - not the swamp’s. President Trump’s new policy has gotten rousing support from across the country. Now, we just need your endorsement! Thank you, GOP HQ Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: This race for Congress turned into a play from the '50s 🎭
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG]
Friend,
It's sad to think that while our campaign is fundraising for the final End of Quarter Deadline of 2025, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG] this race for Congress has practically turned into a play from the 1950s.
In 12 Angry Men, 12 (male) jurors deliberate the facts of a murder case and eventually overcome their biases to reach a verdict.
Except here in CA-03, 3 men (one Republican Congressman, one former politician, and a doctor who represents an entirely different district) got together to plan out their runs for Congress and only affirmed their biases by trying to push the only woman in this race out of it.
Friend, the difference with Heidi is that her concern for our district isn't an act.
She joined this race back in April because she saw how Kevin Kiley's toxic politics were affecting our communities and how he never showed up for our district— instead acting as a lapdog for billionaires and corporations.
With a history of delivering results and winning a rural purple district before, Heidi knew that she had to step up to stop him.
Friend, this is still one of the best Dem flip opportunities in the entire country, and we can't let toxic politics get in the way of electing a proven leader like Heidi Hall. With our End of Quarter Deadline coming up fast, will you chip in what you can today to help us flip this seat? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG_]
In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall for Congress
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251213_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

* * *
**** Recently, users of Spotify were extremely triggered after hearing ICE recruitment ads on Spotify. Some of these users have families that have been torn apart by ICE, and didn’t expect the platform housing their favorite artist to be so callous and insensitive. Spotify defended its decision by calling the ads “**policy compliant** ,” but compliance is not leadership. Spotify needs stricter policies that prohibit government agencies from using the platform to promote **discrimination, intimidation, or violence.** ICE recruitment ads clearly meet that standard. Indivisible Project, Working Families, and 50501 Movement have started a boycott against that platform, and we need to help keep the movement going. **[Let your voice be heard and write to Spotify’s CEO, Daniel Ek. Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Hill: Buttigieg doubles down on scrapping Electoral College: 'It's undemocratic' [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=121325_1&amount=25]
Friend - leaders like Pete Buttigieg, Bernie Sanders, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Robert Reich are leading the charge to ditch the Electoral College and switch to a national popular vote system. Why?
➜ The Electoral College is the reason Trump won in 2016, despite losing the popular vote by millions
➜ Joe Biden nearly lost the presidency in 2020, even though he won the popular vote by a historic margin
➜ Every day, new leaders join our movement, which means we can abolish the Electoral College and give us a true democracy
We’re so close to getting rid of the Electoral College, but we need to bring in more pro-popular vote supporters across the country to cross the finish line. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us ditch the Electoral College? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=121325_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121325_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121325_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121325_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121325_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=121325_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=121325_1&amount=35]
We keep talking about this because it's true: 16 states plus DC have already indicated that they're willing to scrap this electoral scheme and move to a national popular vote.
It's clear that our democracy needs reform to be protected. But we're only going to be able to forge the country we deserve if we stand up for our rights, push back against the gerrymandering and voter suppression, and finally make a national popular vote a reality. Too much is at stake for us to give up now.
Help put us over the top in the states we need to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=121325_1&amount=25]
Thank you,
The Voter Action Project Electoral College Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121325_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121325_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

subject: What MAGA is doing in these three states is truly horrific
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ipZQfA5qwzHDkRnjMd25uyZkZCEcy2yl0YGG0CTUy3alwH6VgWSOztt4dGECPNeUmEgKuCIBZl4i0j_CZIRKYrZ3ACfkCoHLfRhYkPNR2Gog4bYJ_CmzEN5VFxQ7mrTkxesuTW25Jijb5CX5vauDPrESEyJjGw3kYNRhUkquTBSDjN4MYoJxqs0wN_UnfIhTnNSlCxTWZ1E9SUI_kmH3xtVc1a2FuWb_Eh3f1XHsoB0ULIw6kULpLQ==&c=-Q-OT2kkEXdc5z-QTmx3gRl6lWk9A8j8XXhST0CopHA8-LSecVXVTw==&ch=L3wx8i8Xu7tLqn-SSpzhM2MApT1x9Gv6JV3s0N1GVuRVPLI1kGtqSw==)
---
| Peter,
MAGA is getting smoked in states where it was once thought unimaginable. In Tuesday's elections, Democrats broke the almost three decade Republican hold on Miami's mayorship and also took an unexpected ruby red State House seat in Georgia.
If deep red Republican strongholds like Miami and Georgia are in play for Democrats, that means swing states like Michigan and Arizona are on track to go deep blue. However, just like MAGA's plan to win the midterms by rigging them via redistricting, they've also got a plan to cheat their way out of losing states like Michigan, Georgia, and Arizona:
Stealing their state supreme courts via obscure judicial elections.
If these efforts are successful we could see something truly horrific happen on Election Night 2028.
Imagine, it's November 7th 2028 -- Michigan, Arizona, and Georgia, are all called for Democrats in landslide blue wave victories and a Democrat wins the Presidency.
However, in the following days state courts slowly but surely invalidate these Democratic victories citing a rehash of the 2020 election denial spiel (Soros, illegal immigrants voting, etc). Ultimately the Democratic presidential victory is nullified. Trump is declared the victor.
It sounds like a nightmare and too dark to be true but this is exactly why MAGA is working overtime to steal these courts. Defend our Courts just foiled one of these attempts in Pennsylvania. Now MAGA is attempting the same playbook in AZ, MI, and GA this 2026 and we must mobilize once again.
Obscure state supreme court races are not sexy, they are hard to fundraise for, but the stakes are life and death. [Can we count on you to make a donation of $25, $10, or whatever amount is meaningful to you, to help Defend our Courts begin building the infrastructure to defend courts in key swing states? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ipZQfA5qwzHDkRnjMd25uyZkZCEcy2yl0YGG0CTUy3alwH6VgWSOztt4dGECPNeU1Roobx_xKYEqP-tHYunSGWTeEB9aegwx7FduMeiGUHYWi-p0hc1kHZscHMjuV48gNE2NMkKyWE74kaI8lBpTyO4NlMY0kIg-KtdT9RprqxO75jqN6NveSctYjtditmiiQm5bXUGd0wmWKLifjtfE0LJvjOqxFWeA2Og-173uS1AJn1I3Eqn6M86jbL98q3Sy&c=-Q-OT2kkEXdc5z-QTmx3gRl6lWk9A8j8XXhST0CopHA8-LSecVXVTw==&ch=L3wx8i8Xu7tLqn-SSpzhM2MApT1x9Gv6JV3s0N1GVuRVPLI1kGtqSw==)
---
| | | | | [DONATE](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ipZQfA5qwzHDkRnjMd25uyZkZCEcy2yl0YGG0CTUy3alwH6VgWSOztt4dGECPNeUmEgKuCIBZl4i0j_CZIRKYrZ3ACfkCoHLfRhYkPNR2Gog4bYJ_CmzEN5VFxQ7mrTkxesuTW25Jijb5CX5vauDPrESEyJjGw3kYNRhUkquTBSDjN4MYoJxqs0wN_UnfIhTnNSlCxTWZ1E9SUI_kmH3xtVc1a2FuWb_6WC6YDFkHXj8khhSS7Kejg==&c=-Q-OT2kkEXdc5z-QTmx3gRl6lWk9A8j8XXhST0CopHA8-LSecVXVTw==&ch=L3wx8i8Xu7tLqn-SSpzhM2MApT1x9Gv6JV3s0N1GVuRVPLI1kGtqSw==)

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Why Katie rejects corporate money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40566%2E3422442%2Ety6uPm)
Hey Peter,
Katie Porter’s campaign has cleared big hurdles, but our biggest test yet is coming up fast: our end-of-year fundraising deadline.
After December 31st, we’ll need to report how much money our campaign has raised—and everybody will be watching our numbers closely. We need to raise another $10,000 over email by our mid-month deadline to stay on track: **[can you chip in today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251213_1_ak.iFatbB&refcode=em20251213-40566&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40566%2E3422442%2Ety6uPm)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251213_1_ak.iFatbB&refcode=em20251213-40566&t=4&akid=40566%2E3422442%2Ety6uPm)
Some of our opponents don’t need to worry about grassroots fundraising. One is a billionaire who has already spent over $10 MILLION on TV ad buys, and others are cashing corporate checks. Katie does neither, because a worker-first agenda can’t be funded by corporate interests.
But that means if our opponents see bad fundraising on our filing, they will come after us even harder. We need to show strength, one $5 donation at a time.
**[We have our deadline and we have our goal. Now, we just need you, Peter. Will you pitch in $5 or more to help us hit our $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251213_1_ak.iFatbB&refcode=em20251213-40566&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=40566%2E3422442%2Ety6uPm)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251213-40566&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=40566_3422442_ty6uPm&akid=40566%2E3422442%2Ety6uPm)**

subject: A secret buried in the Epstein files just changed everything for Trump
body:

We’re almost halfway through December, which means we’re halfway to the biggest fundraising deadline of the year, and the last one before we head into 2026.

Every campaign in the country is treating this month as the opening bell of the midterm cycle, and if we don’t keep pace now, we’ll be starting the new year at a disadvantage.

The stakes are crystal clear. We’re up against policies to slash healthcare, pull back education funding, drill off our coastline, and place working families under constant financial pressure. That’s the landscape we enter in January, unless we build the resources to fight back right now.

**My team set a goal of raising $5k by MIDNIGHT on the 15th!** [If you’re able, will you make a contribution to help us have a strong start heading into 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121224051/588752678/-840681789?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20251213_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTAxYmYxNi02MmQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fY0eDVTAugHABIEr0piDoQnpbJDndVHZrVRgEqnf3xY=) | [CHIP IN $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121224055/588752682/-840681789?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20251213_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTAxYmYxNi02MmQ4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fY0eDVTAugHABIEr0piDoQnpbJDndVHZrVRgEqnf3xY=)

Thank you for standing with me during a month that matters more than most.

— Jimmy

name: Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Fraud Alert: Tim Walz Let Terrorists Steal $1B from MN Kids – Trump Was Right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m done watching from the sidelines. My name is Adam Schwarze - I’m a retired Navy SEAL, and I’m ready to serve the people of Minnesota and Americans around the nation. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1f62a7d7eea940de80d879041f948e23&_e=HqEh6Ybr6YF51Hj3-PXJpEvwgCS2fgzrKv8frwBeNybUEzUVfleQyE17YmNHH97iiXrxIT0McOVA2I4-WvVNK3tI-gTsWbzYCnu-tZlFubuawwc5hb3PLbAqSQJ-FWh3do6N-7RGVrlfNOIv3LpQE1124q6Z7x0680GhIjfYBlyxfL06vmRQ7mCq3OW5XkenZ4_3ucDdN7z2giLNGdOpBy_qhNAfebUFYGAYEH-dCTO88bag5CL7WMizKjCMz_HEyA-k2JB7H8fd44ROHs5wxzXcgUcGb4AEWC3OrXl5OHwme4hE2WrnvOt0i9bXdQpo48D1SONqqaPIQJ76Um5tuV-vSN9hyjuQNVyGPvNaD4xy_mogiPOQ6HPqSIoCBgQfNZRHKyVdXxK5LPUjau9JmGaFKdkh_PVQMw4GVggD0OGlHXa4HzSK9OnrnbD0cTjarKjbAQ8gk5muHVQ5ryOjrNB1yHWbjrcMJVuDzJuelM873nU9oqIOY_2-LQhA_vKInwGb_aqNGLlJZzt_GtKoe6JoJKkZbFQjMlCUjeg7Ih8er1pSZOUJs4IeLHJPBIqXkkm9aCehWpk7r9twh-8Uo1biynKU5eEb2eBX4NwF5TEiOZ8dzhS_9A0--7Wo50i0pqpXU9y_GM68hAQkMNssm2iNS6P8JAXLhs-16GwkoRJQ8b299XyY-OswRobshLtDp3JhARIbg1eBG1CFrnYQ0Vm1-7N9eolKIxQ5IRYExBx-3NDTewOpz6We7nsVChWf)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Picture this: Your hard-earned tax dollars—meant to feed starving kids, house the homeless, and help autistic families in our backyard—stolen by the billions. Not by faceless crooks, but by a network of Somali fraudsters, Tim Walz welcomed with open arms, some wiring cash straight to al-Shabaab terrorists plotting against America.

It's not a movie. It's Minnesota under Tim Walz and Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan. **And it's enraging.**

The New York Times dropped the bomb: "How Fraud Swamped Minnesota’s Social Services System on Tim Walz’s Watch." Over $1 billion vanished—more than our entire corrections budget—in brazen schemes: ghost kids "fed" in fake meal programs, phantom therapy sessions for non-existent patients, sham housing for the invisible homeless. 78 of 86 charged so far are tied to the Somali immigrant community Walz and Flanagan have shielded.

**Worse?** Whistleblowers—**over 400 brave DHS employees** —begged Walz to act years ago. Red flags everywhere. His response? _**Retaliation. Monitoring their emails. Threats to their jobs.**_ Discrediting their reports to avoid "racism" smears and keep those precious Somali votes flowing. One employee put it plain: "Walz is 100% responsible... We got the full weight of retaliation."

President Trump saw it coming.

But Walz? He gaslights on Meet the Press: "_**I take responsibility for putting people in jail.**_ "

Federal prosecutors did that, Tim. Not you.

**This is Democratic leadership:** Soft on crime, addicted to power. They audition for D.C. jobs while our state bleeds—kids go hungry, families lose homes, and terrorists get richer. **If it can happen here in the heartland, it'll devour America.**

I’m done watching from the sidelines. My name is Adam Schwarze - I’m a retired Navy SEAL, and I’m ready to serve the people of Minnesota and Americans around the nation in the United States Senate.

I'll haul Walz in for hearings, help identify every stolen cent, and slam the door on this madness.

Strong borders. Ironclad audits. Republican muscle in Washington to protect what's rightfully ours.

clean_body: I’m done watching from the sidelines. My name is Adam Schwarze - I’m a retired Navy SEAL, and I’m ready to serve the people of Minnesota and Americans around the nation. | Fellow Conservative, Picture this: Your hard-earned tax dollars—meant to feed starving kids, house the homeless, and help autistic families in our backyard—stolen by the billions. Not by faceless crooks, but by a network of Somali fraudsters, Tim Walz welcomed with open arms, some wiring cash straight to al-Shabaab terrorists plotting against America. It's not a movie. It's Minnesota under Tim Walz and Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan. And it's enraging. The New York Times dropped the bomb: "How Fraud Swamped Minnesota’s Social Services System on Tim Walz’s Watch." Over $1 billion vanished—more than our entire corrections budget—in brazen schemes: ghost kids "fed" in fake meal programs, phantom therapy sessions for non-existent patients, sham housing for the invisible homeless. 78 of 86 charged so far are tied to the Somali immigrant community Walz and Flanagan have shielded. Worse? Whistleblowers—over 400 brave DHS employees —begged Walz to act years ago. Red flags everywhere. His response? Retaliation. Monitoring their emails. Threats to their jobs. Discrediting their reports to avoid "racism" smears and keep those precious Somali votes flowing. One employee put it plain: "Walz is 100% responsible... We got the full weight of retaliation." President Trump saw it coming. But Walz? He gaslights on Meet the Press: "I take responsibility for putting people in jail. " Federal prosecutors did that, Tim. Not you. This is Democratic leadership: Soft on crime, addicted to power. They audition for D.C. jobs while our state bleeds—kids go hungry, families lose homes, and terrorists get richer. If it can happen here in the heartland, it'll devour America. I’m done watching from the sidelines. My name is Adam Schwarze - I’m a retired Navy SEAL, and I’m ready to serve the people of Minnesota and Americans around the nation in the United States Senate. I'll haul Walz in for hearings, help identify every stolen cent, and slam the door on this madness. Strong borders. Ironclad audits. Republican muscle in Washington to protect what's rightfully ours. For Minnesota. For America. For the kids they robbed. Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: If we keep this up, she doesn’t stand a chance... | Friend, The outpouring of grassroots support I’ve received since officially announcing my gubernatorial campaign has been truly incredible. Within just a few hours of my announcement, we raised over $1 MILLION for my gubernatorial campaign and the New York GOP! Those kinds of numbers will send a shiver down Kathy Hochul’s spine. The worst governor in America knows she can’t win a free and fair election that’s decided on the issues. Her only hope is to BUY her way to reelection – so if we can keep this momentum going, she won’t stand a chance! But that last part is key, Friend... To compete with the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys and win this race, we have to keep our momentum going from today all the way through Election Day. That’s why I set an ambitious goal of raising an additional $1,000,000 by midnight tomorrow to ensure we are in the strongest possible position. Let’s CRUSH this goal and show Hochul that her days in office are numbered! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: My call with President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
This is what he said to me...
| Hi friend, it’s not every day that you get to speak with President Obama After my election in 2022, President Obama called me to give me some important advice: **to stay involved.** That’s exactly what I did. It’s why I stepped up to lead Power to the Polls Wisconsin — to make sure Black and working class voters across our state were being heard and energized to turnout in our critical elections. It’s why we knocked a million doors, year-round, in three years and supported supreme court candidates who believe in equal justice for everyone in our state — including Justice Crawford who won in a landslide victory in April. **This campaign is about serving _you_ , about making sure that people can not only live in Wisconsin, but thrive. [And that’s why today I am more motivated than ever to stay involved, just like President Obama once told me — can I count on you to contribute $15 or $27?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121325_B1_Obama&t=2&akid=5712%2E196590%2EM8KmHC)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6574?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121325_B1_Obama&t=3&akid=5712%2E196590%2EM8KmHC)
